Abstract: License plate character detection is a crucial component of intelligent transportation systems, where high accuracy and computational efficiency are required for real-time deployment. Although recent deep learning-based methods have substantially improved detection performance, many high-accuracy models rely on large-scale architectures that incur substantial computational overhead, limiting their applicability to resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose MicroCharNet, an ultra-lightweight model specifically designed for license plate character detection. The proposed architecture employs a compact backbone composed of C2f blocks, integrated with CoordAtt module to enhance feature extraction while preserving spatial information. A lightweight C3k2-based neck fuses multi-level features, followed by a single-level anchor-free detection head that enables end-to-end prediction. Experiments conducted on the UFPR-ALPR dataset demonstrate that MicroCharNet achieves competitive detection accuracy with only 0.08M parameters and 0.096 GFLOPs, while outperforming several recent YOLO-based baselines. Hardware-level evaluations further confirm its efficiency for real-time deployment on edge devices. These results indicate that carefully designed ultra-lightweight architectures can effectively balance accuracy and efficiency in license plate character detection. The source code is available at https://github.com/chequanghuy/MicroCharNet.

</details>


### [182] [Cycle-World: Mitigating Error Accumulation in Long-term Video World Models via Reverse-Prediction Cycle Consistency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11836)
*Zihan Su,Teng Hu,Jiangning Zhang,Ruiyan Wang,Ran Yi,Lizhuang Ma,Dacheng Tao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Cycle-World提出通过循环一致性约束和反向预测模型，在训练和推理阶段共同抑制自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中的误差累积，实现60秒视频的稳定生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归扩散模型在长视频生成中面临误差累积问题，微小预测偏差随时间放大，导致生成漂移、结构坍塌和视觉退化。

Method: 1) 训练阶段引入反向预测模型，嵌入因果约束，迫使前向生成器产生可逆序列；2) 推理阶段将冻结的反向模型作为运行时校正器，通过梯度循环引导迭代优化潜在表示，主动抑制误差累积。

Result: 在VBench基准上，Cycle-World在60秒视频合成中实现了最先进的整体生成质量和长程时间一致性。

Conclusion: 训练-推理双阶段协同机制有效缓解了误差漂移，证明循环一致性约束是稳定长视频生成的有效范式。

Abstract: Autoregressive diffusion models have enabled high-quality video generation, yet their sequential nature inherently suffers from error accumulation. In long-horizon video synthesis, minor prediction deviations compound over time, inevitably leading to unconstrained generative drift, structural collapse, and severe visual degradation. To address this, we propose Cycle-World, a novel framework designed for stable and temporally consistent long-video generation. Our approach tackles error drift by enforcing strict temporal reversibility across both the training and inference phases. Theoretically, we demonstrate that forward generative drift can be strictly bottlenecked by a cycle-consistency objective. During training, we integrate an efficient reverse-prediction model to implicitly embed causal constraints into the forward generator, compelling it to produce reversible sequences that tightly adhere to the natural video manifold. At inference time, we repurpose this frozen reverse model as a runtime corrector. Through gradient-based cycle guidance, it iteratively refines the generated latent representations, actively suppressing accumulated errors before they are committed to the historical context. Extensive experiments on the VBench benchmark demonstrate that Cycle-World's dual-phase synergy significantly mitigates error drift, achieving state-of-the-art overall generation quality and long-horizon temporal consistency in 60-second synthesis.

</details>


### [183] [HASTE: A Platform for Rapid Post-Disaster Building Damage Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11838)
*Caleb Robinson,Anthony Ortiz,Simone Fobi Nsutezo,Cameron Birge,Meygha Machado,Marcelo Duarte,Joaquin Rivero Rodriguez,Anthony Cintron Roman,Kevin White,Inbal Becker-Reshef,Juan M. Lavista Ferres*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HASTE是一个面向非机器学习专家的开源无代码网页平台，利用灾后卫星图像快速生成建筑物损伤地图。它通过两种方法（小样本语义分割和基于基础模型嵌入的逻辑回归）实现快速损伤评估，已在30多次真实灾害响应中得到验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型灾害发生后，救援人员需要在数小时内获得建筑物损毁地图。现有高性能模型依赖匹配的灾前灾后影像和过往事件的训练数据，而在新灾害的第一天这些条件通常无法满足。亟需一种无需机器学习专业知识、轻量级且可快速部署的解决方案。

Method: HASTE提供两种方法共享统一界面：(1) 小样本语义分割——用户在灾后影像上标注多边形，用小样本训练语义分割模型，输出逐像素结果并与现有建筑足迹结合；(2) 基础模型嵌入+逻辑回归——用预训练视觉模型为每个建筑足迹生成嵌入，用户标记少量建筑，浏览器端拟合逻辑回归模型，数秒内完成全场景评分。

Result: 初步实验表明，基于基础模型嵌入的方法在xBD数据集上仅用全监督ResNet-50基线5%的标签量即可达到相同性能。自2023年起，HASTE已支持30多次真实灾害响应（地震、飓风、龙卷风、洪水、野火等），在影像可用后数小时至数天内向人道主义伙伴交付结果。

Conclusion: HASTE验证了无需灾前影像、仅用少量人工标注即可快速生成可靠建筑物损伤地图的可行性。未来方向包括视觉-语言评估、主动学习，以及将损伤模型扩展到道路和其他基础设施。

Abstract: When a large disaster strikes, responders need a map of which buildings are damaged within hours. The models that do well on public benchmarks assume matched before-and-after imagery and a training set drawn from similar past events, and neither is usually available for a new disaster in its first day. We present HASTE (High-speed Assessment and Satellite Tracking for Emergencies), a no-code web platform that lets analysts who are not machine learning engineers produce per-building damage maps from post-disaster satellite imagery. HASTE implements two methods that share one interface. The first requires the user to label polygons over the post-disaster scene, trains a small semantic segmentation model on that single scene, runs it over the whole image, and joins the per-pixel output to existing building footprints. The second embeds every footprint with a pretrained vision model, requires the user to label a handful of buildings, and fits a logistic regression in the browser that scores the rest of the scene in seconds. We describe the platform, both methods, and the engineering that supports them. We also report preliminary experiments on xBD showing that foundation-model embeddings pooled over footprints separate damaged from intact buildings using post-disaster imagery alone, matching a fully supervised ResNet-50 baseline with a twentieth of its labels. HASTE and its predecessors have supported more than thirty real-world disaster responses since 2023, spanning earthquakes, hurricanes, cyclones, floods, wildfires, and tornadoes, delivering results to humanitarian partners within hours to days of imagery becoming available. We close with the directions we think are most promising, including vision-language assessment, active learning, and damage models for roads and other infrastructure. HASTE is open source at https://github.com/microsoft/haste.

</details>


### [184] [LoRA-Based Cascaded Multimodal Fusion for Action Recognition in Medical Training Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11839)
*Divya Mereddy,Jeevan Beedareddy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于级联LoRA的多模态融合框架，用于医疗培训环境中的动作与活动识别。该方法通过参数高效的方式，先融合关联度高的模态，再逐步融入异质模态，无需重新训练已有组件。在NurViD和Nurse Training数据集上的初步实验表明，该策略优于单模态模型，且与已有基线性能相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗培训环境中的动作与活动识别需要融合多种异构模态数据，但传统多模态融合方法往往假设固定的融合结构，且全参数微调成本高昂。本文希望提出一种参数高效、可扩展的融合方法，支持不同模态组合的灵活适配。

Method: 提出级联LoRA多模态融合框架，采用参数高效的模态特定LoRA适配器，按顺序逐步融合模态：先融合相关性较高的模态，再逐步加入异构模态。各阶段独立训练，无需重新训练已有组件，支持跨数据集的模态集可扩展适配。

Result: 在两个医疗培训环境数据集（NurViD和Nurse Training）上评估，级联融合策略优于单模态模型，并与以往数据集特定基线表现相当。

Conclusion: 级联LoRA融合是一种有前景的参数高效方法，适用于医疗培训动作与活动识别中异构模态的集成任务。

Abstract: This paper presents a cascaded Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based multimodal fusion framework for action and activity recognition in healthcare-oriented training environments. The proposed architecture combines parameter-efficient modality-specific adaptation with sequential fusion, enabling modalities to be integrated in stages without retraining previously learned components. Rather than assuming a fixed fusion structure, the framework first integrates more closely related modalities and then incorporates additional heterogeneous modalities, supporting scalable adaptation across datasets with different modality sets.We evaluate the framework on two healthcare-oriented training environment datasets: NurViD and the Nurse Training dataset. Across these datasets, preliminary results suggest that the proposed cascaded fusion strategy improves over individual modality models and provides competitive performance relative to previously reported dataset-specific baselines. Overall, these findings indicate that cascaded LoRA-based fusion is a promising parameter-efficient approach for integrating heterogeneous modalities in medical training action and activity recognition tasks. github: https://github.com/anonymous0-ai/LoRA-Based-Cascaded-Multimodal-Fusion-.git.

</details>


### [185] [Beyond the Single Camera: Agentic Multi-View Reasoning in Sports Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11844)
*Kerui Chen,Jinglu Wang,Xiaoyi Zhang,Yan Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了SportMV-Bench，首个评估多模态大模型在多视角体育视频理解能力的基准，并设计了SportMV-Agent框架，通过主动视角选择、感知工具执行和基于证据的推理循环，显著提升了模型表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM在单视角视频理解上表现良好，但体育视频存在密集遮挡、快速运动和复杂交互，单视角难以解决。实际比赛中多角度录制提供了互补信息，但缺乏评估MLLM多视角体育视频理解的基准。

Method: 构建SportMV-Bench（787个多视角视频包，2592个QA对），涵盖三类任务（感知识别、规则事件解释、裁决推理）；提出SportMV-Agent，包含主动视角选择、感知工具执行和基于证据推理的迭代循环框架。

Result: 当前MLLM未能有效利用多视角信息，瓶颈在于细粒度视觉感知和视角选择，而非逻辑推理或领域知识。SportMV-Agent相对最强基线提升了14.46%。

Conclusion: 多视角体育视频理解仍是一个挑战，SportMV-Bench为评估提供了基准，SportMV-Agent展示了通过主动视角选择和工具增强的有效路径。

Abstract: Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on single-view video understanding benchmarks. However, sports videos involve dense occlusion, rapid motion, and complex interactions that are difficult to resolve from a single viewpoint. In practice, sports events are recorded from multiple camera angles, providing complementary evidence used by referees. Yet, no existing benchmark evaluates MLLMs on multi-view sports video understanding. To address this gap, we introduce SportMV-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark built from official match recordings, through a dedicated pipeline combining LLM-based generation, MLLM-based verification, and human filtering to ensure quality and consistency. SportMV-Bench containing 787 multi-view video bundles and 2592 question-answer pairs across three categories: Perception-Aware Recognition (PAR), Rule-aware Event Interpretation (REI), and Adjudicative Decision Reasoning(ADR). Our analysis shows that current MLLMs fail to effectively exploit multi-view information, with the bottlenecks lying in fine-grained visual perception and view selection rather than logical reasoning or domain knowledge. We propose SportMV-Agent, an agentic framework that orchestrates an iterative loop of active view selection, perception tool execution, and evidence-grounded reasoning, achieving a significant 14.46% relative improvement over the strongest MLLM baseline.

</details>


### [186] [Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11862)
*Shijie Wang,Honglu Zhou,Ziyang Wang,Ran Xu,Caiming Xiong,Silvio Savarese,Chen Sun,Juan Carlos Niebles*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出E-VQA任务，要求视频大模型同时输出语义答案与时空证据（时间片段+密集跟踪分割掩码），构建了首个像素级人工验证基准ST-Evidence，并开发了自动化数据生成管道ST-Evidence-Instruct（16万规模），微调后模型在7B规模上取得了显著提升（t-mean +27.2, J&F +13.8）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频大语言模型虽在QA上表现优异，但缺乏可验证的视觉定位能力（黑箱问题）；现有解释性方法（文本理由/稀疏边界框）难以处理视频中的遮挡、非刚性形变等复杂动态。

Method: 1) 定义E-VQA任务：联合输出语义答案、时间片段、密集跟踪分割掩码；2) 构建ST-Evidence人工验证基准；3) 开发自动化数据生成管道，构建ST-Evidence-Instruct数据集（16万样本）；4) 在该数据集上微调带定位能力的视频LLM。

Result: QA准确率与真实视觉感知之间存在显著解耦，单纯扩大模型规模无法弥合；微调后的模型在7B规模上相比UniPixel基线取得显著提升（t-mean +27.2, J&F +13.8）。

Conclusion: 所提方法为可解释、有证据支撑的视频理解建立了稳健基线，代码与数据已开源。

Abstract: Current Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) excel in question answering (QA) but largely operate as black boxes, providing textual answers without verifiable visual grounding. Existing explainability efforts rely on textual rationales or sparse bounding boxes, which struggle to capture complex video dynamics such as occlusions and non-rigid deformations. We propose Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering (E-VQA), a novel task requiring models to jointly output a semantic answer and precise spatio-temporal evidence: temporal segments and dense, tracked object segmentation masklets. To support this, we introduce ST-Evidence, the first human-verified benchmark for both discriminative and generative pixel-level grounding. Evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal a critical decoupling between QA accuracy and true visual perception that scaling alone fails to bridge. To address this, we develop scalable, automated generation pipelines to create ST-Evidence-Instruct, a 160k-scale dataset bridging high-level reasoning with fine-grained grounding. Fine-tuning grounded Video LLMs on this data yields substantial gains over the corresponding size-matched UniPixel baselines (e.g., +27.2 t-mean and +13.8 J&F on a 7B model), establishing a robust baseline for explainable, evidence-backed video understanding. Code and data are available at https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/EVQA.

</details>


### [187] [Latent-Identity Tuning in Text-to-Image Personalization Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11885)
*Daniel Garibi,Ronen Kamenetsky,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Daniel Cohen-Or,Or Patashnik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Identity Tuning方法，通过探索预训练冻结编码器的潜在空间实现细粒度身份调优，无需额外训练即可实现多样化、一致性的局部面部编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于文本到图像模型的面部编辑方法缺乏细粒度编辑所需精度，微小修改就可能显著改变身份感知。

Method: 利用预训练冻结编码器的潜在空间，通过识别潜在语义方向（尤其是与面部区域对应的token子空间）实现局部化、细粒度的语义编辑，无需额外训练。

Result: 定性和定量实验验证了该方法能实现多样化的局部面部编辑，同时保持跨图像的身份一致性。

Conclusion: 提出了一种无需额外训练、基于冻结编码器潜在语义方向的细粒度身份调优方法，在面部编辑精度和身份保持之间取得良好平衡。

Abstract: Generating and editing a person's face demands high precision, as even minor modifications can significantly alter a subject's perceived identity. Current personalization and editing methods built on general-purpose text-to-image models, however, often lack the precision required for fine-grained facial edits. We present a method for fine-grained identity tuning in text-to-image personalization models. Unlike standard image editing, which operates on a given image, identity tuning modifies the latent representation of a specific identity, enabling the generation of diverse images that consistently depict the same edited identity. To enable fine-grained latent identity tuning, we explore the latent space of a pre-trained, frozen encoder for text-to-image personalization. Our approach requires no additional training. Instead, it leverages the existing architecture of a frozen encoder to uncover latent semantic directions. This space consists of a set of latent tokens that play distinct roles in capturing different aspects of an identity and often correspond to specific spatial or semantic facial regions. We show that meaningful directions can be identified within this space and within subspaces defined by selected tokens, enabling localized, fine-grained, and semantically coherent edits. We validate our approach through qualitative and quantitative experiments that demonstrate diverse localized facial edits while preserving cross-image identity consistency. Project page at: https://garibida.github.io/IdentityTuning/

</details>


### [188] [Read It Back: Pretrained MLLMs Are Zero-Shot Reward Models for Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11886)
*Runhui Huang,Qihui Zhang,Zhe Liu,Yu Gao,Jie Wu,Hengshuang Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出 SpectraReward，一种无需训练的奖励函数，通过计算生成图像对原始提示的恢复似然来作为奖励，直接复用预训练 MLLM 的图像-文本对齐能力，无需偏好标签或微调；同时提出 Self-SpectraReward 实现闭环自改进。在多种扩散模型、RL 算法和 MLLM 骨干上的实验表明，该方法显著且一致地提升了生成性能，并优于先前的 MLLM 奖励方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于 MLLM 的图像生成强化学习方法通常需要人工偏好标签或微调奖励模型，成本高昂。作者希望利用预训练 MLLM 本身的对齐能力，设计一种无需额外训练、无需人工标注的奖励函数，从而简化图像生成 RL 的流程。

Method: SpectraReward 通过一次图像条件化的 teacher-forced 前向传播，计算生成图像对原始提示的平均对数似然作为奖励分数。核心思想是：如果模型能从生成图像中很好地恢复出原始文本提示，则说明图像与提示对齐良好。Self-SpectraReward 则针对统一多模态模型，让策略模型自身的理解分支为生成分支提供奖励，形成闭环。

Result: 在两种扩散模型、三种 RL 算法、九种 MLLM 骨干（4B~235B）以及五个分布外文本到图像基准上的实验表明：SpectraReward 和 Self-SpectraReward 显著且一致地提升了生成性能，优于先前的 MLLM 奖励训练方法。此外发现更大的奖励 MLLM 并不总是更好，而 Self-SpectraReward 能匹配甚至超越更大的外部奖励模型。

Conclusion: 基于恢复似然的训练免费奖励函数是一种有效的图像生成 RL 方法，奖励-策略的对齐程度是影响 RL 效果的关键因素，Self-SpectraReward 为统一多模态模型提供了无需外部模型的闭环自改进范式。

Abstract: In this paper, we propose SpectraReward, a training-free reward function that turns pretrained MLLMs into off-the-shelf reward models for image-generation reinforcement learning. Instead of asking the MLLM to judge a generated image or answer decomposed verification questions, SpectraReward measures how well the original prompt can be recovered from the generated image through a single image-conditioned, teacher-forced forward pass. We use the average image-conditioned prompt log-likelihood as the reward, directly reusing the MLLM's pretrained image-text alignment ability without preference labels, reward-model fine-tuning. We further introduce Self-SpectraReward, a special case for unified multimodal models where the policy's own understanding branch serves as the reward model for its generation branch, forming a closed-loop self-improving framework without external reward models or external knowledge. Extensive experiments validate SpectraReward through a broad image-generation RL study covering two diffusion models, three RL algorithms, nine reward MLLM backbones from four MLLM families spanning 4B to 235B parameters, and five out-of-distribution text-to-image benchmarks. Results show that both SpectraReward and Self-SpectraReward significantly and consistently improve generation performance and outperform prior MLLM-derived reward training methods. Further analysis reveals that larger reward MLLMs are not always better, while Self-SpectraReward can match or surpass much larger external reward models, suggesting that reward-policy alignment is a key factor for effective image-generation RL. Project Page: https://huangrh99.github.io/SpectraReward/

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [189] [CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09880)
*Frank Nie,Ethan B. Liu,Yuan Zhu,Loe Yan,Wei Fan,Jindong Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 介绍了CLIR-Bench，一个用于评估模型在不规则临床时间序列上进行问答推理能力的基准，包含6,600个实例、11个临床变量、4个能力维度和11项任务。实验表明现有通用模型难以处理和检索稀疏的临床时序证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准主要关注规则采样的时间序列问答或静态医疗问答，缺乏对模型能否在不规则时序观测中忠实定位证据并进行推理的评估能力。

Method: 通过一个四阶段流水线，从去标识化的ICU记录中构建CLIR-Bench基准，包含6,600个问答实例，覆盖11个临床变量，组织为4个能力维度和11项任务。每个问题都关联明确的时序证据和特定任务的答案推导规则。

Result: 实验表明现有通用模型在检索和推理稀疏临床证据方面表现不佳，难以应对不规则时序数据。

Conclusion: 需要更强的面向不规则时间序列的推理方法来处理临床问答任务。

Abstract: Clinical time series are central to patient monitoring, risk assessment, and clinical decision support. However, they are often sparse, irregularly sampled, and asynchronous, making it difficult for models to identify the temporal evidence required for clinical Question Answering (QA). Existing benchmarks primarily focus on regularly sampled time-series QA or medical QA over static data, and therefore rarely assess whether models can faithfully ground their answers in irregular temporal observations. To fill this gap, we introduce CLIR-Bench, a benchmark for irregular clinical time series QA constructed from de-identified ICU records through a principled four-stage pipeline. CLIR-Bench contains 6,600 QA instances spanning 11 clinical variables, organized into four capability dimensions and 11 tasks. Each question is linked to explicit temporal evidence and task-specific answer derivation rules, enabling evaluation of both answer accuracy and evidence use. Experiments show that existing generalist models struggle to retrieve and reason over sparse clinical evidence, highlighting the need for stronger irregular time-series reasoning methods. Our code and data are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/winall/CLIR-Bench.

</details>


### [190] [Index SLM Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09885)
*Lusheng Zhang,Shien He,Tianxing Yan,Mengran Yu,Ziang Cui,Kai Zhao,Xiaojing Liu,Tianjiao Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Bilibili发布了Index-1.9B系列开源小语言模型，包括Base、Pure、Chat和Character四个变体。Base模型在2.8万亿token上预训练，在多项基准测试中平均得分64.92，超越许多更大规模的开源模型。该系列采用了Warmup-Stable-Decay学习率调度、Norm-Head输出层等技术创新，并报告了关于模型深度、学习率、数据质量等控制实验的发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发高性能的小规模开源语言模型，探索并分享预训练过程中的关键发现（如学习率调度与数据质量的交互、指令数据的影响等），推动小模型领域的开源研究。

Method: 1) 预训练采用Warmup-Stable-Decay学习率调度，在decay阶段集中引入高质量筛选数据；2) 使用Norm-Head输出层稳定大学习率下的训练；3) 构建四个模型变体进行对比研究：Base（基础）、Pure（过滤指令数据）、Chat（SFT+DPO对齐）、Character（RAG增强角色扮演）；4) 系统进行控制实验探究模型深度、学习率大小与调度、数据质量等因素的影响。

Result: Index-1.9B-Base在考试、推理、数学、代码等基准测试中平均得分64.92，超越或持平数倍于其大小的开源模型。发现学习率decay阶段集中高质量数据可提升性能；在恒定学习率阶段中期观察到基准性能的意外突增。

Conclusion: Index-1.9B系列证明精心设计的预训练策略（特别是学习率调度与数据质量的协同）能使小模型达到与更大规模模型竞争的性能。同时为社区提供了完整的开源模型和评估代码，以及有价值的预训练实践洞察。

Abstract: We present Index-1.9B, a series of open small language models developed at Bilibili. The series comprises four models: Index-1.9B-Base, a foundation model with 1.9 billion non-embedding parameters pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and English tokens; Index-1.9B-Pure, a control variant trained with an identical recipe but with all instruction-like data strictly filtered from the corpus; Index-1.9B-Chat, aligned from the base model with supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization; and Index-1.9B-Character, which augments the chat model with retrieval-augmented generation for few-shot role-playing customization. Pre-training employs a Warmup-Stable-Decay learning-rate schedule in which the concentration of curated data is raised substantially during the decay phase, together with a Norm-Head output layer that stabilizes training under large learning rates. On a suite of standard benchmarks covering examination, reasoning, mathematics, and code, Index-1.9B-Base attains an average score of 64.92, competitive with or exceeding open models of several times its size. We further report controlled studies on model depth, learning-rate magnitude and scheduling, the interaction between learning-rate decay and data quality, and the effect of including instruction data during pre-training, and we document an unexplained surge in benchmark performance midway through the constant-learning-rate phase. All models, together with evaluation code, are released at https://github.com/bilibili/Index-1.9B.

</details>


### [191] [RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09908)
*Kaiji Zhou,Vladimir Kalmykov,Yue Feng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究异构推荐代理（包括协同过滤、序列模型、基于内容的检索器和LLM重排序器）的任务感知路由选择。在MovieLens-1M数据集上，请求级硬选择效果有限（HR@10=0.223），而物品级学习聚合表现更优（HR@10=0.295），表明细粒度聚合比粗粒度路由更有前景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推荐系统面临多种异构代理（协同过滤、序列模型、内容检索、LLM重排序）的选择困境，没有一种代理能在所有场景下表现最优，因此需要研究如何在成本约束下进行任务感知的代理路由选择。

Method: 提出RouteRec框架，比较两种路由策略：1）请求级硬选择（每次请求只选择一个完整代理列表）；2）物品级学习聚合（在物品层面融合多个代理的推荐结果）。在四种传统推荐代理和一种LLM重排序代理上进行实验。

Result: 全质量oracle显示存在较大提升空间（HR@10=0.584）。但硬选择低于基线BM25（0.223 vs 0.254）；物品级聚合的廉价版本与BM25持平，门控全代理聚合达到HR@10=0.295（使用70.2% LLM调用）。

Conclusion: 请求级选择完整代理列表的方式过于粗糙，不适合稀疏固定候选集场景；物品级聚合是更有前途的操作空间。

Abstract: Recommender systems increasingly face a choice among heterogeneous agents -- collaborative filters, sequential models, content-based retrievers, and LLM-based rerankers -- yet no single agent is uniformly best. We study this choice as task-aware agent ranking under cost constraints using RouteRec, a framework that compares request-level hard selection with item-level learned aggregation over four traditional recommender agents and one LLM reranker agent. On MovieLens-1M, the full quality oracle has substantial headroom (HR@10 = 0.584), confirming that useful cross-agent signal exists. Under a leakage-free 5-fold out-of-fold protocol, however, hard selection remains below BM25 (0.223 vs. 0.254), and selective LLM escalation does not improve it. The same protocol yields a different outcome for learned aggregation: its cheap-only variant matches BM25 in HR and has a higher NDCG point estimate (0.123 vs. 0.114), while gated all-agent aggregation reaches HR@10 = 0.295 with 70.2\% LLM calls. The resulting lesson is not that routing is solved, but that request-level selection of one complete agent list is too coarse for this sparse fixed-candidate setting; item-level aggregation is the more promising action space.

</details>


### [192] [Global Merger-Arbitrage Forecasting with Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09921)
*Hinal Jajal,Michal Mucha,Charles Sweat,Chris Pulman,Charlie Flanagan,Peter Anderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个针对并购套利场景的语言模型预测系统，该系统能够处理数百页技术文档的长上下文推理，在超过400笔跨国大型交易上实现了优于市场隐含概率、XGBoost和前沿语言模型的表现（Brier分数0.151）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM预测工作主要聚焦于混合主题的通用基准和短文本（如新闻摘要），缺乏在需要长上下文推理的高风险专业金融场景（如并购套利）中的研究。

Method: 结合专家引导的上下文工程（expert-guided context engineering）与基于事后视角推理轨迹（hindsight-guided reasoning traces）的微调；输出三种互斥结果的概率分布（按原条款完成、更高出价、交易终止）。

Result: 在覆盖42个国家的400+笔大型交易上，微调系统将类别平衡Brier分数降至0.151，比校准后的市场隐含概率低24%，比XGBoost低19%，比前沿语言模型低25-42%。

Conclusion: LLM预测能够在专业的长上下文金融工作流中取得成功，其中事后监督和专家设计的上下文起到关键作用。

Abstract: We present a language-model forecasting system for merger arbitrage, a specialized high-stakes financial setting in which the task is to predict the outcome of announced M\&A deals. Unlike prior work on judgmental forecasting with LLMs, which has focused on broad mixed-topic benchmarks and short context such as news snippets, we study a setting that requires long-context reasoning over hundreds of pages of technical documents. Our system combines expert-guided context engineering with finetuning on hindsight-guided reasoning traces derived from historical deals. Given an announced deal, it outputs a probability distribution over three mutually exclusive outcomes: closing at announced terms, a higher bid, or deal termination. On an out-of-sample set of more than 400 large deals spanning 42 countries, our finetuned system achieves the best performance of any method we evaluate, reducing class-balanced Brier score to 0.151. This is 24\% below calibrated market-implied probabilities, 19\% below XGBoost, and 25-42\% below frontier language models. These results, together with ablation studies, show that LLM-based forecasting can succeed in specialized, long-context financial workflows, with hindsight-based supervision and expert-designed context playing a critical role.

</details>


### [193] [Q-BridgeNet: A Quantization Network for Cross-Lingual Sign Language Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11215)
*Liqian Feng,Lintao Wang,Xiaochen Liu,Anusha Withana,Ken-Tye Yong,Dehui Kong,Zhiyong Wang,Kun Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: Q-BridgeNet提出了一种统一的多语言手语翻译框架，通过自适应分割和残差向量量化学习离散Q单元，在符号语言侧共享基码本捕获语言无关语义、用残差码本保留语言特异性，在口语侧微调多语言大模型，在多个数据集上达到SOTA效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有手语翻译方法多针对单一语言对，多语言翻译面临跨语言冲突难以统一建模的问题，无法同时捕获共享语义与保留语言特异性变化。

Method: 提出Q-BridgeNet统一框架：符号语言侧采用自适应分割+残差向量量化学习离散Q单元（共享基码本+语言特异性残差码本），口语侧微调多语言大模型在Q单元空间上运行，利用跨语言先验实现统一模型。

Result: 在PHOENIX14T、How2Sign和CSL-Daily上取得SOTA性能，有效缓解了跨语言冲突，并且在非原生语言对上展现出强泛化能力。

Conclusion: Q-BridgeNet通过离散Q单元设计成功实现了多语言手语翻译的统一建模，兼顾了跨语言语义共享与语言特异性保持，为多语言手语翻译提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Most sign language translation (SLT) methods focus on isolated native sign-spoken pairs (e.g., American Sign Language - English). Extending language-specific SLT models to multilingual translation would improve accessibility by enabling communication across diverse sign and spoken language communities. However, existing multilingual SLT approaches still struggle to learn a unified model that minimizes cross-lingual conflicts while capturing shared cross-lingual semantics and preserving language-specific variations across different sign languages. Therefore, we propose Q-BridgeNet, a unified framework for multilingual SLT that jointly mitigates cross-lingual conflicts across both the sign language and spoken language sides. On the sign language side, Q-BridgeNet learns discrete Q-units via adaptive segmentation and residual vector quantization: a shared base codebook provides language-agnostic semantic primitives, while language-specific residual codebooks refine heterogeneous signing semantics. On the spoken language side, a multilingual LLM is fine-tuned to operate in the Q-unit space, leveraging cross-lingual priors to enable a unified SLT model. Experiments on PHOENIX14T, How2Sign, and CSL-Daily show that Q-BridgeNet effectively mitigates cross-lingual conflicts, achieving state-of-the-art performance on native sign-spoken pairs while also demonstrating strong generalization to non-native pairs. Our source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/FengLiQ/Q-BridgeNet

</details>


### [194] [Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09932)
*Robert Williams*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个评估LLM生成临床试验摘要忠实度的基准框架，包含200个分层试验、六维标注方案，并开发了知识图谱增强检索系统，显著提升了摘要忠实度（p<0.0001）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在总结临床试验结果时容易产生幻觉，这对医疗决策等高风险场景构成重大威胁，目前缺乏针对多利益相关方（医疗服务提供者、患者、支付方）的忠实度系统评估框架。

Method: 从ClinicalTrials.gov数据库抽取200个分层试验，设计受众特定的提示模板和六维忠实度标注方案；使用交叉编码器NLI模型对GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash生成的1800个摘要评分作为基线；开发知识图谱增强检索系统进行改进。

Result: "Unsupported Claims"是三种模型的主要失败模式（平均1.55/3分）。知识图谱增强检索系统在忠实度上显著提升（entailment +0.0125, faithfulness +0.0130, p<0.0001），但改进路径因模型而异：GPT-4o主要通过减少矛盾，Claude和Gemini主要通过增加蕴含。

Conclusion: 知识图谱增强检索能有效提升LLM生成临床试验摘要的忠实度，但不同模型的改进机制不同，提示在医疗摘要场景中需要模型特定的优化策略。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to summarize clinical trial results for healthcare providers, patients, and payers, but their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high-stakes context. This study introduces a benchmark evaluation framework for measuring the faithfulness of LLM-generated clinical trial summaries across three stakeholder audiences. The framework consists of 200 stratified trials drawn from the Aggregate Analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov database, evaluated using audience-specific prompt templates and a six-dimension faithfulness annotation schema. Baseline measurements were established for GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 2.5 Flash across 1,800 generated summaries scored using a cross-encoder natural language inference (NLI) model. Unsupported Claims was identified as the dominant failure mode across all three models, with a mean annotation score of 1.55 out of three. A knowledge-graph-augmented retrieval system was developed and evaluated against the baseline, producing statistically significant improvements in NLI-based faithfulness scores (entailment +0.0125, faithfulness +0.0130, p < 0.0001). Improvement pathways were model-dependent, with GPT-4o improving primarily through contradiction reduction while Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 2.5 Flash improved through increased entailment.

</details>


### [195] [Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09957)
*Tsz-To Wong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了在设备端进行英文到繁体中文的字幕翻译，针对短输入、短输出、批量大小为1的推理、低延迟和隐私约束等条件。通过将151k词表替换为64k字幕领域词表，并经过嵌入校准和全监督微调，模型LocalSubs在OpenSubtitles2024测试集的500样本子集上，相对于Google Translate取得了59.2%的胜率（排除平局），并在Apple M2 Metal上实现1.63倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 设备端英译繁中字幕翻译面临短输入、低延迟和隐私约束，传统针对长上下文或高吞吐量的优化在此场景下效果有限，因此需要专门优化的方案。

Method: 基于LMT-60-0.6B模型，将151k词表替换为64k字幕领域词表，迁移嵌入空间，通过嵌入校准和全监督微调适配模型。

Result: 在500样本子集上，LocalSubs在GPT-4o成对评判下对Google Translate取得59.2%的排除平局胜率；Apple M2 Metal上64k词表模型比151k基线实现1.63倍加速。

Conclusion: 设备端字幕翻译通过领域特化词表压缩和微调，能在保持翻译质量的同时显著提升推理速度，特别适合短输入场景。

Abstract: This report studies on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation for Taiwan under short inputs, short outputs, batch-size-one inference, low latency, and privacy constraints. These conditions limit the value of optimizations designed for long-context or high-throughput language-model serving.
  Starting from LMT-60-0.6B, preliminary profiling suggests that vocabulary projection becomes a more important decode-time cost after GGUF quantization reduces the relative cost of Transformer blocks. We replace the original 151k-token vocabulary with a 64k-token subtitle-domain tokenizer, migrate the embedding space, and adapt the model through embedding calibration followed by full supervised fine-tuning.
  On a fixed 500-example subset of the OpenSubtitles2024 test set, the LocalSubs achieves a 59.2% tie-excluded win rate against Google Translate under GPT-4o pairwise judging. Performance is strongest on short cues and declines as cue length increases. Preliminary Apple M2 Metal measurements on a 64k-vocabulary model show a 1.63$\times$ speedup over a 151k-vocabulary profiling baseline. The raw benchmark configuration is incomplete, so the latency result is treated as preliminary.

</details>


### [196] [LightMem-Ego: Your AI Memory for Everyday Life](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11487)
*Yijun Chen,Boyi Xiao,Yixian Zhao,Haoting Xia,Buqiang Xu,Jizhan Fang,Yanya Li,Yaqi Zheng,Xuehai Wang,Zirui Xue,Liuxin Zhang,Hui Li,Ningyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LightMem-Ego 是一个轻量级流式多模态记忆系统，可在移动和可穿戴设备上持续捕获第一人称视觉和音频流，组织为层级记忆结构（当前/短期/长期），并基于用户查询动态检索和生成答案，支持物体查找、对话回忆等日常辅助功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有个人AI助手在面对关于过往经历的查询时，缺乏能够持续积累、组织和检索长期经验的轻量级多模态记忆系统，传统记忆方案在移动/可穿戴设备上计算负担过重，难以实现流式处理。

Method: 系统持续捕获第一人称视觉和音频流，在共享时间线上对齐，组织为层级记忆（当前、短期、长期记忆）。根据用户查询动态路由到合适的记忆层级，并基于多模态证据生成答案。

Result: 系统可部署在智能手机和AI眼镜上，支持物体查找、对话回忆、生活总结、例行发现和个性化辅助等多种日常任务。

Conclusion: LightMem-Ego 为移动/可穿戴设备上的全天候生活辅助提供了一种轻量级流式多模态记忆方案，能有效组织长期经验并回答用户关于过去经历的问题。

Abstract: Personal AI assistants on mobile and wearable devices continuously perceive users' daily lives through visual and audio streams. However, answering queries about past experiences requires lightweight multimodal memory that can continuously accumulate, organize, and retrieve long-term experiences, which remains challenging. To address this challenge, we present LightMem-Ego, a lightweight streaming multimodal memory system for everyday-life assistance. The system continuously captures egocentric visual and audio streams, aligns them on a shared timeline, and organizes them into a hierarchical memory consisting of current, short-term, and long-term memory. Given a user query, LightMem-Ego dynamically routes retrieval to the appropriate memory level and generates answers grounded in multimodal evidence. The demonstration can be deployed on smartphones and AI glasses, supporting object finding, conversation recall, life summarization, routine discovery, and personalized assistance. Code is available at https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem-Ego.

</details>


### [197] [Silent Failures in Quantized LLM Reasoning: A Taxonomy-Based Analysis of Hollow Convergence and Failure Mode Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09999)
*Renuka Oladri,Mohan Vamsi Varadaraju Priya,Jerry Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现，后训练量化（Post-training Quantization）即便在保持任务准确率的情况下，也会悄然改变大语言模型的推理方式。通过六类失败分类法分析30,000条思维链输出，揭示了量化对模型推理过程（如空洞收敛、捷径坍塌、信心雪崩等）产生显著影响，且这种影响无法通过表面文本特征可靠检测，对模型部署构成隐藏风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注量化对模型准确率的影响，但对量化如何改变模型内部推理过程（尤其是思维链推理的质量和结构）缺乏深入理解。作者希望揭示准确率之外、量化带来的"隐性"推理退化。

Method: 构建六类别失败分类法（经两位独立标注者验证，Cohen's κ=0.906），对五种指令微调LLM（3B-14B参数）在四种推理基准上的30,000条思维链输出进行分类，对比FP32、FP16、NF4三种量化精度下的推理失败模式变化。

Result: (1) 准确率在量化下最多下降3.1个百分点，表面上看很稳健；(2) "空洞收敛"（Hollow Convergence）在NF4下对最小两个模型显著下降，12B以上模型不受影响；(3) 该效应具有基准特异性，GSM8K免疫，LogiQA和ARC-Challenge受影响最大；(4) NF4下，"捷径坍塌"从44%升至78%，"信心雪崩"从15.8%降至接近零；(5) 空洞收敛无法通过表面文本特征可靠检测（最佳F1=0.53）。

Conclusion: 后训练量化会引入标准评估管线无法捕获的、与部署相关的推理失败模式，准确率稳健性不能保证推理过程的质量。空洞收敛作为一种隐性失效模式，对模型安全部署构成真实威胁。

Abstract: We show that post-training quantization can silently alter how large language models reason even when task accuracy is preserved. Using a six-category failure taxonomy validated by two independent human annotators (Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906), we classify 30,000 chain-of-thought outputs from five instruction-tuned LLMs (3B--14B parameters) across three quantization precisions (FP32, FP16, NF4) and four reasoning benchmarks. We find that while accuracy is robust across precisions (maximum 3.1 pp drop), Hollow Convergence (correct answers reached through incomplete or unverifiable reasoning) shows a significant size-dependent shift under NF4, dropping sharply for the two smallest models tested but remaining invariant for models at 12B parameters and above. This effect is also benchmark-specific: GSM8K is categorically immune while LogiQA and ARC-Challenge show the largest shifts. Furthermore, under NF4, Shortcut Collapse rises from 44% to 78% of wrong-answer failures in LLaMA 3.2-3B while Confidence Snowballing collapses from 15.8% to near zero, a qualitative shift invisible to accuracy metrics. Finally, we show Hollow Convergence cannot be reliably detected from surface-level text features (best F1 = 0.53), establishing it as a deployment-relevant failure mode that standard evaluation pipelines cannot catch.

</details>


### [198] [Robust, Scalable Detection of Text Containment in Large Web-Crawled Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10020)
*Lars Henry Berge Olsen,Pierre Lison,Martin Jullum,Mark Anderson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: FindMyText是一个开源Python工具，通过文档指纹匹配链检测文本是否部分或完整出现在语料库中，特别适用于验证版权内容，并在三个数据集上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本匹配方法难以可靠区分"近似逐字复制"与"一般文本相似性"，且缺乏专门针对版权内容验证的轻量级工具。

Method: 基于文档指纹技术，但创新性地引入"匹配指纹链"机制来捕获连续匹配的指纹序列，并采用分布式磁盘索引框架支持大规模网络爬取数据集。

Result: 在ArXiv论文、维基百科和通用网页内容三个数据集上，FindMyText优于其他替代方法。

Conclusion: 该工具能高效检测文本包含关系，特别适用于验证语料库中是否存在受版权保护的材料。

Abstract: We present FindMyText, an open-source Python package designed to efficiently assess whether a given text appears, in part or in full, within a text corpus. The tool builds on prior techniques for document fingerprinting, but extends them with a novel mechanism to explicitly capture sequences of matching fingerprints. By identifying such chains, the tool can more reliably detect near-verbatim copies of a given text rather than mere textual similarities. This makes FindMyText particularly suited for verifying the presence of copyrighted material in a corpus. Leveraging a distributed, disk-based indexing framework, the system scales to large web-crawled datasets. Using a new benchmark for evaluating text containment methods, we show that FindMyText outperforms alternative approaches across three datasets (ArXiv papers, Wikipedia, and generic web content).

</details>


### [199] [Efficiently Adapting Spoken Language Models for the Singaporean Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10092)
*Ng Jia Sheng Jason*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对口语语言模型（SLM）在敏感领域（如新加坡内政团队）的适配问题，提出通过LoRA微调、替代文本QA数据集防遗忘、多任务CoBa重加权等方法，在五种语音任务上构建了HT-Moonstone (5B)模型，效果超越数倍规模模型，且仅损失不到2%的原始口语QA能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SLM在敏感领域的适配研究不足，尤其在训练数据不可访问、需要多语言口语交互的场景下缺乏有效方法。

Method: 结合LoRA微调、替代文本QA数据集（防止灾难性遗忘）、以及将CoBa重加权方案适配到语音领域的多任务目标。同时构建了HTD-multilingual-QA多语言问答数据集。

Result: HT-Moonstone (5B)在多数任务上匹配或超越7倍规模SLM，口音和性别识别达到最佳，口语QA能力损失低于2%。

Conclusion: 所提方法能有效将SLM适配到敏感领域，在保持原有能力的同时在多语言多任务上表现优异，验证了轻量级微调+数据增强+多任务学习的有效性。

Abstract: Spoken language models (SLMs) unify speech perception and reasoning, but adapting them to sensitive domains is underexplored, especially when the original training data is inaccessible and the use case demands multilingual, spoken-query interaction. We adapt an open-source SLM to the Singaporean Home Team context across five speech tasks in Singapore's four official languages, combining LoRA fine-tuning, a surrogate text-QA dataset that guards against catastrophic forgetting, and a multi-task objective that adapts the CoBa reweighting scheme to speech. We also build HTD-multilingual-QA, a 504,853 sample multilingual QA dataset in text and spoken form. The resulting HT-Moonstone (5B) matches or outperforms SLMs up to 7x its size on most tasks, attains the best accent and gender recognition among all models evaluated, and loses under 2\% of its original speech QA ability.

</details>


### [200] [Cost of Reasoning in non-English Languages: A Case Study on Japanese](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10114)
*Yuu Jinnai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究尝试训练一个用日语进行推理的模型（基于Qwen-3-Swallow-8B，使用GRPO训练），发现用用户选择的语言进行推理是可行的，但性能最多与英语推理基线持平，且在日语文化基准上表现更差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理轨迹对模型可解释性、安全性和实际应用很重要，但目前最强推理模型（RLMs）主要用英语推理，因为英语的训练数据最丰富。理想情况下，用户应能选择自己偏好的语言进行推理，同时保持强推理性能。

Method: 基于Qwen-3-8B持续预训练的日语LLM（Qwen-3-Swallow-8B），使用GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）进行日语推理训练，并在编码、数学、科学基准以及日本文化基准上进行评估。

Result: 1）日语推理训练是可行的；2）性能最多与强英语推理基线持平；3）在日本文化基准上，日语推理模型的表现反而比基线模型更差。

Conclusion: 虽然可以通过GRPO训练实现推理语言控制，但仅将推理语言切换为日语并不能自动提升模型在文化相关任务上的表现，日语推理仍有很大的改进空间。

Abstract: Reasoning Language Models (RLMs) achieve their strongest performance when they reason in English, the language for which reasoning-oriented training data is most abundant. However, reasoning trace is a clue for model interpretability and safety, and useful in practice for both the model users and for model developers. Thus, it is desirable to be able to develop a model that reasons in a language of the user's choice, while still maintaining strong reasoning performance. To this end, we study the feasibility of training a model that reasons in Japanese. We develop a Japanese-reasoning variant of Qwen-3-Swallow-8B, which is a Japanese LLM continually pretrained from Qwen-3-8B, with GRPO and evaluate it across coding, math, and science benchmarks. The study shows that reasoning-language control is feasible by training a Japanese continually pretrained model with GRPO. However, its performance is at best on par with strong English-reasoning baselines on several benchmarks. We also evaluate the trained model on Japanese cultural benchmarks and observe that the model's performance is worse than the baseline models, suggesting that the reasoning in Japanese does not immediately improve performance on culturally relevant tasks for free.

</details>


### [201] [Instruction Set and Language for Hypergraphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10194)
*Mario Pascual-Gonzalez,Ezequiel Lopez-Rubio*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了IsalHG方法，用紧凑指令字母表将连通超图编码为字符串，并基于规范字符串判定超图同构。实验验证了往返性质，但规范算法比基于Levi图的基线方法慢3-5个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超图同构问题通常需归约为Levi二分图再调用图同构引擎，缺乏原生判定方法。本文旨在提出一种直接基于超图结构编码的同构判定框架。

Method: 设计一个虚拟机器，包含稀疏超图、循环双链表(CDLL)和k个遍历指针。指令可移动指针或插入超边。提出贪心编码算法h2s，以及基于字典序最大结构元组的回溯变体以生成规范字符串w*，猜想其完整性可作为同构不变量。

Result: 在150个随机超图和组合设计上验证了往返性质。在600个同构判定上与nauty/Traces/bliss完全一致，支持完备性猜想。但Levi基线方法在所有测试单元上快311倍至117,672倍。

Conclusion: 贡献了原生超图表示框架、规范完备性猜想以及首个原生vs Levi超图同构基准测试。规范字符串方法理论上可原生判定同构，但当前实现效率远低于传统归约方法。

Abstract: We present IsalHG, a method for representing the structure of any finite, connected hypergraph of bounded hyperedge arity as a string over a compact instruction alphabet $Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$. The encoding is executed by a small virtual machine comprising a sparse hypergraph, a circular doubly-linked list (CDLL) of node references, and $k$ traversal pointers, where $k$ bounds the hyperedge arity. Instructions either move a pointer through the CDLL or insert a hyperedge, optionally together with new nodes, into the hypergraph. Every string over $Σ_{\mathrm{HG}}$ decodes to a valid hypergraph; the alphabet is closed. A greedy \emph{HypergraphToString} (h2s) algorithm encodes any connected hypergraph into a string; a backtracking variant seeded at nodes of lexicographically maximal structural tuple produces a \emph{canonical string} $w^{*}$, which we conjecture to be a complete isomorphism invariant. Canonical-string equality then decides hypergraph isomorphism natively, without the standard reduction to the Levi incidence graph followed by a graph-isomorphism engine. We verify the round-trip property $s2h(h2s(H)) \cong H$ on 150 connected random uniform hypergraphs and on named combinatorial designs, and we benchmark the canonical algorithm against the three practically available exact baselines -- nauty, Traces, and bliss operating on the 2-coloured Levi graph -- across a $(n, c)$ grid with ten seeds per cell. All four methods agree on every one of 600 isomorphism verdicts, consistent with the completeness conjecture. On wall-clock time the Levi baselines dominate every tested cell by three to five orders of magnitude (geometric-mean ratio $311\times$ to $117{,}672\times$), which we report as measured. We contribute the representation framework, a conjecture of canonical completeness, and the first native-versus-Levi benchmark for hypergraph isomorphism.

</details>


### [202] [Equal Accuracy, Unequal Evidence: Search APIs as Decision Surfaces for Tool-Using Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10198)
*Sriram Selvam,Anneswa Ghosh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究搜索API作为智能体决策表面的作用，而非仅评估答案准确率。通过固定GPT-5.4智能体，对比三个搜索提供商（Brave、Tavily、Firecrawl）在100个SEALQA-HARD问题上的表现，发现各提供商答案准确率相近（25-26/100），但证据经济性差异显著：Brave的摘要富含黄金答案，Tavily的黄金支持URL集中在排名1，Firecrawl促进更广泛的探索。同时引入表面矛盾与黄金URL比率（0.92-2.59），表明搜索提供商的选择本质上是检索预算和策略决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统评估搜索API仅关注答案准确率，忽略了搜索API在智能体渐进式信息获取架构中作为决策表面的关键作用——即排序摘要、URL和元数据决定了智能体是立即回答、重新搜索还是消耗令牌打开页面。作者旨在揭示不同搜索提供商在证据经济性上的差异，并引入新的评估指标。

Method: 使用固定的GPT-5.4智能体、两个工具（search_web和fetch_page）和100个SEALQA-HARD问题，仅变化搜索提供商（Brave、Tavily、Firecrawl）。Kimi-K2.6 oracle对智能体可见的每个内容元素（URL、标题、摘要、获取的页面）进行标注，产生6,869个逐URL判断。使用语义匹配（semantic match）作为经过审计的正确答案标签。

Result: 三个搜索提供商在答案准确率上接近（25、25、26/100），但证据经济性差异显著：Brave提供富含黄金答案的摘要，Tavily的黄金支持URL集中在排名1，Firecrawl与更广泛的探索相关。表面矛盾与黄金URL比率在0.92到2.59之间变化。

Conclusion: 搜索提供商的选择不仅是召回决策，更是检索预算和策略决策。不同的提供商在证据的经济性、分布和矛盾性上表现出显著差异，这直接影响智能体的令牌消耗和决策路径。

Abstract: Search APIs are the fundamental retrieval layer for many agents and are often their most frequently used tool. Traditional search APIs provide URLs, titles, and snippets that preview website contents. Because full-page retrieval is token-intensive, agent retrieval architectures increasingly use progressive disclosure: the agent first sees snippets and then chooses whether to fetch full pages. In such systems, search API performance is often evaluated primarily by answer accuracy. We argue that a commercial search API is better understood as a decision surface: the ranked snippets, URLs, and metadata that determine whether an agent answers immediately, searches again, or spends tokens opening pages. We test this claim with one frozen GPT-5.4 agent, two tools (search_web and fetch_page), and 100 questions from SEALQA-HARD, varying only the search provider (Brave, Tavily, Firecrawl). A Kimi-K2.6 oracle labels every content element visible to the agent (URL, title, snippet, and fetched page, when fetched), producing 6,869 valid per-URL judgments. We use an audited correct-answer label, semantic match, which preserves exact matches while accepting harmless formatting and naming variants. Under this measure, the providers remain close (25, 25, 26 / 100), but their evidence economies differ sharply: Brave offers gold-answer-rich snippets, Tavily concentrates gold-supporting URLs at rank 1, and Firecrawl is associated with broader exploration under this fixed agent policy. We also introduce a surface contradiction-to-gold URL ratio, which varies from 0.92 to 2.59. Provider choice is therefore a retrieval-budget and policy decision, not merely a recall decision.

</details>


### [203] [Consensus vs. Dissent: Dynamic LLM Modeling of Subjective Preferences in Group Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10235)
*Cedric Waterschoot,Nava Tintarev,Francesco Barile*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过微调LLM，使其能够根据群体偏好分布动态选择最优的推荐聚合策略，以实现与人类感知一致的公平性、满意度和共识度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究表明群体推荐系统对偏好分布敏感，因此需要根据不同群体配置选择聚合策略。本文探究LLM能否模仿这种敏感性，选择符合人类对公平、满意和共识感知的理想聚合策略。

Method: 微调LLM（基于DeepSeek-V3.1推理数据与人类真实评估），开发Judgmental Llama和Judgmental OLMo作为实时判断模型；生成多个基于社会选择的推荐候选，动态选择最大化人类评价的策略；进行用户研究（n=284）验证。

Result: 所提方法在满意度和群体共识上获得最高评分；LLM判断与人类感知最对齐时需考虑LLM方法与群体配置（如少数派、联盟）的交互效应。

Conclusion: 研究支持动态适配聚合策略以适应群体内偏好分布，并突显了LLM在实现与主观人类判断对齐的适应性方面的优势。

Abstract: Previous work in group recommender systems has demonstrated a sensitivity to the distribution of preferences within a group. Specifically, the selection of the preference aggregation strategy benefits from considering such group configurations. In this paper, we study whether LLMs are able to mimic this sensitivity and to select the ideal aggregation strategy (and corresponding recommendation) according to nuanced human perceptions of fairness, satisfaction, and consensus.
  We do this by fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on human survey data to serve as real-time judgmental models within the recommendation pipeline. Using a reasoning dataset distilled from DeepSeek-V3.1 and human ground truth assessments, we develop Judgmental Llama and Judgmental OLMo to simulate group assessments. Our pipeline successfully generates multiple recommendation candidates based on social choice-based aggregation strategies and dynamically selects the one that maximizes these predicted human-like evaluations. We further validate these suggestions in a user study (n=284) and find that our methodology achieved the highest scores for satisfaction and group consensus. Furthermore, we find that LLM judgments are most aligned with human perceptions of fairness, satisfaction and consensus when we also consider interaction effects between our LLM-based method and group configuration (e.g., minority or coalition). These findings give further support for dynamically adapting aggregation strategies to specific within-group preference distributions, and highlight the advantage of using LLMs for an adaptation that is aligned with subjective human judgments.

</details>


### [204] [PTEI: Integrating Personality Traits to Enhance Emotional Intelligence in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10245)
*Amir Reza Jafari,Praboda Rajapaksha,Reza Farahbakhsh,Noel Crespi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PTEI框架，通过将人格特质（MBTI/OCEAN）融入大语言模型的情绪理解任务，并利用对比学习构建检索系统，显著提升了模型在情绪推理上的表现，最高在GPT模型中取得提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型在复杂情绪推理上远逊于人类，主要原因是缺乏对个体差异（尤其是人格特质）的建模，而这些特质是人类进行情绪推断的基础。

Method: PTEI框架：1) 从情绪场景中提取MBTI和OCEAN人格特质；2) 将人格特质作为上下文知识构建人格感知提示；3) 使用对比学习构建优化检索系统，匹配情绪和人格对齐的场景，提升推理质量。

Result: 在多个情绪理解基准上，PTEI显著提升了多种LLM的情绪理解能力，GPT模型提升最为明显；结合CoT推理进一步提高了4%的准确率。

Conclusion: PTEI通过纳入人格特质有效推进了AI系统的社会与心理基础，为更智能的情绪理解提供了新方向。

Abstract: Despite advances in Emotional Intelligence (EI), Large Language Models (LLMs) still significantly underperform humans in complex emotional reasoning. This gap originates partly from the limited incorporation of individual differences, particularly personality traits, which are fundamental to human emotional inference. To address this, we propose PTEI, a novel framework for integrating Personality Traits into Emotional Intelligence tasks using LLMs. In PTEI, MBTI and OCEAN personality traits are first extracted directly from the given emotional scenarios and then utilized as contextual knowledge within personality-aware prompts, guiding LLMs to accurately infer emotions and their underlying causes. To ensure optimal contextual grounding, we employ Contrastive Learning to construct an optimized retrieval system that surfaces emotionally and personally aligned scenarios, enhancing reasoning quality. Extensive experiments on established EI benchmarks show that PTEI enhances the Emotional Understanding (EU) capabilities of various LLMs, with the strongest improvement observed in GPT models. Combining PTEI with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning yields an additional 4 percent increase in accuracy. These findings underscore PTEI's contribution toward advancing AI systems with more sophisticated social and psychological grounding.

</details>


### [205] [One mechanism for many mental spaces: a shared router over a value slot in language models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10248)
*Oliver Steele,Jiangtao Wen,Yuxing Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文发现Transformer语言模型实现了Fauconnier的跨类型统一空间构建机制：一个可复用的值槽存储内容，一个低秩路由（空间索引）选择读取哪个心理空间（反事实、信念、虚构、时间等），且控制一种空间的子空间也能控制其他空间，表明模型并未像形式语义学那样将信念单独区分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 形式语义学对不同类型的语境（模态、时间、信念、描绘）使用不同的逻辑，而Fauconnier的心理空间理论将它们统一为同一种空间构建操作。作者想知道Transformer语言模型实现了哪种方案。

Method: 使用分布式对齐搜索（Distributed Alignment Search）训练控制一种空间类型的子空间，测试其对其他空间类型的控制能力；分析路由的低秩性、与实体身份的加性组合方式以及在后续层注意力头中的作用位置。

Result: 控制一种空间的子空间也能控制其他空间类型（远高于随机水平）；信念在机制上并未被特殊分离；路由器是低秩的，与实体身份加性组合，通过少数后期层注意力头发挥作用；该机制驱动推理且支持组合性。

Conclusion: Transformer语言模型实现了Fauconnier式的统一空间构建机制，而非形式语义学的分类型处理。信念虽在哲学/心理学/语言学中有特殊地位，但在模型机制中并未被单独区分。

Abstract: Language builds discourse contexts other than the actual: a painting, a belief, a memory, a hypothetical. Each is a mental space in which the same entity can take a different value, as when a flower is red in reality but purple in a portrait. Formal semantics keeps these contexts apart because their logics differ (modal, temporal, doxastic, depictive); Fauconnier's mental-space theory treats them as one space-building operation. We ask which of these a transformer language model implements, and find a mechanistic version of Fauconnier's unification. The model uses one router/slot format across the inventory: a reusable value slot stores attributed content, and a causally manipulable router (the space index) selects which space is read. A subspace trained with Distributed Alignment Search to control one space type, counterfactual, belief, fictional, or temporal, also controls the others, well above a random floor, on three model families; belief, which formal semantics marks as a distinct case, is not specially separated. The router is low-rank, composes additively with entity identity, and acts through a few late-layer heads. Two further results show the mechanism drives inference and composes: a subspace trained on a rule-derived conclusion flips what the model infers while dissociating from what it reports, and composing space-builders mints a fresh router over the shared slot. This paper establishes the cross-type generality. A companion paper develops belief in depth, because of its special status in philosophy, psychology, and linguistics (epistemology, theory of mind, and propositional attitude reports).

</details>


### [206] [Which Languages Transfer Best to Warlpiri? A Similarity-Based Study for Low-Resource ASR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10256)
*Pravina Mylvaganam,Eliathamby Ambikairajah,Ting Dang,Vidhyasaharan Sethu,Tuende Szalay*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究如何利用语言相似性改进低资源语言（Warlpiri）的跨语言迁移ASR，提出结合声学相似性和语言特征相似性的源语言排序框架，实验表明声学和类型学相似的语言优于基线，声学相似性是微调性能的最佳预测因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Warlpiri（澳大利亚原住民语言）的标注语音数据极其有限，跨语言迁移学习对其ASR至关重要，但如何选择最佳的源语言进行迁移是一个关键问题。

Method: 提出一个框架，结合预训练语音模型的声学相似性以及基于类型学、音素库、语法和句法特征的语言学相似性，对高资源源语言进行排序，并评估其向Warlpiri迁移ASR的有效性。

Result: 使用Whisper的实验表明，声学和类型学相似的源语言（如Assamese和Hindi）优于单语和多语基线，显著降低了词错误率和字符错误率。相关性分析显示声学相似性是微调性能的最强预测因子，而音素库和类型学相似性更能解释零样本迁移的性能。

Conclusion: 语言相似性（尤其是声学相似性）对低资源语言的ASR跨语言迁移至关重要，结合声学和语言学特征选择源语言可以显著提升迁移效果。

Abstract: This paper investigates how language similarity can improve cross-lingual transfer for automatic speech recognition (ASR) in extremely low-resource settings. Warlpiri, an Australian Aboriginal language, has very limited transcribed speech data, making transfer learning essential. We propose a framework combining acoustic similarity from pre-trained speech models with linguistic similarity based on typology, phoneme inventories, grammatical, and syntactic features to rank high-resource source languages and evaluate their effectiveness for ASR transfer to Warlpiri. Experiments with Whisper show that acoustically and typologically similar languages outperform monolingual and multilingual baselines. Assamese and Hindi achieve substantial reductions in word and character error rates. Correlation analysis further indicates that acoustic similarity is the strongest predictor of fine-tuning performance, while phoneme inventory and typological similarity better explain zero-shot transfer.

</details>


### [207] [Language Re-generation: An investigation into information locality effects on reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10268)
*Amirhossein Mohammadi,Laurence E. Frank,Albert Gatt,Robert A. Bagheri*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过让预训练于"不可能语言"的GPT-2模型重建自然英语，发现重建结构倾向于更短的依存距离，揭示了模型对信息局部性的归纳偏差。重建难度随局部性破坏程度增加，且结构恢复与表面恢复、流畅性与忠实重建之间存在分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究探讨了语言模型能否习得"不可能语言"，但尚不清楚模型能否从这种输入中恢复自然语言，以及这能揭示模型的何种归纳偏差。

Method: 采用重建框架：在三种扰动类型（破坏信息局部性）的"不可能语言"上预训练GPT-2，然后微调使其重建自然英语，并分析重建质量。

Result: 1) 重建结构表现出更短的依存距离，即局部性偏好；2) 恢复难度随局部性破坏程度增加；3) 结构恢复（依存三元组F1）与表面恢复（精确匹配）分离，流畅性与忠实重建在全局打乱下分离；4) 句子长度调节恢复效果；5) 重建难度与可学习性难度相关。

Conclusion: 信息局部性是同时约束语言处理与模型学习的共享机制，重建框架能揭示可学习性实验无法单独量化的架构偏差信号。

Abstract: Information locality, the tendency for syntactically related words to appear close together, shapes both human language processing and language model learning. While prior work has examined whether language models can acquire impossible languages, it remains unclear whether they can recover natural language from such input and what this reveals about their inductive biases. We address this by complementing learnability-based approaches with a reconstruction framework: fine-tuning GPT-2 models pre-trained on impossible languages to reconstruct natural English from three perturbation types. Our findings show that the recovered structures exhibit shorter dependency lengths than the original text, mirroring the locality preference observed in unconstrained language model generation and providing a quantitative signature of an architectural bias that learnability experiments alone do not reveal. Recovery difficulty increases with the degree of locality disruption. Structural recovery (dependency Triple F1) dissociates from surface recovery (Exact Match), while fluency dissociates from faithful reconstruction under global shuffling. Sentence length further modulates performance: longer sentences facilitate recovery when local structure is preserved but lead to complete collapse under global shuffling. Finally, recovery difficulty tracks learnability difficulty across perturbation types, suggesting that information locality is the shared constraint governing both.

</details>


### [208] [PolyInterview: An LLM-based Platform for Immersive Mock Interview Practice with Comprehensive Multimodal Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10310)
*Zhiyuan Wen,Jiannong Cao,Zijian Wang,Chen Chen,Xiaoyun Liu,Jianing Yin,Zhuo Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PolyInterview是一个基于LLM的沉浸式模拟面试平台，支持多轮语音对话、数字人面试官、以及内容/语音/非语言行为的多模态评估，已收集1564次面试会话数据，专家评估显示问题设计和反馈质量良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实面试机会少、专家模拟面试成本高、自我练习缺乏自适应对话和结构化评估，现有系统仅部分解决了这些需求，存在固定问题序列、沟通渠道有限、反馈缺乏证据支撑等问题。

Method: 利用LLM根据职位描述和简历生成个性化问题，进行多轮语音面试（带唇同步数字人），实现答案感知的追问；四个并行评估器产生13个行为级特征，聚合为10个评估维度和2个能力轨道，基于KSA和STAR框架输出带行为证据和可操作建议的报告。

Result: 平台已有101个账户、1564次面试会话、7665个生成问题、1422个五阶段问题集。生成问题与匹配职位描述的吻合度在93.7%的会话中优于跨角色描述。10位专家评估认为问题计划和反馈具有可操作性。

Conclusion: PolyInterview有效解决了模拟面试中个性化、多模态评估和证据支撑反馈的不足，是一个公开可用的、数据驱动的面试练习平台。

Abstract: Preparing for job interviews is important for securing desired positions, yet realistic practice remains difficult to access: real interviews are infrequent, expert mock coaching is costly, and self-practice offers neither adaptive dialogue nor structured assessment. Existing systems typically address only parts of this need through fixed question sequences, limited communication channels, or feedback with little supporting evidence. We present PolyInterview, an LLM-based platform for immersive mock interview practice with comprehensive multimodal assessment. PolyInterview uses the target job description and CV to generate questions tailored to the role and candidate, conducts multi-turn spoken interviews with a lip-synced digital human interviewer that asks answer-aware follow-up questions, and evaluates response content, vocal delivery, and non-verbal behavior. Four parallel evaluators produce 13 behavior-level features that are aggregated into 10 assessment aspects and two competency tracks. Guided by the KSA and STAR frameworks, the report links each score to behavioral evidence and actionable recommendations. PolyInterview is publicly accessible. Its current all-account snapshot contains 101 accounts, 1,564 interview sessions, 7,665 generated questions, and 1,422 five-stage question sets. Generated questions are more closely aligned with their matched job description than with cross-role job descriptions in 93.7% of sessions. An evaluation by ten experts found strong question plans and actionable feedback.

</details>


### [209] [Polarization Detection: A Hybrid Approach with AfroXLMR-Social and DeBERTa for Low- and High-Resource Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10312)
*Muhammad Abdullahi Said*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种混合建模策略，针对英语使用DeBERTa，针对豪萨语及所有细粒度子任务使用AfroXLMR-Social，结合LoRA微调和数据增强，在POLAR 2026共享任务中实现了竞争性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线极化现象快速蔓延威胁社会凝聚力，需要开发能在多语言语境下有效运作的自动化检测系统。

Method: 混合建模策略：英语二分类使用DeBERTa，豪萨语及所有细粒度子任务（类型和表现）使用AfroXLMR-Social；采用Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)降低计算成本，使用nlpaug进行文本数据增强。

Result: 在所有三个子任务上均取得了有竞争力的结果，表明针对特定子任务需求定制模型选择能够实现性能与效率的最佳平衡。

Conclusion: 领域自适应多语言模型（AfroXLMR-Social）对捕捉社交媒体文本中极化的细微差别至关重要；针对不同子任务特点选择不同单语/多语言模型是更优策略。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of online polarization threatens social cohesion, necessitating robust automated detection systems that operate effectively across diverse linguistic contexts. This paper presents our system description for the POLAR Shared Task 2026, focusing on the detection and characterization of polarized discourse in English and Hausa. We propose a hybrid modeling strategy: for English binary detection, we leverage the monolingual strength of \textbf{DeBERTa}, while for Hausa and all fine-grained subtasks (Types and Manifestations), we utilize \textbf{AfroXLMR-Social}. This domain-adapted multilingual model proved critical for capturing the nuances of polarization in social media text. To further address computational constraints and data scarcity, we implement Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and textual data augmentation via \texttt{nlpaug}. We report competitive results across all three subtasks, demonstrating that model selection tailored to specific subtask requirements yields the best balance of performance.

</details>


### [210] [Neutralizing Structural Inequality in the Nigerian FinTech Sector](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10317)
*Muhammad Abdullahi Said*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对尼日利亚金融科技领域交易欺诈检测中的歧视性洗白问题，提出了一种分层人机分流模型，通过校准集成模型作为主过滤器、将不确定性案例路由给分析师、对高风险案例由高级主管处理，并利用动态影子价格和随机审计机制管理有限人力，实验表明该系统将区域性能差距从19.43%降至2.88%，有效中和了结构性偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 算法决策系统在金融服务中常因数据代理无意中编码结构性不平等，导致"歧视洗白"问题——系统将基础设施相关的偶发噪声（如农村网络超时）错误解读为欺诈意图，从而将结构性劣势转化为信用污点。

Method: 提出三层次路由策略：第一层使用校准集成模型作为主过滤器；第二层将认知不确定性（如冷启动新账户）的交易路由给专业分析师；第三层将高风险案件保留给高级主管。采用动态影子价格配给人类注意力，并引入随机审计机制防止人类技能退化。

Result: 实现1.88%的互补性差距（统计显著），欺诈召回率较自主基线提升24.79个百分点，区域性能差距从19.43个百分降至2.88个百分点，有效中和结构性偏见。

Conclusion: 分层人机协作为实质性机会平等提供了稳健机制，确保农村账户不会因环境"原生运气"而被排除在数字经济之外。

Abstract: Algorithmic decision systems in financial services often rely on data proxies that inadvertently encode structural inequalities. This paper introduces a hierarchical human-AI triage model for Point of Sale fraud detection in the Nigerian FinTech sector. Adopting a We Are All Equal worldview, we address the challenge of discrimination laundering, wherein the system misinterprets infrastructure related aleatoric noise such as rural network timeouts as fraudulent intent. We implement a three-tier routing policy utilizing a calibrated ensemble model as a primary filter. The policy routes transactions characterized by epistemic uncertainty such as cold start new accounts to specialist analysts while reserving high stakes cases for a senior supervisor. To manage finite human capacity, we utilize a dynamic shadow price to ration human attention and implement a random audit mechanism to prevent human skill atrophy. Our experimental results demonstrate a statistically significant 1.88\% complementarity gap and a 24.79\% percentage point gain in fraud recall over an autonomous baseline. Crucially, the model reduces the regional performance gap from 19.43 to 2.88 percentage points, neutralizing structural bias. Hierarchical collaboration provides a robust mechanism for substantive equality of opportunity, ensuring that rural accounts are not excluded from the digital economy due to environmental brute luck.

</details>


### [211] [CAFE: A Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10380)
*Fabian Lukassen,Christoph Weisser,Thomas Kneib,Alexander Silbersdorff*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CAFE是一个开源平台，将实验设计方法引入复合AI系统评估，通过析因设计分析各组件对答案质量的影响，并利用混合效应模型归因方差、报告效应量、显著性、最佳配置、成本延迟权衡以及评估者可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复合AI系统中存在众多可替换组件（如检索器、模型、提示词等），实践者难以判断哪个组件对答案质量影响最大，现有工具要么搜索好配置要么孤立评分，缺乏解释性。

Method: 将每个可替换组件注册为因子，构建析因设计；运行所有配置组合，使用可配置LLM评判器+人类评分者对答案评分；通过混合效应模型将答案质量方差归因到组件及其交互作用，报告效应量、显著性、最佳配置、成本和延迟权衡。

Result: 在HotpotQA基准数据集上的检索增强问答流程中验证，CAFE能恢复植入的因子效应，且在置换零假设下保持校准。

Conclusion: CAFE不仅能评估配置好坏，还能解释哪个组件驱动质量、差异是否显著，填补了现有工具的空白。已作为Python包和Web应用发布。

Abstract: We introduce CAFE (Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation), an open-source platform that brings design of experiments to the evaluation of compound AI systems (CAIS). Such systems expose many interchangeable choices - e.g. which retriever, model, or prompt - and practitioners rarely know which of them most affects answer quality. With CAFE, a practitioner registers each swappable component of a pipeline as a factor to build a factorial design over the chosen factors, run the resulting configurations, and score the answers on a shared rubric using a configurable LLM judge together with human raters. From these ratings it attributes answer-quality variance to the components and their interactions with mixed-effects models and reports effect sizes, significance, the best configuration, cost and latency trade-offs, and judge-human reliability. Whereas existing tools mostly either search for a good configuration or score outputs in isolation, CAFE also explains which component drives quality and whether an observed difference is significant. We validate CAFE on a retrieval-augmented question-answering (QA) pipeline over the HotpotQA benchmark dataset, where it recovers planted factor effects and stays calibrated under a permutation null. CAFE is released as a Python package and as a Web application.

</details>


### [212] [Structured Thoughts For Improved Reasoning And Context Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10386)
*Zain Sarwar,Supriyo Chakraborty,Berkcan Kapusuzoglu,Chia-Hsuan Lee,Anirban Das,Stephen Rawls,Kartik Balasubramaniam,Sambit Sahu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Structured Thoughts框架，将推理过程组织为<try>（探索性草稿）和<outcome>（精炼结论）交替的块结构。通过微调预训练模型，在推理基准上提升最高8.08%，并通过裁剪<try>块实现平均85%的上下文节省，性能仅下降8.67%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型擅长生成长链推理，但长推理轨迹通常冗长且内存效率低下，因此需要一种更紧凑、可裁剪的推理结构来提升效率和性能。

Method: 将推理轨迹分割为<try>块，并用LLM将每个步骤总结为对应的<outcome>，微调预训练模型使其采用这种结构化推理风格；同时实现了上下文裁剪策略，在每对<try>/<outcome>后移除<try>块以节省内存。

Result: 在推理基准上相比标准SFT提升最高8.08%；裁剪实现平均85%的上下文节省，性能仅下降8.67%。

Conclusion: 结构化推理框架Structured Thoughts既能提升推理性能，又能通过裁剪机制大幅节省上下文内存，在效率和效果之间取得了良好平衡。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel at generating long chains of thought, but long reasoning traces are often verbose and memory-inefficient. In this work, we introduce Structured Thoughts, a framework that organizes reasoning into alternating <try> and <outcome> blocks: <try> captures exploratory scratch work, while <outcome> contains the distilled conclusion of that step. We construct a dataset of structured thoughts by segmenting reasoning traces into <try> blocks and prompting an LLM to summarize each step into its corresponding <outcome>. Fine-tuning pretrained foundation models on this reformatted data produces models that adopt the structured reasoning style, leading to performance gains of up to 8.08\% on reasoning benchmarks compared to standard SFT. The explicit structure also enables context pruning: after each <try>/<outcome> pair, the <try> can be pruned, allowing the model to retain conclusions without keeping the full scratch work in the context. A proof-of-concept pruning implementation achieves an average of 85\% memory / context savings with an 8.67\% performance drop across mathematical tasks.

</details>


### [213] [A Stepwise Questioning Expert-Editor Multi-Agent Framework for Long-Document Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10390)
*Lingyun Shen,Xuejia Guo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种专家-编辑器逐步提问的多智能体方法，通过让专家和编辑器引导另一个智能体针对不同内容方面提问并提供修改线索，以提升大语言模型在长文档摘要任务上的效果。实验在两个长文档科学数据集上验证了该方法有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在新闻摘要任务上表现良好，但长文档摘要因超出输入限制而面临挑战。为了提升LLM在长文档摘要上的能力，需要一种更有效的方法。

Method: 提出专家-编辑器逐步提问多智能体方法（expert-editor stepwise questioning multi-agent method），由专家和编辑器智能体指导另一个智能体通过针对不同内容方面提问来完善摘要，并提供针对性修改线索。

Result: 在两个代表性长文档科学数据集上进行了实验，采用广泛认可的自动评估指标，结果表明该方法有效。

Conclusion: 提出的多智能体方法能有效提升大语言模型在长文档摘要任务上的表现。

Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown promising potential in news summarization tasks, their performance on long-document summarization remains challenging as their length often exceeds the input limits. As the agent investment, which provide possibility to improve the inherent capabilities of LLMs. To enhance the effectiveness of long-document summarization based on LLMs, this paper proposes an expert-editor stepwise questioning multi-agent method, in which the expert and the editor guide another agent to refine the summary by posing questions on different aspects of the content and providing targeted clues for revision. We conducted experiments on two representative long-document scientific datasets and evaluated the results through widely recognized automatic metrics. The results demonstrated the effectiveness of our method.

</details>


### [214] [Enjoy Your Talk: A Human-Centered Benchmark for Multi-Turn Dialogue with Decoupled User Simulation, Target Modeling, and Judging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10428)
*Jinglan Gong,Jiefan Lu,Hewei Guo,Kehan Li,Zhiyuan Han,Jihang Jiang,Wenwen Tong,Lewei Lu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了EYT-Bench，一个用于评估LLM多轮对话能力的人本化基准，采用三方解耦设计（用户模拟器、目标模型、独立裁判），在17个目标模型×200轮对话的评估中发现了关于意图追踪、推理增强、人物格式影响等四个关键发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单轮基准无法评估LLM在多人对话中的人物一致性、意图追踪、情感动态和任务完成等关键能力，因此需要更全面的多轮对话评估框架。

Method: 采用三方解耦设计：基于人物属性的用户模拟器（使用Nemotron-Personas-USA和PersonaMem-v2真人数据集）、将意图感知与回复生成分离的目标模型、独立第三方LLM裁判（可选多裁判集成）。引入两种轨迹级指标：基于嵌入的意图漂移和最终意图完成率（FICR）。

Result: 闭源与开源模型在主观维度（共情/人物/拟人化）差异不超过0.3，但在客观意图追踪上差异可达9倍；推理（"thinking on"）显著提升长上下文人物的客观追踪（Gemma-4潜意图准确率+0.47-0.50）；人物格式主导轨迹分布，FICR在Nemotron-USA上饱和>0.95但在PersonaMem-v2上波动于0.53-0.88；预热效应在16/17个模型上稳健。

Conclusion: EYT-Bench为LLM多轮对话评估提供了更全面的框架，揭示了主观与客观维度之间的显著差异，以及推理增强、人物格式选择等关键因素对评估结果的重要影响。

Abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) as multi-turn conversational partners requires probing capabilities that single-turn benchmarks miss: persona consistency, evolving intent tracking, emotional dynamics, and goal completion. We introduce EYT-Bench, a human-centered benchmark built around a three-party decoupled design: a persona-grounded user simulator, a target model that separates intent perception from response generation, and an independent third-party LLM judge with optional multi-judge ensembling. Personas are sampled from public human-curated corpora, Nemotron-Personas-USA and PersonaMem-v2, rather than synthesized, reducing LLM-induced persona bias. EYT-Bench also introduces two trajectory-level metrics: embedding-based intent drift and final-intent completion rate (FICR), inspired by tau-bench. In a 17-target x 200-dialogue evaluation, EYT-Bench reveals four findings: (i) state-of-the-art closed- and open-source models are statistically close on subjective dimensions (empathy / persona / anthropomorphism vary within <= 0.3), but differ by up to 9x on objective intent tracking; (ii) reasoning ("thinking on") sharply improves objective tracking on long-context personas (+0.47-0.50 latent-intent accuracy on Gemma-4) while leaving subjective scores nearly unchanged; (iii) persona format dominates trajectory spread, with FICR saturating above 0.95 on Nemotron-USA but spreading from 0.53 to 0.88 on PersonaMem-v2; and (iv) the warm-up effect is robust on 16/17 models (one outlier, GPT-5.5, reverses the effect), with stable rankings across alpha in [0.05, 0.15]. A cross-judge ablation using deepseek-v4-pro confirms that target rankings and final-intent satisfaction are preserved across judges.

</details>


### [215] [Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models Using Diversion Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10476)
*Basel Abdeen,S M Tahmid Siddiqui,Meah Tahmeed Ahmed,Anoop Singhal,Latifur Khan,Punya Parag Modi,Ehab Al-Shaer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Diversion Decoding方法，通过在解码阶段主动挑战模型生成的答案，提取模型产生替代答案的阻力特征，训练机器学习模型评估LLM的不确定性，从而以更低计算成本高效检测幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在生成文本时存在幻觉问题（生成事实错误内容），现有不确定性评估和幻觉检测方法概率性强且计算成本高，限制了实际应用。

Method: 提出Diversion Decoding方法：在解码阶段主动挑战模型生成的回答，提取LLM抵抗产生替代答案的特征，利用这些特征训练机器学习模型，构建LLM不确定性的启发式度量。

Result: 实验表明Diversion Decoding在显著降低计算复杂度的前提下，优于现有幻觉检测方法，具有高效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: Diversion Decoding是一种高效、鲁棒的LLM不确定性评估方法，在计算效率和检测性能上均优于现有方法，为幻觉检测提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for retrieving knowledge through seamless, human-like interactions. Despite their advanced text generation capabilities, LLMs exhibit hallucination tendencies, where they generate factually incorrect statements and fabricate knowledge, undermining their reliability and trustworthiness. Multiple studies have explored methods to evaluate LLM uncertainty and detect hallucinations. However, existing approaches are often probabilistic and computationally expensive, limiting their practical applicability. In this paper, we introduce diversion decoding, a novel method for developing an LLM uncertainty heuristic by actively challenging model-generated responses during the decoding phase. Through diversion decoding, we extract features that capture the LLM's resistance to produce alternative answers and utilize these features to train a machine-learning model to develop a heuristic measure of the LLM's uncertainty. Our experimental results demonstrate that diversion decoding outperforms existing methods with significantly lower computational complexity, making it an efficient and robust solution for evaluating hallucination detection.

</details>


### [216] [When Reasoning Hurts Legal Drafting: The Verbalization Bottleneck in Patent Claim Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10480)
*Lekang Jiang,Wenjun Sun,Stephan Goetz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究Chain-of-Thought提示是否有助于专利权利要求生成，发现任务特定的CoT能提升质量，但更关键的是：隐式CoT（内部推理）始终优于显式CoT（口头化推理），因为显式推理会通过关键细节抽象化、干扰内部生成模式、级联错误传播三种机制损害输出质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管CoT提示在多数任务中有效，但在高度结构化、对模式敏感的任务（如专利权利要求撰写）中，其效果可能有限甚至为负。本文旨在系统探究CoT是否适用于专利权利要求生成这一法律起草任务。

Method: 提出一种任务特定的CoT方法用于专利权利要求生成，并通过自动评估指标和人类专家评估两种方式比较隐式CoT与显式CoT的效果。

Result: 推理增强型提示能够提升权利要求质量。更重要的是，隐式CoT始终优于显式CoT；显式CoT引入了不必要的信息瓶颈，通过三种机制（抽象化关键细节、破坏内部生成模式、级联错误传播）损害最终输出质量。

Conclusion: 对于专利权利要求这类高度结构化的法律起草任务，不应盲目使用显式CoT；隐式推理可能是更优策略。该发现为法律领域的LLM应用和CoT研究提供了新视角。

Abstract: Patent claim drafting is a challenging legal drafting task that requires technical expertise, precise linguistic control, strict adherence to formal conventions, and the preservation of complex logical relationships among claim elements. While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has been widely used to improve the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), recent evidence suggests that its benefits may be limited, or even negative, in highly structured or pattern-sensitive tasks. Therefore, this paper investigates whether CoT prompting benefits patent claim generation. We propose a task-specific CoT method for patent claim generation and evaluate its effectiveness through both automatic metrics and human expert assessment. Our results show that reasoning-enhanced prompting can improve claim quality. Moreover, we demonstrate a counter-intuitive but important empirical finding: implicit CoT, where reasoning is kept internal rather than explicitly verbalized, consistently outperforms explicit CoT. Through systematic analysis, we show that explicit CoT can introduce an unnecessary information bottleneck for claim generation. Verbalized reasoning may compromise the quality of final outputs through three specific mechanisms: abstraction of critical details, disruption of internalized generation patterns, and cascading error propagation. Our findings provide new insights into legal tasks and CoT applications.

</details>


### [217] [Articulate Intuition or Genuine Analysis? Benchmarking Epistemic Reliability in LLM-as-a-Judge Peer Reviews](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10511)
*Nuo Chen,Qian Wang,Qingyun Zou,Bingsheng He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Kahneman4Review基准，基于卡尼曼双系统理论构建结构化评审评估框架，发现LLM评判者与人类评审委员会在评审质量评估上存在根本性分歧，并通过实证分析揭示了LLM评判在可信度、分析形式与认知功能分离等方面的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM评判者与人类专家对论文评审质量的评估存在不一致，这种差异具有哲学意义。作者希望澄清"分析性"与"高质量"等评价术语在不同评判者之间的实际含义差异，并揭示LLM评判的可信度问题。

Method: 将卡尼曼双系统理论（系统1快速直觉 vs. 系统2慢速分析）操作化为结构化评审评估标准，构建包含3,563条评审记录的Kahneman4Review基准，每条评审从9个理论驱动的文本维度、8个偏差诊断指标和1个连续推理质量分数进行评估。同时进行了匹配功能探测器实验。

Result: 1) 决策层级与基于文本的认识论质量代理之间存在脱节；2) 公开展示的agentic评审原始分数高于合并的人类评审，但长度和会议能解释大部分差异；3) ICLR评审文本特征在2022-2023年过渡期间发生变化，与LLM广泛可用的时间点吻合。匹配功能探测器实验表明，该标准能够区分旨在对比真实缺陷发现与表面流畅性的文本探测器。

Conclusion: 可信赖的LLM评判可靠性基准必须将分析形式与认知功能分开，作者提出了实现这一目标的具体设计建议。

Abstract: When an LLM judge calls a peer review analytical and a human committee calls another review high quality, are they tracking the same thing? We argue they are not, and that the difference matters philosophically. We operationalise Kahneman's dual-process theory into a structured rubric for peer review and release Kahneman4Review, a benchmark of 3,563 rated reviews scored along nine theoretically motivated textual dimensions, eight bias diagnostics, and a continuous reasoning-quality score. Three findings bear on trustworthiness: decision tier is not detectably aligned with the rubric's text-grounded epistemic-quality proxy; public-showcase agentic reviews receive higher raw scores than pooled human reviews, but length and venue explain most of the gap and the samples are not paper-paired; and ICLR review-text diagnostics shift at the 2022--2023 transition, temporally coincident with widespread LLM availability but without identifying its cause. A matched function-probe pilot further shows that the rubric distinguishes textual probes designed to contrast genuine fault-finding with surface fluency. We argue that a trustworthy reliability benchmark for LLM judges must separate analytical form from epistemic function, and propose concrete design choices toward that goal. An interactive demo is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/nuojohnchen/Kahneman4Review.

</details>


### [218] [UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10557)
*Xiyu Wei,Qingwei Zong,Zhuocheng Yu,Sujian Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出UNIBROWSE，一个统一数据流水线，首次同时生成文本-only、图像到文本、文本到图像三种信息流模式的训练数据，结合知识图谱增强与探索度度量，训练出35B规模的代理模型，在多项多模态浏览理解基准上超越GPT-5等闭源系统，平均准确率达54.4。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅覆盖文本-only和图像到文本两种信息流模式，忽略了文本到图像模式，限制了代理的通用性和鲁棒性。

Method: 提出UNIBROWSE统一数据流水线：(1) 同时生成三种信息流模式的训练数据；(2) 用实时网页检索增强知识图谱；(3) 引入探索度(Exploration Degree)指标过滤低质量样本。结合监督微调与探索感知强化学习训练35B规模代理。
