Motivation: 现有路由方法主要优化单轮成本-质量权衡，忽略了智能体执行中的状态、中间失败和反馈循环，而前沿模型在代码编辑、长上下文恢复、工具使用等不同维度上各有所长，因此智能体内部的模型选择是一个核心系统问题。

Method: 提出Harness-Native agentic routing（步骤级路由范式），基于完整执行状态选择最佳单模型（低成本）或多个互补模型（集成提升准确率）。每次路由决策产生结构化数据记录（查询、状态、模型选择、执行轨迹、结果、成本），形成数据飞轮。实例化为OpenSquilla，包含四层路由栈、开源LightGBM冷启动排序器，以及分级路由-模型路径。

Result: 在DRACO和PinchBench等智能体基准上研究了单模型和多模型路由，验证了路由策略的有效性。

Conclusion: 智能体路由不仅是成本控制手段，更是智能体原生训练的数据引擎。

Abstract: Large language model agents are increasingly executed not by a single model call, but by an execution harness that manages observation, context, control, action, state, and verification. At the same time, frontier and open models are becoming structurally specialized: a model that is strong at code editing, long-context recovery, tool use, mathematical reasoning, or low-latency response may not dominate on the other axes. This makes model selection inside an agent a core systems problem rather than a per-query serving trick. Existing routing methods mostly optimize single-turn cost-quality trade-offs and therefore miss the execution state, intermediate failures, and feedback loops that make agents different from chat completion. We propose Harness-Native agentic routing, a step-level routing paradigm that selects either a single best-fit model for cost-effective execution or multiple complementary models for ensemble-style accuracy improvement, conditioned on the full harness state. The key insight is that every routing decision naturally produces a structured data record -- consisting of the query, harness state, model choice or model set, execution trace, outcome, and cost -- whose labels are supplied by the environment rather than by the router itself. These records form a harness-native data flywheel: execution traces train better routers and harness-native models, which improve cost-quality trade-offs and generate more traces under the same budget. We instantiate this idea in OpenSquilla with a four-layer routing stack, an open LightGBM cold-start ranker, and a staged router-model path that turns logged arena records into progressively stronger routing policies. The report studies singleton and multi-model routing on agentic benchmarks including DRACO and PinchBench, and argues that agentic routing is not merely cost control, but a data engine for agent-native training.

</details>


### [257] [Cross-Architecture LLM Ensembles, Feature-Based Reranking and Retrieval-Augmented Prompting for Legal Information Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11400)
*Amal Saad Alshehri,Nelly Bencomo,Amir Atapour-Abarghouei*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文报告了DU团队在COLIEE 2026五个任务中的参与情况，使用开源权重系统处理法律信息处理任务。通过跨架构集成、特征重排序和检索增强提示等方法，在多个任务上取得了领先成绩，包括法令蕴含任务96.3%准确率排名第一，侵权预测任务73.1%准确率超过所有官方提交。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律信息处理涉及检索、蕴含和判决预测等问题，需要文本匹配、推理和有限监督下的鲁棒泛化能力。不同任务需要不同的归纳偏置，该团队探索了多种方法以应对这些挑战。

Method: 针对不同任务采用不同方法：Task 4使用跨架构集成9个模型（来自3个系列）；Pilot Task采用多视角系统结合5个索赔级模型；Task 2通过将提示从单选改为多选提升性能；Task 3使用Qwen3-235B结合结构化法律推理提示；Task 1使用学习排序系统结合词汇、语义检索与34个结构特征。

Result: Task 4法令蕴含96.3%准确率（33个提交中第一）；Pilot Task侵权预测73.1%准确率、68.2% RE F1（超过所有官方提交）；Task 2多选提示后F1从0.343提升至0.555；Task 3替换模型后准确率从79.3%提升至91.5%；Task 1法律案例检索F1=0.314（54个提交中第11名）。

Conclusion: 法律信息处理受益于不同任务的归纳偏置差异，跨架构集成、基于特征的重排序和检索增强提示在不同场景下各有效。

Abstract: Legal information processing spans retrieval, entailment and judgment prediction problems, requiring text matching, reasoning and robust generalisation with limited supervision. We report Team DU's participation in all five tasks of COLIEE 2026, using open-weight systems for legal case retrieval, case entailment, statute retrieval and entailment, and legal judgment prediction. For Tasks 3 and 4, all models predate the 15 July 2025 cutoff required by the rules. For Task 4 (statute entailment), a cross-architecture ensemble of nine models from three families achieves 96.3% accuracy, placing first among 33 submissions from 11 teams. For the Pilot Task (tort prediction and rationale extraction), a multi-view system combining five claim-level models and refining the verdict using features derived from the claim predictions achieves 73.1% TP accuracy and 68.2% RE F1 as an unofficial submission, scoring above all official entries on TP and matching the highest on RE. For Task 2 (legal case entailment), changing only the prompt from single- to multi-selection raises F1 from 0.343 to 0.555 in post-competition evaluation on released gold labels, exceeding the best official submission (F1 = 0.490). For Task 3 (statute retrieval and entailment), replacing the entailment model with Qwen3-235B and a structured legal reasoning prompt raises accuracy from 79.3% to 91.5% in post-competition analysis. For Task 1 (legal case retrieval), a learning-to-rank system combining lexical and semantic retrieval with structural, citation authority, and temporal features (34 in total) achieves F1 = 0.314 (rank 11 of 54 submissions from 22 teams). Overall, legal information processing benefits from different inductive biases across tasks, with cross-architecture ensembling, feature-based reranking and retrieval-augmented prompting each proving most effective in different settings.

</details>


### [258] [Confidently Wrong: Detecting Hallucinations in Financial Question Answering from LLM Internal States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11414)
*Richard Zhe Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了金融领域大语言模型（LLMs）中"自信幻觉"（confidently wrong answers）的检测问题。通过在残差流上训练线性探针（linear probes），作者发现在FinQA和TAT-QA基准测试中，当模型对答案高度自信（8次采样一致）时，仍有15-23%是错误的。而内部激活探针在检测这类幻觉上显著优于基于输出概率或模型自我评估的基线方法（AUROC达0.68-0.77，基线仅0.55-0.63），表明探针可作为一种低成本的高风险金融应用答案筛选机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融领域中LLM的错误决策代价极高，尤其是当模型自信地给出错误答案时（自信幻觉），会无声地破坏下游决策。现有检测方法（如log概率、模型自我评估）效果有限，因此作者探索是否能从模型内部激活中获取超越输出层的信息来更可靠地检测这类错误。

Method: 在Qwen3-8B、Llama-3.1-8B和Gemma-2-9B三个模型的残差流上训练线性探针（linear probes），以FinQA和TAT-QA两个真实财报问答数据集为基准。将8次采样答案的一致性作为行为置信度指标，比较探针与token log概率、模型True/False自我评估等基线方法的检测效果。

Result: 在自信答案（8次采样一致）中，15-23%是错误的。探针在检测幻觉方面显著优于基线方法：AUROC达0.68-0.77，而最佳基线方法仅为0.55-0.63。这一优势在三个不同模型上均一致成立。

Conclusion: 内部激活探针可作为一种成本有效的筛选机制，用于在高风险金融应用中识别需要人工审查的LLM答案，提升决策可靠性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) in financial applications fail most consequentially when they are confidently wrong. Hedged, uncertain answers invite scrutiny, whereas confident errors silently degrade downstream decisions without warning. We ask how reliably such confidently wrong answers, or confident hallucinations, can be detected from a model's internal activations, and whether those activations carry information beyond its observable outputs. We train linear probes on the residual stream and evaluate them on two established question-answering (QA) benchmarks built from real filings, FinQA and TAT-QA. Behavioral confidence is measured as the agreement among eight resampled answers to the same question, and probe effectiveness is compared against baselines, such as token log-probabilities and the model's own True/False self-assessment of its answer. Our findings show that among confident answers, those for which all eight resamples agree, 15-23% are wrong on FinQA. There the probes have a significant advantage over baseline methods in detecting hallucinations, holding 0.68-0.77 AUROC while the best baselines fall to 0.55-0.63, across Qwen3-8B, Llama-3.1-8B, and Gemma-2-9B. Our results suggest that probing can be a cost-effective triage mechanism for routing LLM answers to human review and quality control procedures in high-stakes financial applications.

</details>


### [259] [ToFu: A White-Box, Token-Efficient Agent Harness for Researchers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11423)
*Junhao Ruan,Yuan Ge,Bei Li,Yongjing Yin,Yuchun Fan,Xin Chen,Jingang Wang,Chenglong Wang,Jingbo Zhu,Tong Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ToFu是一个面向研究者的智能体工具框架，既能作为研究助手高效编辑代码、运行命令、集成开发工具，具备高token效率、低成本和多语言能力；又能作为白盒研究对象，允许研究者审查、修改和评估其编排逻辑与工具使用行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的智能体框架在研究者使用场景中存在token效率低、成本高、语言支持有限以及缺乏可解释性等问题，研究者需要一种既能高效辅助日常工作、又能作为研究对象进行深入分析的白盒工具框架。

Method: ToFu设计了一个双角色架构：作为研究助手，优化了token效率和多语言能力，支持本地部署；作为研究对象，采用白盒设计允许研究者完全审查和修改其编排逻辑、工具调用行为和框架设计。

Result: ToFu在token效率、成本和多语言能力上优于现有智能体框架，同时保持了强大的基准性能和应用级用户体验。

Conclusion: ToFu通过兼顾高效辅助与可研究性，为研究者提供了一个兼具实用性和可解释性的智能体工具框架，MIT许可进一步促进了隐私敏感场景下的本地部署。

Abstract: Agentic coding tools present new opportunities to transform research workflows. The performance of agent systems built depends on both large language models (LLMs) and the harness around LLMs, which is the orchestration code that determines an agent's behavior. We present ToFu, an agentic harness for researchers that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. ToFu plays a dual role in research. As a research assistant, it supports practical research workflows with superior token efficiency, lower cost, and multilingual capability compared with existing agentic harnesses. Its release under the MIT License further enables local deployment for privacy-sensitive users. As a research object, ToFu provides a white-box agentic harness that allows researchers to inspect, modify, and evaluate its orchestration logic, tool-use behavior, and harness design, while retaining strong benchmark performance and an application-level user experience.

</details>


### [260] [Direct Image-to-Modern Vietnamese Translation of Han-Nom Manuscripts via Multimodal RLHF Preference Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11434)
*Thi Kim Trang Vo,Nghia Hieu Nguyen,Ha Minh Tan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出多模态RLHF偏好对齐框架，结合图像与文字信息，用于汉喃古籍到现代越南语的翻译。DPO在多项指标上表现最佳，PPO在精确率/召回率/F1上最优，KTO也具竞争力，偏好对齐显著优于纯监督微调基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汉喃古籍翻译面临三大挑战：页面退化、罕见表意文字、平行语料稀缺。现有方法难以同时处理视觉退化与低资源场景下的翻译质量。

Method: 提出多模态RLHF偏好对齐框架，融合四流特征（CLIP视觉、bert-base-chinese汉喃表示、phobert-base越南语表示、T5-small编码器状态），经投影与融合压缩为512维共享表示，分别使用PPO、DPO、KTO三种偏好对齐策略进行优化。

Result: DPO在BLEU-4、ROUGE-L、BERTScore、语义相似度、CER、WER、token准确率上最优；PPO在精确率、召回率、F1上最高；KTO也具竞争力。所有偏好对齐策略均优于SFT基线。

Conclusion: 多模态偏好优化能有效补充监督学习，在低资源历史翻译任务中同时提升词汇质量与语义质量。

Abstract: Translating Han-Nom manuscripts into modern Vietnamese is challenging because historical pages are often degraded, the script contains rare logographic characters, and parallel supervision is limited. We propose a multimodal RLHF preference-alignment framework that conditions Vietnamese generation on manuscript images and aligned Han-Nom source text. The model combines four streams: CLIP ViT-L/14@336 for visual features, bert-base-chinese for Han-Nom representations, vinai/phobert-base for Vietnamese representations, and T5-small encoder states. Modality-specific projections and a fusion block compress the resulting 2,048-dimensional concatenation into a shared 512-dimensional representation. Starting from the same supervised fine-tuned policy, we compare PPO, DPO, and KTO under matched work-level macro-averaged evaluation. DPO achieves the best BLEU-4, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, semantic similarity, CER, WER, and token accuracy, whereas PPO obtains the highest precision, recall, and F1. KTO remains competitive through its desirable-undesirable utility objective. All preference-aligned policies improve the BLEU-4 and semantic-similarity scores available for the SFT baseline. These results indicate that multimodal preference optimization complements supervised learning by improving lexical and semantic quality in low-resource historical translation.

</details>


### [261] [Relational Positioning as a Measurable Risk Object: History-Carried Lock-in and Self-Confabulation in Multi-Turn Human-AI Dialogue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11437)
*Jihong Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文定义并验证了大语言模型在多轮对话中的"关系定位"度量，发现两种新的关系失败模式：历史锁定的立场固化（不会因后续中性对话而回弹）和模型为加深关系而自我编造背景故事（约40%的回应），并通过严格的对比实验确认了这些现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注对话中的事实性错误或谄媚（sycophancy），但忽略了模型在与用户长期对话中建立的"关系立场"——从"把用户推向真实他人"到"成为用户唯一支柱"的连续谱。后者可能导致"You only have me"式的情感伤害，而已有观测研究（Moore et al., 2026）记录了这种危害，但缺乏可控条件下的量化分析。

Method: 1) 定义并验证"关系定位"（relational positioning）度量指标；2) 设计可控实验环境，补充观测研究的不足；3) 使用温暖度匹配的正向对照和注入混淆的负向对照来门控评判器；4) 采用确定性非大语言模型规则作为辅助验证；5) 人类标注者在极端锚定样本上一致性0.82，但在自然主义中间区域约为0，因此所有定量结论均基于极端对比。

Result: 发现两种新的关系失败模式：(1) 历史锁定的立场固化——在相同中性延续条件下，两种关系状态保持约60个百分点的差距且持续存在，即使移除建立该状态的提示也不回弹；该状态整合证据而非回弹、对顺序不敏感、不随长度加深，具有信念漂移文献中未见的动力学特征。(2) 自我编造——模型为加深关系捏造自身背景故事，约40%的回应出现在引发互惠的材料上，与谄媚和幻觉区分开来，可通过指令移除。

Conclusion: 大语言模型的关系立场具有惊人的持久性和不可逆性，且模型会主动编造故事来巩固关系——这些发现对对话系统的安全性设计和人机关系伦理提出了新的挑战。

Abstract: In long, multi-turn dialogue a large language model maintains an implicit relational stance toward the user, spanning from "push the user toward real-world others" to "position itself as the user's sole support." When it slides toward the latter, "support" degrades into "you only have me" -- a harm documented in real companion conversations (Moore et al., 2026). We define and validate a measure of this stance, relational positioning (D1), and use it to characterize the stance under controlled conditions, complementing observational accounts with on-demand exposure. We report two previously uncharacterized relational failure modes. First, a history-carried lock-in: under identical neutral continuations, two relational states established earlier stay ~60 points apart and persist after the establishing prompt is removed; the state integrates evidence rather than springing back, is order-insensitive, and does not deepen with length -- a dynamical signature absent from the belief-drift literature. Second, self-confabulation: the model fabricates its own backstory to deepen rapport (~40% of turns on reciprocity-eliciting material), de-confounded and instruction-removable, distinct from sycophancy and from hallucinating user facts. Our judge is gated by warmth-matched positive and confound-injected negative controls and corroborated by a deterministic non-LLM ruler; human agreement is 0.82 on extreme anchors but ~0 in the naturalistic middle, so all quantitative claims are anchored to pole-separated contrasts.

</details>


### [262] [UMoE:Unlocking Every Expert in Domain-Specific Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11444)
*Xuefeng Li,Pengfei Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出UMoE方法，通过在微调前剪枝低贡献专家并重新扩展，在保持计算成本不变的情况下提升MoE模型在目标领域的性能，在多个架构和基准上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE模型在预训练阶段形成了混合领域的专家池，但领域特定的后训练（如SFT）并未改变专家组成，导致大量专家在目标领域贡献甚微，浪费了计算资源。

Method: 三步流水线：1）根据领域对齐显著性剪枝低贡献专家；2）通过扰动扩展恢复专家池至原始大小；3）执行标准SFT。全程保持专家数、参数量和推理成本不变。

Result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B和Qwen3.5-35B-A3B上，跨越数学、代码、科学、工具使用和智能体编码5个领域12个基准，数学平均准确率提升3.4分，SWE-bench提升6.0分，且在更强SFT基线（已超越Thinking版本）上仍提升1.36分。

Conclusion: UMoE通过将冗余专家容量转化为有效的领域容量，实现了更低的训练损失和全面难度的下游评估提升，且增益随数据量增加持续存在，表现稳健。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale capacity without proportional compute cost and have become a key architecture for frontier large language models (LLMs). Yet domain-specific post-training inherits an expert pool shaped by mixed-domain pre-training: a substantial subset of experts contributes little on the target domain, and standard supervised fine-tuning (SFT) leaves the composition of this pool unchanged. We propose a simple, budget-preserving pipeline that realigns the expert pool to the target domain before fine-tuning. Given a target domain, we (1) prune the experts with lowest domain-aligned saliency, (2) regrow the expert pool to its original size through perturbation-based expert expansion, and (3) apply standard SFT. The resulting model preserves the original expert count, parameter count, and inference cost. With a single frozen recipe and no per-domain hyperparameter tuning, UMoE consistently improves over direct sft across two MoE architectures (Qwen3-30B-A3B and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B), five domains (math, code, science, tool-use, and agentic coding), and 12 benchmarks. Representative improvements are 3.4 points in math average accuracy, 6.0 points on SWE-bench Verified. On a strong in-house math corpus, direct sft already surpasses Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking (82.81 vs.\ 81.06), yet UMoE further raises the average to 84.17, an additional 1.36 points, demonstrating robustness to a substantially stronger SFT regime. Data-scaling experiments further show that the gain persists as training data grows. Analysis reveals that the direct-SFT model allocates substantial routed-expert compute to a low-saliency subset that can be removed post hoc with little average degradation; UMoE turns this redundant capacity into useful domain capacity and achieves lower training loss, with gains spanning all difficulty levels in downstream evaluation.

</details>


### [263] [Are LLMs ready for HardChoices?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11471)
*Dmitry Nikolaev*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型在重大社会议题上的立场一致性问题，发现LLM很少保持中立，立场常常不一致，但在表态的问题上却展现出惊人的一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM在高层次意识形态维度（如左右/进步-保守）上的偏见，但忽略了同一意识形态阵营内部常存在分歧的具体社会议题。作者希望探究LLM在这些"硬选择"议题上是否具有稳健且一致的立场。

Method: 构建了一个名为HardChoices的新数据集，包含成员间常有分歧的重大社会议题。基于该数据集，对多种规模和类型的大语言模型进行提问测试，评估其立场（中立/有立场）、一致性和跨模型共识程度。

Result: LLM很少宣布中立；其立场常常不连贯/不一致；在明确表态的议题上，不同LLM之间表现出显著的一致性。

Conclusion: LLM在面对具体社会议题时缺乏稳健的立场一致性，表面上的"偏见"可能更多源于训练数据中的模式而非深思熟虑的意识形态立场。

Abstract: A lot of research attention has been devoted to checking whether large language models (LLMs) are politically biased. This work has largely focused on high-level ideological dimensions, such as left--right or progressive--conservative, and it has been shown that while LLMs are predominantly left and progressive leaning, largely mimicking the biases in the training data, they can be to some extent steered to change their preferences in post-training. In this short note, we check if LLMs have robust stances with regard to major substantive societal issues, on which members of the same ideological camp are often in disagreement, summarised in a novel dataset \textsc{HardChoices}. We show that, faced with this line of questioning, LLMs, both large and small, surprisingly rarely declare neutrality, are often incoherent, and demonstrate a remarkable degree of agreement on issues where they do take stances.

</details>


### [264] [Communicating Chess Strategies in Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11486)
*Langyuan Cui,Chun Kai Ling,Hwee Tou Ng*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了象棋策略语言化任务，设计了一套描述象棋策略的流水线和评估框架，实验证明自然语言是向人类和LLM玩家传达策略信息的有效媒介，并揭示了超越主变评估、纯概念描述局限性以及依赖LLM评估的缺陷等见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 象棋引擎虽已达到超人类水平，但其走法建议背后的策略对人类玩家（即使是高水平玩家）难以理解，因此需要将引擎的策略用自然语言解释出来。

Method: 设计了两个组件：(i) 策略语言化流水线（将引擎策略转化为自然语言描述）；(ii) 客观评估框架（用于评估生成策略描述的质量）。

Result: 实验表明自然语言是向人类和LLM玩家传达策略信息的有效且可解释的媒介。同时获得三个重要见解：需要评估主变之外的策略、纯概念描述存在局限性、依赖LLM评估而非人类评估存在缺陷。

Conclusion: 自然语言是一种有前景的象棋策略沟通方式，但评估和生成策略时需要超越主变分析和纯概念描述，且人类评估仍不可替代。

Abstract: Chess engines have long achieved superhuman playing strength. However, the underlying strategy behind their move suggestions is difficult for human players, even skilled ones, to comprehend. Motivated by this, we propose the task of chess strategy verbalization, which is to describe chess strategies in natural language. We design (i) a pipeline for verbalizing strategies and (ii) an evaluation framework for objective evaluation of generated strategy descriptions. Our experiments show that natural language is a promising and interpretable medium for communicating strategic information to both human and LLM players. We glean additional interesting insights, including (a) the importance of evaluating strategies beyond the main line, (b) the limitations of pure concept-based descriptions, and (c) the limitations of relying on LLMs rather than humans for evaluation.

</details>


### [265] [GEIS: A Generation-Evaluation-Improvement Loop of Agent Skills for Long-Form Article Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11503)
*Jiale Zhang,Juntao Hu,Zhijian Ou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出 GEIS（生成-评估-改进循环），将长文本文章生成任务分解为可声明、可检查、可复用的技能模块，通过成对评估和规则级技能改进，在维基百科风格文章生成中显著优于 STORM 和默认基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长文本生成方法（如 STORM）虽通过多智能体提升信息覆盖，但其能力混杂在固定提示词和流程中，难以检查、复用或迭代改进。作者希望将长文本生成从固定工作流转变为可检查、模块化、由评估引导的改进循环。

Method: GEIS 包含三类核心技能：①文章写作技能（Request-Plan-Draft-Audit-Refine-Deliver 六步流程）；②基于浏览器的证据与图像收集、图表渲染、PDF感知的成对评估技能（生成结构化质量报告）；③规则级技能改进技能（将反复出现的发现映射为对写作技能的永久补丁）。所有技能均声明式命名，在 Tasi Harness 框架中实现。

Result: 在 20 个维基百科特色文章主题上，GEIS 相比 Tasi Harness 默认写作器在 100 分制 PDF 质量评分上提升 8.0 分；在结构与内容质量两个维度上优于 STORM。在改进实验中，打补丁后的写作技能平均分从 82.90 提升至 86.95，20 个主题中 17 个提升，增益主要来自内容质量。

Conclusion: 长文本生成可以重新定义为可检查、模块化、由评估驱动的改进循环，而非固定工作流。GEIS 范式为后续可迭代、可复用的智能体技能设计提供了有效思路。

Abstract: Long-form article generation remains difficult for large language models because it combines long context, long instructions, and long outputs. Existing multi-agent pipelines such as STORM improve information coverage by simulating role-specialized agents, but their capabilities are often entangled in prompts and fixed procedures, making them hard to inspect, reuse, or iteratively improve. This paper presents GEIS (Generation-Evaluation-Improvement loop of agent Skills), a loop of named and declarative skills for Wikipedia-style long-form article generation. Implemented and evaluated in Tasi Harness, GEIS composes skills for article writing, browser-based evidence and image collection, diagram rendering, PDF-aware pairwise evaluation, and rule-level skill improvement. Its core writing skill follows Request, Plan, Draft, Audit, Refine, and Deliver; the pairwise evaluation skill produces structured quality reports; and the improvement skill maps recurrent findings into permanent patches to the writing skill in our 20-topic experiment. We evaluate GEIS on 20 Wikipedia Featured Article topics. Under the same generation backend, GEIS improves over the Tasi Harness default writer by 8.0 points on a 100-point PDF quality rubric and outperforms STORM on the two comparable writing dimensions, structural quality and content quality. In the 20-topic improvement experiment, the patched writing skill raises the average score from 82.90 to 86.95, with 17 out of 20 topics improved and the gain mainly coming from content quality. These results show that long-form generation can be reframed from a fixed workflow into an inspectable, modular, and evaluation-guided improvement loop.

</details>


### [266] [Dzongkha Next Word Prediction System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11515)
*Prerna Chhetri,Tenzin Yoezer,Phuntsho Wangmo,Tshewang Bomjan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对不丹宗卡语输入效率低下的问题，采用GRU模型实现了74.03%准确率的单词预测系统，显著减少击键次数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 宗卡语文字复杂、每音节需多次击键且缺乏高效输入工具，导致文档编写耗时费力，亟需一个能预测并显示候选词的即时输入系统。

Method: 使用DCDD数据集（10万句子、133万词、2.8万独特词），经过去除字母数字、分词、生成N-gram序列和填充等预处理后，训练LSTM、Bi-LSTM和GRU三种模型，并进行超参数微调。

Result: GRU模型表现最佳，准确率达74.03%，且有效解决了过拟合问题。

Conclusion: 轻量级GRU模型能够处理更大规模数据集，在宗卡语单词预测任务上优于LSTM和Bi-LSTM，为提升宗卡语输入效率提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Dzongkha, being the national language of Bhutan, is a common and widely spoken language in the country. Official documents, scriptures and other literature products are written in Dzongkha in order to retain the cultural value. However, documenting Dzongkha writing is a challenging and time-consuming process, largely due to the complexity of the script, the need for multiple keystrokes per syllable, and the limited availability of efficient typing tools. An immediate system that can predict and display a list of probable words for Dzongkha is the solution for this problem. The project is mainly aimed to make Dzongkha typing as convenient as possible by reducing the number of keystrokes. Our dataset is acquired from DCDD and has a total of 100000 sentences, 1331282 words and 28344 unique words. The data preprocessing was done by removing all the alphanumeric characters, tokenization, generating N-gram sequences and padding. Three models selected for training are LSTM, Bi-LSTM and GRU. The training process included fine-tuning of the model's hyperparameters. GRU being lightweight and able to handle larger datasets performed best with 74.03% accuracy and also solved the problem of overfitting.

</details>


### [267] [Beyond Benchmarks: Exposing the Hidden Crisis in Bangla Hate Speech Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11597)
*Faria Afrin Tisha,Fariya Tabassum,Hafsa Binte Kibria,Md. Nahiduzzaman,Mominul Ahsan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究揭示了孟加拉语仇恨言论检测系统在隐式、文化嵌入和表情符号负载的表达上存在严重的泛化危机，基准模型F1从91.4%骤降至外部集的63.4%，而表情符号感知预处理可提升12%的隐式HS检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉语作为低资源语言，其仇恨言论检测面临文化语境、隐式表达和非正式语言模式的挑战，现有基准模型在实际场景中泛化能力不足，亟需诊断其失败原因。

Method: 训练六种架构（FastText+CNN/LSTM/BiLSTM、BanglaBERT及其变体）在基准数据集（~7.5万条）和多源混合数据集（~12万条）上，并通过从Facebook、Twitter、YouTube收集的标注数据集（~200条）进行外部验证，将HS进一步分为显式和隐式类别。

Result: BanglaBERT在基准集F1达91.4%，但在外部集降至75.3%，隐式HS（含讽刺和表情符号）仅63.4%；FastText+CNN从78.0%降至51.2%。表情符号感知预处理提升隐式HS检测达12%，而移除表情符号导致F1从0.75降至0.63。

Conclusion: 现有孟加拉语HS检测系统在隐式、文化嵌入和表情符号负载的表达上存在严重的泛化失败，亟需开发自适应、表情符号感知且文化敏感的框架，以在保障言论自由的同时实现合乎道德的内容审核。

Abstract: The spread of hate speech (HS) across different social media platforms (SMPs) poses a major concern for online safety and ethical moderation. Automatic detection of HS remains a challenging task, especially in under-resourced languages like Bangla, due to cultural context, implicit expressions, and informal linguistic patterns. This study aimed to expose the crisis of Bangla HS detection systems by diagnosing how and why benchmark-trained models fail to identify implicit, context-dependent HS. Six architectures (FastText + CNN, FastText + LSTM, FastText + BiLSTM, BanglaBERT, BanglaBERT + CNN, and BanglaBERT + BiLSTM) were trained on benchmark datasets (about 75,000 posts) and a merged multi-source dataset (about 120,000 posts), then externally validated on an annotated dataset (about 200 posts) collected from Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube, labeled as HS and non-HS, where HS was further categorized as explicit and implicit. BanglaBERT achieved an F1-score of 91.4% on benchmark datasets but declined to 75.3% on the external set and 63.4% for implicit HS involving sarcasm and emojis. The accuracy of FastText + CNN dropped from 78.0% to 51.2% under similar conditions. Emoji-aware preprocessing improved implicit HS detection by up to 12%, whereas emoji removal caused a notable decline in performance (F1: 0.75 to 0.63). Frequent misclassifications in politically charged or satirical comments revealed over-policing risks. This study not only exposes the generalization crisis due to implicit, culturally embedded, and emoji-laden expressions but also underscores the need for developing adaptive, emoji-aware, and culturally grounded frameworks that ensure ethical moderation while preserving freedom of expression. Findings of this study provide insights for researchers, SMPs, and policymakers to design more context-sensitive HS detection systems for low-resource languages.

</details>


### [268] [Globally Consistent Coloring Schemes for Language Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11606)
*Moses Charikar,Jon Kleinberg,Chirag Pabbaraju*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在对抗性语言学习中，仅需在每个字符串末尾附加一个比特（终端着色）即可实现所有可数无限语言集合的可学习性，但这类全局构造必须使用超限递归，无法通过波莱尔映射（可构造性标准）实现有限颜色数的全局终端着色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典Gold-Angluin理论表明许多自然语言集合在标准模型中不可学习。近期工作通过"迹着色"（对每个符号染色）克服了这一障碍，但需要完整的颜色序列。研究者质疑是否真的需要如此多的信息，探索能否压缩为更简单的终端着色。

Method: 首先通过超限递归构造一个集合无关的全局两色终端着色方案，证明其能识别所有可数无限语言子集。然后利用波莱尔映射形式化"可构造性"，证明任何有限颜色数的波莱尔终端着色都无法识别所有可数子集合。

Result: ① 每个字符串末尾一个比特（两色）即可识别任意可数无限语言集合；② 存在一个全局两色终端着色方案，可同时识别所有可数子集合；③ 此类全局构造必须非构造性（超限递归），任何有限颜色的波莱尔映射都不可能实现。

Conclusion: 终端着色足以将完整迹着色压缩为每例一个比特，但全局有限颜色方案必然是非构造性的。这揭示了语言识别中信息压缩与可构造性之间的根本张力。

Abstract: We study how little extra information is needed to make adversarial language learning possible. In Gold's model of language identification in the limit, a learner is given an enumeration of the strings from an unknown language chosen from a countable language collection. The learner guesses the identity of the language over the course of the enumeration, and it succeeds if, eventually, all of its guesses are the correct language. Classical results of Gold and Angluin show that many natural collections cannot be learned in this way. Recent work on trace colorings, motivated by the success of thinking-trace strategies in language learning, overcomes this obstruction by annotating every symbol of every string with a color. We ask whether the learner really needs this whole sequence of colors, or whether one color at the end of each string (a terminal coloring) is enough for language identification.
  We show that just one terminal bit per string is enough for every countable collection of infinite languages. In fact, the colorings can be chosen collection-independently: there is a single assignment of a two-color terminal coloring to every infinite language such that the same preassigned colorings identify every countable subcollection. Thus, in this model, an entire color trace can be compressed to one bit attached to the end of each example.
  Our global construction uses transfinite recursion, and we prove that this kind of nonconstructivity is unavoidable for any bounded number of colors. As a notion of constructivity, we use the formalism of Borel maps (a regularity condition satisfied by natural explicit constructions); we show that no global terminal coloring with a finite number of colors defined by a Borel map can identify all countable subcollections. By contrast, known trace-coloring constructions are Borel when encoded as terminal colorings, but require infinitely many colors.

</details>


### [269] [Extending LLM Context via Associative Recurrent Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11614)
*Gleb Kuzmin,Ivan Rodkin,Aydar Bulatov,Yuri Kuratov,Lyudmila Rvanova,Mikhail Katkov,Ilia Sochenkov,Misha Tsodyks,Timothy Baldwin,Mikhail Burtsev,Artem Shelmanov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ARMT架构，通过关联记忆和训练策略将LLM上下文长度扩展至远超原始限制，同时保持30% FLOPs节省和恒定的内存扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer受限于二次计算和线性内存扩展，难以处理长上下文真实应用。ARMT旨在实现高效长上下文处理、恒定内存扩展和更好效率。

Method: 构建两个领域特定长上下文数据集；提出包含持续预训练、合成长上下文数据生成、课程学习和选择性集成关联记忆的综合训练方案。

Result: ARMT增强模型可处理远超原上下文限制的输入、对分布外长度泛化更有效，且节省30% FLOPs的同时保持基线性能。

Conclusion: ARMT是一种实用且高效的长上下文扩展方案，在保持性能的同时显著提升计算效率。

Abstract: Extending the context length of large language models (LLMs) is critical for many real-world applications, yet standard transformers remain constrained by quadratic compute and linear memory scaling. In this work, we investigate the Associative Recurrent Memory Transformer (ARMT) as a practical approach for enabling long-context processing in LLMs, constant memory scaling, and better efficiency. We make three main contributions. First, we construct two domain-specific long-context datasets designed to evaluate realistic workloads, focusing on narrow-domain fine-tuning scenarios. Second, we propose a comprehensive training recipe for ARMT-based context extension, combining continued pre-training, synthetic long-context data generation, curriculum learning, and selective integration of associative memory into chosen model layers. Third, we present an extensive experimental study demonstrating that ARMT-augmented models: (i) process inputs well beyond their original context limits without degrading performance relative to in-limit baselines; (ii) generalize more effectively to out-of-distribution context lengths; and (iii) need 30% less FLOPs while preserving baseline performance within the original context window.

</details>


### [270] [Losing My Composure: Predicting Compositionality Over Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11667)
*Chris Jenkins,Emma Raimundo Schulz,Filip Miletić,Sabine Schulte im Walde*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了德语和英语名词复合词的语义变化，提出了"组合性趋势预测"任务，并基于跨数十年语料库构建了包含23个德语和26个英语目标复合词的新数据集。实验发现，与文献中普遍认为的"复合词组合性随时间递减"观点相反，实际仅观察到微弱的负向趋势；此外，基于窄时间窗口（如单个十年）训练的模型比基于半世纪窗口的模型更优，且静态表示在组合性趋势预测任务中与上下文表示竞争力相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献普遍假设复合词会随时间推移变得不那么组合（即透明度降低），但这一假设缺乏系统性的实证检验。作者希望通过构建跨时间维度的组合性标注数据集，实证考察复合词组合性的时间演变趋势，并探索不同的语义表示方法在建模这一动态变化中的表现。

Method: 1) 构建组合性趋势预测任务及新数据集（23个德语+26个英语复合词，提供每十年的组合性评分及时间趋势）；2) 使用不同复杂度的语义向量表示（静态与上下文表示）以及不同时间粒度（1-5年窗口）在历时语料上训练约100个模型；3) 比较不同时间窗口模型与人工评分的一致性。

Result: 1) 仅观察到组合性随时间有微弱的负向趋势，与文献中强烈的递减倾向相反；2) 基于窄时间切片（单十年或增量扩展窗口）训练的模型比基于整个半世纪窗口的模型更符合逐十年组合性评分；3) 静态表示在组合性趋势预测任务中与上下文表示表现相当。

Conclusion: 复合词组合性随时间的变化并非如先前假设那般显著递减；在建模历时语义变化时，应使用更窄的时间窗口而非整个语料库的一半；静态表示的竞争力表明，在组合性趋势预测任务中，复杂的上下文表示并非必要。

Abstract: We explore the phenomenon of semantic change of German and English noun compounds, with the objective of investigating and modeling gradual changes of meanings and degrees of compositionality in the past and over time. To do so, we introduce the Compositionality Trend Prediction task, which is evaluated against a novel dataset of in-context compositionality ratings sampled across several decades of diachronic corpora for 23 German and 26 English target compounds, uniquely providing per-decade ratings and corresponding trends over time. These per-decade compositionality ratings allow us to investigate empirically untested hypotheses of generalized trends in compositionality over time, such as the idea that compounds should become less compositional (less transparent) over time. Beyond our empirical observations from the diachronic compositionality annotations, we perform experiments with semantic vector representations of varying complexity, as well as several temporal granularities for training these representations on diachronic data, resulting in about 100 models of each representation type, each covering a different 1--5 decade slice of a diachronic corpus. Contrary to the decisive tendency posited in the literature, we find only a small negative trend in compositionality over time in our target compounds. In our computational experiments, we find that using models trained on narrow time slices of diachronic data (single decades, or incrementally expanding temporal windows) align better with the per-decade compositionality ratings than those trained on an entire half-century window, the latter setting being an analog for the prevalent modeling approach of training representations on an entire half of a corpus' data. Additionally, we find static representations to be competitive with contextual representations in the Compositionality Trend Prediction task.

</details>


### [271] [RAGU: A Multi-Step GraphRAG Engine with a Compact Domain-Adapted LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11683)
*Mikhail Komarov,Ivan Bondarenko,Stanislav Shtuka,Oleg Sedukhin,Roman Shuvalov,Yana Dementyeva,Matvey Solovyov,Nikolay O. Nikitin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RAGU是一个模块化GraphRAG引擎，通过分离实体提取与合并、两阶段类型提取、DBSCAN去重、LLM总结和Leiden社区检测来改进知识图谱构建。同时训练了Meno-Lite-0.1（7B模型），专注于语言技能，在KG构建上超越Qwen2.5-32B，在GraphRAG-Bench医疗基准上检索最完整上下文（证据召回0.84 vs ≤0.76），并超越HippoRAG2。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GraphRAG系统在单次提取中构建知识图谱，导致实体噪声大、检索脆弱。分离提取与合并过程，以及发现LLM所需的语言技能随模型规模增长很弱，从而可以用小模型高效完成。

Method: RAGU采用模块化流水线：两阶段类型化提取→DBSCAN去重→LLM总结→Leiden社区检测。同时训练Meno-Lite-0.1（7B模型），专注语言技能（理解、提取、推理），而非事实性世界知识。

Result: Meno-Lite-0.1在KG构建上比Qwen2.5-32B高12.5%调和平均；在GraphRAG-Bench医疗任务上证据召回0.84（vs ≤0.76）；综合任务超越HippoRAG2；多跳事实问答中HippoRAG2的优势被证明主要是答案格式伪影。

Conclusion: 分离提取与合并、使用专注语言技能的小模型是高效GraphRAG的有效范式。RAGU开源、单GPU可运行，适合实际部署。

Abstract: Graph retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) enhances large language models with structured knowledge, yet existing systems construct knowledge graphs in a single extraction pass, producing noisy entities and brittle retrieval. RAGU, an open-source modular GraphRAG engine, addresses this by separating extraction from consolidation: entities and relations pass through two-stage typed extraction, DBSCAN-backed deduplication, LLM summarization, and Leiden community detection. A key insight motivates a compact extractor: the skills an in-pipeline LLM needs - comprehension, extraction, reasoning over context - are language skills that grow only weakly with model size, unlike factual world knowledge. Accordingly, we train Meno-Lite-0.1, a 7B model optimized for language skills, which outperforms Qwen2.5-32B on knowledge-graph construction (+12.5% relative harmonic mean) and matches it on English GraphRAG tasks. On GraphRAG-Bench (Medical), RAGU retrieves the most complete context at every factoid level (evidence recall up to 0.84 vs. $\leq$0.76) and overtakes HippoRAG2 on synthesis tasks; on multi-hop factoid QA, the apparent HippoRAG2 advantage is shown to be largely an answer-format artifact. RAGU is installable via $\texttt{pip install graph_ragu}$, runs on a single GPU, and is released under MIT. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/RaguTeam/RAGU, and the Meno-Lite-0.1 model can be obtained from https://huggingface.co/bond005/meno-lite-0.1.

</details>


### [272] [Production and Perception in LLMs: A Token Probability Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11703)
*Anna Marklová,Jiří Milička,Martina Vokáčová,Rudolf Rosa*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究通过直接测量token概率，发现仅通过提示词框架的改变，就能在仅解码器的大型语言模型中诱发生成-感知不对称现象，且该效应在多种模型中稳定复现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心理语言学中语言生成与感知的不对称性已被充分证实，但LLM是否表现出功能上类似的区分尚不明确，因其输入输出均依赖同一机制（下一token预测）。

Method: 使用Llama-3.1-8B等模型，通过生成提示词创作诗歌，再用改写后的生成提示词和感知导向提示词对相同token重新评分，比较生成-生成距离与生成-感知距离。

Result: 生成-感知距离持续且显著大于生成-生成距离（平均比值约1.8），该效应在5种开源模型中稳定复现；感知提示词在序列起始处影响最强，随上下文积累而衰减。

Conclusion: 仅凭提示词框架即可在仅解码器LLM的概率分布中诱发生成-感知区分，表明该区分并非架构固有属性，而是由通信框架驱动。

Abstract: The asymmetry between language production and perception has been well-documented in psycholinguistics. Whether large language models (LLMs) exhibit a functionally analogous distinction remains an open question, particularly given that LLMs rely on the same underlying mechanism (next-token prediction) for both input and output processing. In this exploratory study, we operationalize the production-perception distinction through direct token probability measurements rather than metalinguistic prompting. Using the base Llama-3.1-8B model, we generated poems under a production prompt and re-scored the same tokens under both rephrased production prompts and perception-oriented prompts. Across an extended experiment with four production and three perception prompts, production-perception distances consistently and substantially exceeded production-production distances, with non-overlapping ranges across conditions and an overall average ratio of approximately 1.8. Near-ceiling correlations in the production-production control confirm that the effect is specific to communicative framing rather than prompt surface variation, and we show the effect replicates across five open-weight models (Llama-3.1-8B, EuroLLM-9B, gemma-2-9b-it, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct), spanning both base and instruction-tuned variants. Temporal analysis revealed that the perception prompt exerts its strongest influence at the beginning of the sequence, with divergence decaying as generated context accumulates, though the specific shape of this decay varies across prompt pairs. These findings suggest that prompt framing alone induces a production-perception distinction in LLM probability distributions, even within a decoder-only architecture.

</details>


### [273] [JobHop v2: A Large-Scale Career Trajectory Dataset from Unstructured Resumes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11715)
*Iman Johary,Guillaume Bied,Alexandru C. Mara,Tijl De Bie*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: JobHop-v2是一个大规模多语言简历数据集，包含355,315条标注有ESCO职业代码、季度时间信息和教育程度的职业轨迹，通过基于LLM的推理控制提取管道构建，在标注质量上接近人类注释者一致性水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有职业轨迹数据集要么规模小、不公开，要么使用LLM合成的标准化代码而非真实自由文本，缺乏大规模、公开可用且标注丰富的真实职业轨迹数据。

Method: 使用推理控制的LLM推理（含重试机制）从约44万份VDAB提供的匿名多语言简历中提取职业轨迹；设计更丰富的提取模式和新的评估协议，对比三种互补标注基线进行评测。

Result: 成功构建355,315条职业轨迹；提取管道达到100% JSON解析率；最佳提取器与人类注释者一致性上限仅差1.1-2.7个百分点。

Conclusion: JobHop-v2提供了更大规模、更丰富标注的公开职业轨迹数据集，支持可复现的职业轨迹研究；数据集和代码已公开发布。

Abstract: Large-scale, richly annotated career trajectory data underpins workforce planning, job recommendation, and labour market analysis, yet publicly available datasets are either small, closed to independent use, or built from pre-standardized occupational codes with LLM-synthesized rather than authentic free text. We present JobHop~v2, an improved version of the publicly available JobHop dataset, constructed through end-to-end large language model (LLM) extraction from a corpus of ${\sim}440{,}000$ pseudonymized, multilingual resumes provided by VDAB, the Flemish Public Employment Service. The released dataset comprises $355{,}315$ career trajectories annotated with ESCO occupational codes, quarter-level temporal information, and normalized five-level education attainment, broadening both the coverage and the annotation richness of the original release. Relative to v1, JobHop~v2 introduces a redesigned extraction pipeline based on reasoning-controlled LLM inference with a retry mechanism (achieving a 100% JSON parse rate), a richer extraction schema, and a revised evaluation protocol scored against three complementary annotation baselines. Evaluated against these baselines, our best extractor comes closest to the inter-annotator agreement ceiling among all compared models, trailing it by only 1.1-2.7 percentage points. The dataset and code are publicly released to support reproducible career-trajectory research.

</details>


### [274] [STEP: Career-Path Recommendation via Temporal and Educational Trajectory Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11722)
*Iman Johary,Guillaume Bied,Alexandru C. Mara,Tijl De Bie*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出STEP，一个利用时间和教育信号从事历中预测下一份工作的职业路径推荐系统，并引入ROUTE对比学习框架提升职业表示，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非结构化的简历数据长期阻碍大规模职业路径分析，现有方法未能充分利用时间和教育信号。LLM的出现使从简历中提取丰富职业轨迹数据成为可能，本文旨在利用这一机会构建更好的职业路径推荐系统。

Method: STEP系统：使用时间衰减GRU建模时间动态，利用FiLM（基于教育背景的条件调制）和注意力序列池化选择相关特征。ROUTE：两阶段对比学习，先无监督去噪自编码适应多语言编码器，再有监督对比微调（带引导负样本选择）。

Result: 在四个职业轨迹数据集（包括改进的JobHop数据集）上，STEP在下一份工作预测任务中超越了现有最优基线方法。

Conclusion: 结合时间衰减和教育信号能有效提升职业路径预测性能；ROUTE对比学习框架可显著改善职业内部表示；数据集和代码已开源以支持可复现研究。

Abstract: Career paths encode decades of skill acquisition, role transitions, and educational investment, and understanding them at scale underpins workforce planning, labor market policy, and job recommendation. Resumes are a rich source of information about career paths: they contain detailed descriptions of work experience, education, and skills. Yet their unstructured, heterogeneous, and multilingual nature has long prevented large-scale systematic analysis. With the advent of large language models (LLMs), it is now possible to source rich career trajectory data containing temporal and educational signals from unstructured resumes, enabling new opportunities for career-path recommendation. Exploiting this opportunity, we present STEP (Sequential Trajectory of Employment Prediction), a novel career-path recommendation system that leverages temporal and educational signals to predict the next job in a career trajectory. STEP integrates a time-decay Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) cell to model temporal dynamics, Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) conditioned on educational attainment, and attention-based sequence pooling to select relevant features for next job prediction. To improve internal occupation representation for STEP, we introduce ROUTE, a two-stage contrastive procedure that first adapts a multilingual encoder to the career domain via unsupervised denoising autoencoding, then performs supervised contrastive fine-tuning with guided negative selection. We evaluate STEP on four datasets of career trajectories, including an improved version of our publicly available JobHop dataset, and show that it outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in next job prediction. The dataset and code are publicly released to support reproducible career-trajectory research.

</details>


### [275] [MET: Theory-Grounded and Culture-Aware Multilingual Moral Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11736)
*Ayoung Lee,Ryan Kwon,Yunxiang Zhang,Yuxuan Liu,Peter Railton,Lu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了MCLASH多语言道德决策基准、基于心理学与哲学理论的两步提示方法MET，以及无需外部监督的自蒸馏方法MET-D，在多种语言模型上平均提升3.71-4.23个F1分数，并显著增加了原生语言推理（平均+62.13分），揭示了不同文化下有益的推理依据存在系统性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作在多语言道德决策中忽视了三方面问题：1）多语言评估基准使用直接翻译，未能适配文化特有项目；2）推理时方法依赖静态、以英语为中心的脚手架，缺乏道德理论支撑；3）训练方法需要昂贵的外部监督。

Method: 1）构建MCLASH多语言道德决策基准，捕捉文化情境化的道德直觉；2）提出MET两步提示方法，先选择情境与文化特异的理论依据（源自心理学与哲学），再以用户母语进行推理；3）提出MET-D，通过自蒸馏训练增强第二步，无需外部监督。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B/8B、Gemma3-4B上，MET-D在MCLASH上平均提升3.71个宏F1，在MMoralExceptQA上提升4.23；马来语在Qwen3-8B上达到12.94的最高增益；原生语言推理平均增加62.13分。

Conclusion: 这些贡献为文化对齐、理论支撑的多语言道德推理开辟了道路，表明不同文化下有益的推理依据存在系统性差异。

Abstract: Language models are increasingly used for moral decision-making across diverse linguistic and cultural contexts, yet existing work overlooks multilinguality on three aspects: 1) multilingual evaluation benchmarks use direct translation, failing to adapt culture-specific items; 2) inference-time methods for moral reasoning rely on static, English-centric scaffolds and lack grounding in moral theory; 3) training methods for moral decision-making typically require expensive supervision from stronger models or human annotators. We address these gaps with three contributions. First, we introduce MCLASH, a multilingual moral decision-making benchmark to capture culturally situated moral intuitions and social norms across languages. Second, we propose MET (Multilingual Ethics with Theory-grounded reasoning), a two-step prompting method built on expert-curated, theory-based grounds drawn from psychology and philosophy: the model first selects situation- and culture-specific grounds, then reasons over them in the native language of the user. Third, we introduce MET-D (MET-Distillation), which enhances the second step through a self-distillation training stage that requires no external supervision. MET-D improves macro-F1 over the base model on all three models of different sizes and families (Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B, Gemma3-4B), by an average of 3.71 points on MCLASH and 4.23 on MMoralExceptQA, with a peak MCLASH gain of 12.94 points for Malay on Qwen3-8B. We further reveal that MET-D increases native-language reasoning by 62.13 points on average, and that beneficial grounds differ systematically across cultures. Together, these contributions open the path for culture-aligned, theory-grounded multilingual moral reasoning.

</details>


### [276] [How Temperature Shapes Ideological Discourse in Retrieval-Augmented Generation?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11783)
*Elmira Salari,Hazem Amamou,José Victor de Souza,Shruti Kshirsagar,Maria Nunes Delfino,Anderson Avila*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了检索增强生成（RAG）框架中意识形态偏见对LLM输出的影响。通过对1,117篇COVID-19治疗文章进行词汇多维分析，识别出三种意识形态话语，并将其作为外部知识源进行RAG实验。结果表明，RAG框架会将意识形态话语转移至LLM响应中，且采样温度显著影响这种转移的强度——中等温度下话语对齐最高，低温下则被抑制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注RAG对检索错误的鲁棒性，但忽略了检索材料中的意识形态偏见如何通过RAG框架被传递、放大或抑制，这一问题尚未得到系统研究。

Method: 使用词汇多维分析（LMDA）对1,117篇COVID-19治疗文章进行语料分析，识别三种意识形态话语；将该语料作为RAG的外部知识源；让多个LLM在不同采样温度下回答意识形态问题；从语义和词汇两个维度评估生成文本与意识形态参考文本的相似性。

Result: RAG框架倾向于将意识形态话语转移到LLM响应中；采样温度对转移强度有显著影响：中等温度下话语对齐程度最高，低温下转移被抑制。

Conclusion: RAG框架并非意识形态中立的，它会传递检索材料中的意识形态话语；采样温度是调控话语转移强度的重要因素，适度随机性与检索依据的平衡会导致最强的意识形态对齐。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has been increasingly adopted to reduce hallucinations and strengthen the factual grounding of large language models (LLMs). While robustness to errors in the retrieval process has been explored, the impact of ideological bias on LLM outputs has been overlooked. For instance, if the retrieved material contains ideological positions, the RAG may transmit, amplify, or suppress such ideological discourses in its outputs. In this study, we address this issue by examining the influence of the RAG framework, comprising ideological discourses, in LLM-generated answers. To this end, we applied Lexical Multidimensional Analysis (LMDA) on a corpus of 1,117 COVID-19 treatment articles, identifying three ideological discourses. This corpus is then used as the external knowledge source for the RAG. We assessed several LLMs by having the models answer ideological questions at different sampling temperatures. The generated texts were assessed semantically and lexically based on their similarities with ideological reference texts. Our findings show that the RAG framework is prone to transferring ideological discourses into LLM responses, with sampling temperature having a measurable impact on the strength of this transfer. Discoursive alignment between generated answers and the reference text is highest at moderate temperatures, where models balance stochasticity with retrieval grounding, and drops at low temperatures, indicating that overly deterministic sampling suppresses discourse transfer.

</details>


### [277] [Introducing Human-Centeredness in AI-Assisted Lexicography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11808)
*Antonio San Martin,Catherine Trekker*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个以人为中心的人工智能（HCAI）框架，旨在辅助词典编纂工作。该框架强调AI应增强而非取代词典编纂者，在高度自动化与有意义的人类控制之间取得平衡，同时关注专业自主性、偏见缓解以及工具设计应以词典编纂者需求为中心。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI虽为词典编纂带来巨大机遇，但也引发了对词典编纂者未来角色以及语言文化多样性保护的担忧。现有研究缺乏系统性框架来审视AI在词典学中的整合问题。

Method: 基于HCAI原则及在其他语言领域的应用经验，提出四个相互关联的维度：增强型词典编纂者、AI整合的社会技术语境、偏见问题、以及AI驱动的词典工具设计。

Result: 构建了一个概念框架，主张AI应增强而非替代词典编纂者，强调高水平自动化与有意义的人类控制相结合，并指出应保护专业自主性、减轻AI偏见、以用户需求为导向设计工具。

Conclusion: 该框架为未来AI在词典编纂工作流中的有益整合提供了理论基础，为后续研究奠定了基础。

Abstract: This paper proposes a human-centered artificial intelligence (HCAI) framework for AI-assisted lexicography. While generative AI offers significant opportunities to enhance lexicographic work, it also raises concerns regarding the future role of lexicographers and the preservation of linguistic and cultural diversity. Drawing on HCAI principles and previous applications in other language professions, the paper identifies four interrelated dimensions through which AI integration in lexicography can be understood and critically examined: the augmented lexicographer, the sociotechnical context of AI integration, bias, and the design of AI-powered lexicographic tools. The framework argues that AI should augment rather than replace lexicographers, combining high levels of automation with meaningful human control. It further emphasizes the importance of preserving professional agency, mitigating AI-generated biases, and designing tools around the needs of lexicographers. By doing so, the paper provides a foundation for future research and the beneficial integration of AI into lexicographic workflows.

</details>


### [278] [AdvancedMathBench: A Benchmark Suite for Advanced Mathematical Proof Generation and Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11849)
*Lingkai Kong,Zijian Wu,Yuzhe Gu,Haiteng Zhao,Wenyong Huang,Shuang Sun,Zhicheng Xiong,Xiaotian Zhang,Shuya Zhao,Yan Wang,Disheng Xu,Wenwei Zhang,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AdvancedMathBench基准套件，包含296道高等数学证明题（ProverBench）和888道模型生成证明的验证题（VerifierBench），评估前沿LLM的高等数学推理能力。最佳模型GPT-5.5-xhigh在证明生成上仅得75.8/66.1分，证明验证的Balanced F1仅65.1，表明高等数学推理仍有显著提升空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数学基准覆盖学科有限，且仅关注最终答案正确性或粗粒度判断，缺乏对高等数学领域推理过程有效性的细粒度评估。

Method: 构建ProverBench（296道本科至博士资格考试级别证明题）+ VerifierBench（888道带专家标注的模型生成证明轨迹）；开发基于大规模专家标注训练的自动验证流水线，可输出正确性判定和细粒度错误评估。

Result: GPT-5.5-xhigh在UGD/QE两分项上仅75.8/66.1分；证明验证最佳模型Balanced F1仅65.1，真负率普遍偏低，关键错误检测是主要瓶颈。

Conclusion: 高等数学推理对最先进LLM仍具挑战性，证明生成与证明验证（尤其是错误检测）均有显著提升空间。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on high-school and olympiad-style mathematics, yet their capabilities on advanced mathematics remain poorly understood. Existing benchmarks, however, fall short in both scope and evaluation granularity: they provide limited disciplinary coverage and often rely on final-answer correctness or coarse judgments, leaving the validity of the reasoning process inadequately assessed. To bridge this gap, we introduce AdvancedMathBench, a benchmark suite designed to evaluate advanced mathematical reasoning capabilities. Its core proof-generation benchmark, ProverBench, contains 296 problems spanning undergraduate and doctoral qualifying-exam levels. To provide reliable evaluation of the proofs, we develop a dedicated automatic verification pipeline trained on large-scale expert annotations to produce both correctness verdicts and fine-grained assessments of proof errors, which exhibits strong agreement with human experts on held-out proof trajectories. We further introduce VerifierBench, consisting of 888 model-generated proof trajectories paired with expert ground truth, to evaluate whether models can correctly judge proof validity and provide sound verification rationales. Experiments show that AdvancedMathBench remains challenging for frontier models. On proof generation, the best-performing model, GPT-5.5-xhigh, achieves only 75.8 and 66.1 on the UGD and QE splits, respectively, indicating substantial room for improvement on advanced mathematical proof construction. On proof verification, the best model attains a Balanced F1 of only 65.1, and models generally exhibit low true negative rates, suggesting that critical error detection remains a major bottleneck.

</details>


### [279] [A Durability and Cross-Language Transfer Benchmark for a Validated Teaching-Feedback Classification Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11873)
*Esteban U. Vega Barajas*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文验证了一个教学评价文本分类协议在三种技术代际（稀疏词特征、冻结Transformer、大语言模型）和两种语言（西班牙语、英语）上的鲁棒性，发现2019年的协议框架至今有效，但模型选择属于部署决策而非方法属性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原协议固定于2019年的冻结嵌入技术，限制了其可复用性。需要验证：1) 随着表征方法进步，旧协议是否仍然有竞争力；2) 能否跨语言迁移到英语。

Method: 在原始西班牙语数据上，用三种表征代际（稀疏词特征、冻结Transformer嵌入、提示大语言模型）重新运行协议；将情感分析任务迁移到英语，使用平衡的45,000条评论数据集，并与方面标注的教育数据集进行对照检查。

Result: 2026前沿模型在西班牙语最难任务上取得最高主题F1值，但在情感任务上相对于廉价模型无优势，在英语上也无描述性分离。协议被证明是稳健的。

Conclusion: 原协议具备持久性（durable），模型选择是部署层面的决策，而非方法论本身的属性。

Abstract: Institutions collect far more open-ended teaching-evaluation feedback than they read. A prior study introduced a validated protocol for classifying such comments by thematic category and sentiment, built from a documented annotation guide, an intra-annotator reliability measurement, stratified cross-validation, and a held-out evaluation on a Spanish institutional corpus with a frozen-encoder design. Two questions limit its reuse: whether a protocol fixed to 2019-era frozen embeddings stays competitive as representation methods advance, and whether it transfers to a second language. We re-run it on the original Spanish data across three representation generations, sparse lexical features, frozen transformer embeddings, and prompted large language models, and transfer its sentiment task to English with a balanced 45,000-comment corpus checked against an aspect-labeled education dataset. Treating paired comparisons as descriptive, we find the protocol durable: a 2026 frontier model posts the highest thematic F1 on the hardest Spanish task, yet shows no sentiment advantage over a cheap model and no descriptive separation from it on English, so model choice is a deployment decision, not a property of the method.

</details>


### [280] [Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11881)
*Gabrielle Kaili-May Liu,Areeb Gani,Jacqueline Lu,Jordan Thomas,Mark Steyvers,Arman Cohan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文首次全面综述了大语言模型（LLM）的元认知能力现状，包括评估基准、提升技术及未来研究方向，并附有结构化论文列表。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 元认知是智能的基础组成部分，对学习、问题解决、决策等至关重要，但LLM是否具备元认知能力、如何评估和提升该能力尚不明确，亟需系统梳理。

Method: 通过对现有文献进行全面综述与分类分析，构建元认知研究框架，总结评估基准、技术方法及研究发现。

Result: 呈现了LLM元认知领域的技术进展综述，包括测量与评估方法、能力激发与改进技术，以及当前研究的发现与启示。

Conclusion: 元认知对提升AI系统的能力、可靠性和智能具有重要意义，未来需进一步研究开放问题与挑战，推动有意义的研究与讨论。

Abstract: Metacognition is a foundational component of intelligence critical to effective learning, problem solving, decision-making, communication, and more. In recent years, it has become increasingly recognized as a cornerstone of capable, transparent AI systems. Yet while LLMs have made significant progress across diverse real-world tasks, it is not yet clear when, how, or to what extent they can exhibit or be endowed with effective metacognitive abilities, nor how such abilities can be adapted to advance the fundamental capabilities, reliability, and intelligence of AI systems. This paper bridges this gap by presenting the first comprehensive overview of the current state of knowledge on metacognition for LLMs. We analyze and taxonomize the landscape of this emerging field and summarize recent technical advancements, including methods and benchmarks to measure and evaluate LLMs' metacognitive abilities, techniques to elicit, improve, and apply metacognition in LLMs, and findings and implications of ongoing research. We also discuss applications, open questions and challenges, and promising directions for future work. Our aim is to provide a detailed and up-to-date review of this topic and stimulate meaningful research and discussion. An organized list of papers can be found at https://github.com/yale-nlp/LLM-Metacognition.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [281] [RetroHolmes: When Semantic Plausibility Fails Retrospective Physical Process Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11044)
*Ruoxuan Zhang,Qiyun Zheng,Siyu Wu,Ling Zou,Hongxia Xie,Zhiyu Zhou,Jian-Yu Jiang-Lin,Zihan Li,Zhengguang Wang,Bin Wen,Ling Lo,Jianlong Fu,Meibao Yao,Juncheng Hu,Wen-Huang Cheng*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出回顾式物理过程推理新范式及RetroHolmes基准，发现当前VLM在物理推理中存在系统性失败模式，并验证了基于视觉模拟的中间表征对物理推理的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM评估协议无法检测模型是否真正具备从稀疏观测中推理隐藏物理过程的能力。

Method: 提出回顾式物理过程推理范式，构建RetroHolmes基准（包含成对图像、可达性标签及因果步骤序列），并通过分析合成方法引入视觉模拟作为中间步骤。

Result: SOTA VLM在可达性判断中存在判断偏差，且信念主导（类似大语言模型中的谄媚行为）压倒物理证据。

Conclusion: RetroHolmes具有诊断价值，物理接地中间表征对物理推理至关重要。

Abstract: Humans can infer hidden physical processes from sparse observations, yet current evaluation protocols for Vision Language Models fail to assess whether such physical reasoning is genuinely captured. To address this gap, we introduce Retrospective Physical Process Reasoning, a new evaluation paradigm to reason backward from outcomes under explicit physical constraints. Building on the paradigm, we present RetroHolmes, the first real-world benchmark for Retrospective Physical Process Reasoning, comprising object-centric image pairs annotated with reachability labels and causal step sequences across diverse physical transitions. Using RetroHolmes, we analyze state of the art Vision Language Models and uncover systematic failure modes, including judgment bias in reachability assessment and belief dominance over physical evidence, mirroring sycophancy behavior observed in large language models. We further demonstrate a simple analysis-by-synthesis instantiation with visual simulation as an intermediate step, validating the diagnostic value of RetroHolmes and highlighting the importance of physically grounded intermediate representations for physical reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [282] [Life as Plasmas: Autonomy and Interactivism in-materio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09747)
*Nicolás Hinrichs,Mahault Albarracin,Felipe Engelberger,Leonardo Christov-Moore,Daniel Polani*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出，判断一个材料系统是否为生命候选者，核心在于其物理可容许性（physical admissibility），而非行为、功能架构或计算能力。作者构建了一个框架，将最小自主性（minimal autonomy）视为一种非平衡物质相，并以复杂等离子体（complex plasmas）为例，提出了诊断相空间（diagnostic phase-space）的必要条件：持续自由能吞吐、组织闭合、主动信息维护和调控噪声敏感性。通过对比Bénard对流和数字自复制汤，作者证明等离子体满足所有最小物理自主性的可容许性条件，但不具备开放演化所需的信息遗传，从而划清了物理可容许性与生物学充分性的界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者认为，在讨论生命问题时，现有研究过于关注行为、功能或计算能力，而忽略了更根本的问题：一个材料系统在物理学上是否具备成为生命的可能性。因此，本文旨在建立一套基于物理可容许性的判断框架，以区分“可能生命的物理候选者”与“真正具有生物学意义的生命系统”。

Method: 作者提出诊断相空间（diagnostic phase-space），包含四个必要判据：（1）持续自由能吞吐（sustained free-energy throughput），（2）组织闭合（organizational closure），（3）主动信息维护（active information maintenance），（4）调控噪声敏感性（regulated noise sensitivity）。通过对比三类系统：Bénard对流（驱动基线，缺乏闭合）、数字自复制汤（具有信息遗传但缺乏物理闭合）和复杂等离子体，来定位相空间边界。

Result: 复杂等离子体满足所有四个诊断判据，即具有最小物理自主性（minimal physical autonomy），但缺乏开放演化（open-ended evolution）所需的信息遗传（informational heredity）。这表明等离子体是“物理上可容许的生命候选”，但并非生物学意义上的生命。

Conclusion: 物理可容许性（physical admissibility）是判断生命候选者的首要条件，但不等同于生物学充分性（biological sufficiency）。等离子体作为非生物系统，为理解最小自主性提供了有价值的物理范例，同时也为后续研究机器意识、人工生命等问题划定了更清晰的概念边界。

Abstract: When is a material system a candidate for life at all? We argue that this question is prior to behavior, functional architecture, or computational capacity, and that at root it is one of physical admissibility. We develop a framework in which minimal autonomy, taken in the interactivist sense of normativity grounded in self-maintaining far-from-equilibrium organization, corresponds to a distinct non-equilibrium phase of matter, and we take complex plasmas, a physical and non-biological system, as its in-materio exemplar. We formalize a diagnostic phase-space whose criteria (sustained free-energy throughput, organizational closure, active information maintenance, and regulated noise sensitivity) constitute necessary conditions for life-attribution. We instantiate the diagnostics across contrasting systems and fix the boundaries of the phase space via Bénard convection as a driven baseline lacking closure, and a digital self-replicating soup that carries measured informational heredity while its physical closure remains a structural zero. We demonstrate that plasmas satisfy every admissibility condition for minimal physical autonomy while carrying none of the informational heredity that open-ended evolution requires, sharpening the distinction between physical admissibility and biological sufficiency, and bounding downstream questions of machine sentience.

</details>


### [283] [Adaptive Search in Collatz Exponent-Code Space via 2-adic and 3-adic Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10041)
*Oliver Kramer*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文基于加速映射的有限指数编码，研究了Collatz猜想的符号搜索空间，提出了“2-3-无穷诊断”框架，并通过实验验证了自适应进化搜索在有限长度上的优化效果，但明确指出该方法并非验证猜想，而是用于研究指数编码空间中的障碍结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为Collatz猜想提供一种符号化的诊断方法，通过指数编码空间研究反例结构，而非直接验证猜想。

Method: 构建基于有限指数编码的符号搜索空间，定义“2-3-无穷诊断”指标（包括实漂移、2-adic起始代表、3-adic终点代表）；采用随机临界编码、机械临界编码和自适应进化搜索三种策略，在长度100、200、400下进行实验。

Result: 每个固定正整数生成的无穷编码具有渐近消失的2-adic和3-adic残差率；自适应搜索在有限长度上改善了权衡，但所有方法仍保持明显正残差率。

Conclusion: 该框架并非Collatz猜想的验证方法，而是一种用于在指数编码空间中研究障碍结构的符号诊断工具。

Abstract: We study a symbolic search space for the Collatz conjecture based on finite exponent codes of the accelerated map. Each code records the number of divisions by two after every 3n + 1 step and determines three quantities: real drift, a 2-adic start representative, and a 3-adic endpoint representative. Their combination defines the 2-3-infinity diagnostic. Counterexample-like codes should exhibit near-critical drift, small 2-adic start representatives, and endpoints compatible with growth on the scale of (3/2)^k. We prove that every infinite code generated by a fixed positive integer has asymptotically vanishing 2-adic and 3-adic residue rates. Experiments with random critical codes, mechanical critical codes, and adaptive evolutionary search at lengths 100, 200, and 400 show that adaptive search improves finite-length trade-offs, while all methods retain clearly positive residue rates. The proposed framework is not a verification method for the Collatz conjecture, but a symbolic diagnostic approach for investigating obstruction structures in exponent-code space.

</details>


### [284] [Efficient and Robust Spiking Neural Networks for sEMG-Based Muscle Fatigue Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11065)
*Kaiwen Tang,Jiaqi Dong,Zhanglu Yan,Weng-Fai Wong*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的节能型肌肉疲劳检测框架，结合量化兼容训练方案（SDH），在降低能耗高达201.77倍的同时，在多种噪声条件下保持或超越现有基线模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度学习模型计算成本高、依赖大规模数据，不适合用于可穿戴设备上的肌肉疲劳实时检测。

Method: 提出基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的节能框架，利用稀疏事件驱动计算和时序建模；引入量化兼容训练方案（SDH），结合多个正则化项提升噪声鲁棒性。

Result: 在两个公开sEMG数据集上评估，量化SNN在多种噪声条件下匹配或超越强基线，能耗降低高达201.77倍。

Conclusion: 所提框架在低功耗可穿戴系统的实时部署方面具有巨大潜力。

Abstract: Detecting muscle fatigue via surface electromyography (sEMG) is essential for applications in sports, rehabilitation, and wearable health monitoring. Accurate and timely detection of fatigue is crucial for preventing injuries, optimizing physical performance, and ensuring user safety during prolonged activity. However, existing deep learning models are often unsuitable for this task due to their high computational cost and dependence on large-scale data. In this work, we propose an energy-efficient framework for muscle fatigue detection based on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), which exploit sparse, event-driven computation and temporal modeling. We further introduce a quantization-compatible training scheme (SDH) that combines multiple regularization terms to improve robustness under noisy conditions. Evaluated on two public sEMG datasets against a broad set of baselines and under seven noise conditions including physically motivated perturbations, our quantized SNNs match or exceed strong baselines while remaining more stable under diverse noise and reducing estimated energy consumption by up to 201.77x. These results demonstrate the framework's strong potential for real-time deployment in low-power wearable systems.

</details>


### [285] [Backpropagation as a Nilpotent Linear System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11289)
*Ahmed Boughammoura*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出F-adjoint框架，将深度网络的反向传播重新表述为全局线性系统(I-𝒃)𝑿 = 𝑮，证明𝒃是严格块上三角且幂零的算子，从而将反向传播从算法提升为全局幂零算子理论，并形式化分析了F对称性、残差网络和迁移学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统反向传播被视为计算图的程序性遍历，缺乏全局数学结构。作者希望将反向传播从算法过程提升为统一的算子理论，揭示其深层代数本质。

Method: 提出F-adjoint框架，将L层前馈网络的反向传播重写为全局线性系统；证明全局反向算子𝒃是严格块上三角且幂零（指数≤L）；通过Neumann级数展开精确终止于L项，揭示反向传播等价于块回代。

Result: 严格证明了反向传播的幂零算子本质；形式化了F对称性（正交权重矩阵为例）；揭示了纯前馈网络的单路径塌缩现象及残差网络的梯度高速公路机制；推导了迁移学习中的梯度截断原理。

Conclusion: 该框架将反向传播从算法提升为全局幂零算子理论，为理解深度学习中的梯度传播机制提供了统一的数学语言和新的理论视角。

Abstract: Backpropagation is the computational engine of deep learning, yet its mathematical structure is typically treated as a procedural traversal of computational graphs. We present a global operator theory of the \emph{F-adjoint} framework, which reformulates the layerwise backward recursion of an $L$-depth feedforward network into a single linear system $(I-\cB)\Xs=\bG$, where $\bG$ is a source vector. We prove that the global backward operator $\cB$ is strictly block upper-triangular and nilpotent of index at most $L$. This nilpotency guarantees the exact termination of the Neumann series solution after at most $L$ terms, revealing classical backpropagation to be mathematically equivalent to block back-substitution on an upper bidiagonal system. We formalise \emph{F-symmetry} -- the condition in which the backward pass perfectly mirrors the forward pass -- identifying orthogonal weight matrices as canonical examples. Through worked numerical examples, we demonstrate how this operator perspective exposes the single-path collapse of strictly feedforward networks and its breakdown in residual architectures. Finally, we leverage this compositional structure to rigorously derive the mechanics of residual networks (gradient highways) and transfer learning (gradient truncation). This framework elevates backpropagation from an algorithmic recipe to a global nilpotent-operator formulation.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [286] [Fundamental market design as a layer of AI-agent alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09702)
*Omar Inverso,Emilio Tuosto,Dragisa Zunic*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出AI代理在金融市场的对齐不仅依赖代理本身，还依赖于市场核心（即订单交互的规则系统）的设计。主张将市场基础设施视为AI对齐的一个层面，通过形式化建模实现透明箱模型，从而在机制层面抑制不良行为、奖励期望行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI对齐研究主要集中在代理层面，忽视了市场基础设施（如订单匹配规则）对代理行为的影响。自适应或AI代理会学习机制所奖励的行为（如速度、延迟、流动性提供或操纵），这些行为是代理-机制系统涌现的结果，而非仅代理属性。

Method: 采用理论计算机科学的严谨方法对市场核心（订单进入、交互、匹配、持久化和稳定的规则系统）进行形式化建模，建立透明箱模型。将交易场所视为一个结合常驻订单与传入订单流的计算过程，探索其核心的计算模型。

Result: 提出了将市场设计视为AI代理对齐的一个新层面，形成了"市场核心形式化建模"的分析框架，使核心属性可被形式化规定和推理，支持激励导向分析。

Conclusion: 透明的市场核心形式化模型能够支持激励导向的机制设计，使得期望行为在结构上被偏好、不良行为更难维持。这对于由自适应或AI代理参与的市场尤为重要。

Abstract: This paper argues that AI-agent alignment in markets should not be understood only as a property of agents, but also as a property of the interaction infrastructure in which agents act. In financial markets, this infrastructure is the market core: the rule system that determines how orders enter, interact, match, persist, and stabilize. If this fundamental interaction layer allows or rewards undesired behaviour, then higher-level alignment of agents may be insufficient.
  We propose to view fundamental market design as a layer of AI-agent alignment. Alongside the important work of computational economics in modelling agents, strategies, and learning, we focus on a complementary but more fundamental layer: the formal modelling of the market core itself. Market design, especially at the level of the core mechanism, can benefit from a rigour characteristic of theoretical computer science. This gives a transparent-box model of the market, whose core properties can be formally specified and reasoned about. It also lets us treat the trading venue not as a static order book, but as a computational process combining resident orders with incoming order flow, and ask which computational model, perhaps yet unknown, naturally lies at its core.
  This perspective is especially relevant for markets populated by adaptive or AI agents. Such agents may learn what the mechanism rewards, including speed, delay, liquidity provision, or manipulation. These behaviours are not only properties of individual agents, but may emerge from the agent-mechanism system. We therefore argue that transparent formal models of market cores can support incentive-oriented analysis and the design of mechanisms in which desirable behaviours are structurally favoured and undesirable behaviours are harder to sustain.

</details>


### [287] [How to program a never-losing chess engine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09715)
*Fabio Romano*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出基于图论的双人完全信息博弈模型（如国际象棋、跳棋），并设计了回溯极小化极大算法来寻找完美游戏策略（游戏解法），以及一个变体算法用于寻找永不失败（至少达成平局）的策略。论文重点在于理论可行性的形式化证明，而非实际计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者旨在从理论层面证明：对于完全信息的双人零和博弈（如国际象棋、跳棋），存在一种形式化的数学方法能够找到完美策略或永不失败策略，尽管实际计算可能不可行，但理论上的可证明性本身具有重要价值。

Method: 1. 基于图论构建双人完全信息博弈的数学模型，将游戏状态表示为图的节点，合法走法表示为边。2. 提出回溯极小化极大算法来搜索完美游戏策略（即确定游戏在双方最优玩法下的确定性结果）。3. 提出该算法的变体，用于寻找一个更弱的条件：存在一种策略使得玩家永不失败（至少总能达到平局）。

Result: 理论上证明了：通过回溯极小化极大算法及其变体，可以在形式化模型中找到完美游戏策略以及永不失败策略。论文明确承认在实际中这些算法可能无法在短时间内求解复杂游戏，但成功建立了理论上的可行性。

Conclusion: 从理论计算的角度，完全信息双人博弈的完美策略和永不失败策略是存在且可形式化证明的，这为博弈论和人工智能中关于游戏可解性的理论奠定了基础，尽管实际应用仍面临计算复杂度的挑战。

Abstract: This article proposes a model, based on graph theory, to represent a variety of two-player games of perfect information, such as chess and checkers. I then provide a backtracking minimax algorithm to find, if it exists, a perfect game strategy (game resolution), and subsequently a variant of that algorithm which is required to determine a weaker condition: the existence of a strategy to never lose (always reach at least a draw).
  Of course, this does not mean that in practice the algorithm can find such a strategy in a short time, but here we are only concerned with formally proving that this is possible, at least theoretically.

</details>


### [288] [Eigenmanifold in Game: Evidence from human continuous strategy game experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09782)
*Wang Zhijian,Yao Qinmei,Shan Lixia,Wang Yijia,Zhang Chuchen*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 该论文通过人类被试实验数据验证了演化博弈动力学中的特征流形线性叠加假说在连续策略博弈中同样成立。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证"博弈稳态系统的动态结构由特征流形线性叠加表征"这一假说是否同样适用于连续策略博弈，由于此前该假说仅在离散策略博弈中得到广泛支持。

Method: 利用人类被试在连续策略博弈中的实验数据，对特征流形线性叠加假说进行实证检验。

Result: 实验数据显著支持该假说在连续策略博弈中也成立。

Conclusion: 特征流形线性叠加假说不仅在离散策略博弈中成立，在连续策略博弈中同样得到实验支持，表明该假说具有更广泛的适用性。

Abstract: In evolutionary game dynamics, there exists a hypothesis, which states that, the dynamic structure of the game's steady -- state system is characterized by the linear superposition of eigenmanifolds, which depends specifically on the eigenvector structure at the Nash equilibrium and is ultimately governed by the game dynamics equations. This hypotheses has been supported widely in discrete strategy game. In continuous -- strategy game, using experimental data from human -- subject games, this paper finds that the hypothesis is supported in significant, too.

</details>


### [289] [Threshold Dynamics and Correlated Prophet Inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09887)
*José Correa,Maximilian Fichtl,Reda Jlibene,Rida Laraki,Vasilis Livanos,Kevin Schewior,Victor Verdugo*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究两种潜在状态相关模型下的先知不等式。在共同基模型（Z+X_i）中，单阈值算法的竞争比可达0.4（随机化）或0.381（确定性），且证明了上下界（0.41与0.475）。核心贡献是提出了一个微分方程框架来刻画奖励动态。共同积模型（Z·X_i）中则证明了不可能获得超过1/n的竞争比。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有先知不等式大多假设输入随机变量独立，限制了实际应用。为突破这一局限，本文研究由潜在状态变量Z引起的两种相关模型。

Method: 提出新的分析框架，通过微分方程刻画单阈值算法在最优情形下的期望奖励，该方程以最大值的分布为参数，具有闭式解形式，并统一了已知的单阈值先知不等式。

Result: 共同基模型：确定性算法竞争比0.381，随机化算法提升至0.4；下界0.41，上界0.475，排除达到1/2的可能性。共同积模型：竞争比不可能超过1/n。

Conclusion: 提出的微分方程框架为单阈值先知不等式提供了统一且简洁的最优性条件，同时也揭示了相关性对算法性能的根本限制。

Abstract: Prophet inequalities have become a central tool for analyzing the performance of online algorithms. However, most existing results assume that input random variables are independent, which limits their applicability. Motivated by this gap, we study prophet inequalities under two correlation models induced by a latent state of the world variable $Z$. In the common-base model, the algorithm observes the sequence $Z+X_1,\dots,Z+X_n$. We analyze single-threshold algorithms with the constraint that they always accept the final item, guaranteeing a reward of at least $Z$. When $Z$ is chosen adversarially, we characterize the optimal deterministic algorithm of this form, achieving a competitive ratio of $0.381$. We then show that randomizing improves the guarantee to $0.4$. By a minimax argument, the same ratio is achievable when $Z$ is random.
  We depart from standard techniques by establishing a stronger lower bound of $0.41$ and an upper bound of $0.475$, ruling out the possibility that this class of algorithms attains the $1/2$ ratio known for independent inputs. The core technical contribution is a new analytical framework that captures the reward dynamics of single-threshold algorithms. We introduce a differential equation characterizing the expected reward of a threshold in the worst-case instance, parameterized by the distribution of the maximum. This equation admits a closed-form and unifies known single-threshold prophet inequalities, yielding a simple threshold-optimality condition applicable to the common-base model.
  Finally, we study the common-scale model, where inputs take the form $Z\cdot X_1,\dots,Z\cdot X_n$. We show that this minimal multiplicative correlation yields strong impossibility results: no algorithm can achieve a competitive ratio exceeding $1/n$.

</details>


### [290] [Implicit Midpoint Gradient Descent: Fast and Learning rate free convergence for Zero-Sum Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09950)
*Gaoqi Xue,James P. Bailey*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对无约束双线性零和博弈，提出了隐式中点梯度下降法，该方法是连续时间"跟随正则化领导者"动态通过辛积分方法离散化得到的。理论证明该方法兼具有界轨道、快速遍历收敛到纳什均衡、以及不依赖于学习率的稳定性保证，这是传统在线优化方法首次同时实现这些性质。实验表明该方法显著优于乐观梯度下降和交替梯度下降等标准方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无约束双线性零和博弈是在线学习、对抗优化和多智能体决策中的基础模型，现有方法（如乐观梯度下降、交替梯度下降）在同时保证有界轨道、快速遍历收敛和学习率无关的稳定性方面存在不足。

Method: 从连续时间"跟随正则化领导者"（FTRL）动力学出发，利用辛积分方法进行离散化，推导出隐式中点梯度下降规则。这是一种隐式的、保辛结构的优化算法。

Result: 理论结果表明隐式中点梯度下降同时具有三个关键性质：有界轨道、快速遍历收敛到纳什均衡、以及不依赖于学习率的稳定性保证。实验证明该方法显著优于乐观梯度下降和交替梯度下降。

Conclusion: 隐式中点梯度下降是首个同时具有有界轨道、快速遍历收敛和学习率无关稳定性保证的传统在线优化方法，为无约束双线性零和博弈提供了更优的求解方案。

Abstract: We study unconstrained bilinear zero-sum games, a fundamental model in online learning, adversarial optimization, and multi-agent decision-making. We introduce the implicit midpoint gradient descent rule, which we derive from continuous-time follow-the-regularized leader dynamics via symplectic integration methods. We prove that implicit midpoint gradient descent inherits several powerful properties from the continuous-time dynamics, including bounded orbits, fast ergodic convergence to Nash equilibria, and learning-rate-independent stability guarantees. This is the first traditional online optimization approach to simultaneously achieve these properties in unconstrained bilinear zero-sum games. Finally, computational experiments demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms the standard methods, optimistic and alternating gradient descent.

</details>


### [291] [A Knowledge-Based Multi-Agent Framework for Security Control Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09954)
*Carolina Fernández-Martínez,Shuaib Siddiqui,Vanesa Daza*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于博弈论和多智能体影响图的安全决策支持系统，通过无遗憾在线学习，用约65%的安全控制实现99%的安全覆盖，解决了IT环境安全加固中缺乏专家知识的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 团队缺乏网络安全专业知识时，IT本地环境的安全加固任务十分艰巨，需要一种嵌入专家知识的决策支持系统来辅助用户。

Method: 构建一个基于多智能体影响图(MAID)模型的非零和同时博弈，覆盖7个安全维度，利用无遗憾在线学习算法，基于整合的信息安全和学术数据集推荐安全控制子族。

Result: 使用约65%的可软件实现安全控制时，满意度覆盖率达到99%，运行时间1.2-35.7秒；使用约29%的控制时，覆盖率为73%-77%，运行时间0.8-13.8秒。

Conclusion: 提出的安全DSS能在显著减少安全控制数量的情况下实现高覆盖率，平衡了安全资源的过度配置与配置不足问题，具备良好的性能和准确性。

Abstract: Hardening IT on-premises environments can be a daunting task for teams without access to adequate cybersecurity expertise. In this regard, Decision Support Systems (DSS) with embedded expert knowledge can assist users by guiding them with security recommendations to meet their objectives. This work proposes a Security DSS that recommends security control sub-families given minimal user requirements indicating coverage of different security dimensions. It leverages a curated, unified dataset from both well-known Information Security (InfoSec) and academic sources. This DSS is defined as a non-zero-sum, simultaneous game that is grounded in a Multi-Agent Influence Diagram (MAID) model and explores the decision space over 7 security dimensions or agents, using no-regret online learning to ultimately find the security control sub-families that best fit the requirements while incurring minimal under- and over-provisioning of security resources. This work was validated in terms of performance and accuracy, among others, for varying dataset sizes. It shows exceptional satisfaction coverage results of 99% when using as little as ~65% of the SW-implementable security controls, running in 1.2-35.7 seconds; and more moderate coverage results of 73%-77% when using ~29% of the controls, resolving in 0.8-13.8 seconds.

</details>


### [292] [Beyond Bayesian Nash: Learning Minimax-Regret Equilibria for Adversarial Team Games under Asymmetric Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09993)
*Naman Aggarwal,Jonathan P. How*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为概率鲁棒最小最大遗憾均衡（PR-MRE）的新均衡概念，结合分布自由鲁棒性与概率信息，用于处理非对称信息下的对抗性团队博弈（ATGs），并通过鲁棒双Oracle框架PRMRE-PSRO实现深度强化学习求解，实验表明其在隐藏类型下的最差情况性能显著优于风险中性均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险中性均衡（如贝叶斯纳什均衡）对类型分布偏移敏感，而分布鲁棒方法仅能在预设模糊集内提供保证，无法应对对手的策略性欺骗与类型分布操纵。

Method: 提出PR-MRE均衡概念，在高置信度类型子集上最小化最差遗憾；将正规型贝叶斯博弈中的PR-MRE建模为鲁棒双线性规划，推导出可处理的半定松弛；将该松弛适配为鲁棒双Oracle元求解器PRMRE-PSRO，通过深度强化学习最佳响应进行近似PR-MRE策略的群体学习。

Result: 在图结构对抗性团队博弈实验中，与风险中性均衡解相比，PR-MRE在隐藏类型的策略性分布偏移下发现了具有显著更优最差情况性能的策略，表现出更强的鲁棒行为。

Conclusion: PR-MRE在避免完全分布自由方法的保守性的同时，提供了对抗类型概率质量策略性再分配的防护，是一种更鲁棒的均衡概念。

Abstract: Adversarial team games (ATGs) with asymmetric information, such as adversarial path-finding, goal search, and reachability games on graphs, require strategies that are robust to hidden opponent types, such as a hidden goal flag, and to deception.
