Under asymmetric information, deception is seen as strategic shifts in the type distribution such that the omniscient opponent can collude with Nature and condition its play on the observed type. Existing risk-neutral solution concepts, such as Bayesian Nash equilibrium (BNE), are sensitive to distribution shifts, while distributionally robust approaches provide guarantees only within a prescribed ambiguity set. To address these limitations, we introduce Probabilistically Robust Minimax-Regret Equilibrium (PR-MRE), a novel equilibrium concept that combines the distribution-free robustness of minimax-regret reasoning with probabilistic information from a nominal type distribution. PR-MRE minimizes worst-case regret over a high-confidence subset of the type space, providing protection against strategic redistribution of probability mass while avoiding the conservatism of fully distribution-free approaches. We show that, for normal-form Bayesian games, PR-MRE can be formulated as a robust bilinear program and derive a tractable semidefinite relaxation. We then adapt this relaxation into a novel meta-solver within a robust double-oracle framework, PRMRE-PSRO, enabling population-based learning of approximate PR-MRE strategies via deep reinforcement learning best responses. Experiments on graph-structured adversarial team games demonstrate that PR-MRE discovers strategies with substantially improved worst-case performance across hidden types compared to risk-neutral equilibrium solutions, resulting in more robust behavior under strategic distribution shifts.

</details>


### [293] [Optimal Subsidy Bounds for Goods and Chores: One Dollar Each Suffices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10089)
*Xinhang Lu,Simon Mackenzie,Mashbat Suzuki*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在混合物品（既有好事也有坏事）的公平分配问题，证明通过引入最多每人1美元补贴即可实现无嫉妒分配，且总补贴不超过n-1美元，并给出多项式时间算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在不可分割物品的公平分配中，无嫉妒分配通常不存在。引入可分割的"钱"作为补贴可以恢复无嫉妒性，但需要确定最小补贴额度。

Method: 假设每个物品的效用或负效用有界于1，证明通过每人最多1美元补贴即可保证无嫉妒分配的存在，且该界是紧的。

Result: 每人最多1美元补贴足以保证无嫉妒分配，总补贴最多n-1美元（至少一人无需补贴），且可在多项式时间内计算。

Conclusion: 给出了混合物品（好事与坏事并存）场景下，通过有限货币补贴实现无嫉妒分配的最优上界和高效算法。

Abstract: We study the fair allocation of $m$ indivisible items to $n$ agents with additive utilities. In our setting, each indivisible item may be a good, yielding non-negative utility to some agents, or a chore, yielding negative utility to others. Whilst envy-free allocations may not exist in the indivisible-items setting, envy-freeness can be achieved if some amount of divisible good (i.e., \emph{money}) is introduced. When each item's utility or disutility is bounded by one, we show that a subsidy of at most one dollar per agent suffices to guarantee the existence of an envy-free allocation, and that this bound is tight. Moreover, such an allocation can be computed in polynomial time. Since at least one agent need not receive any subsidy, our results imply that a total subsidy of at most $n-1$ dollars suffices to ensure envy-freeness.

</details>


### [294] [Best-of-Both-Worlds Fairness for Mixed Goods and Chores](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10232)
*Haris Aziz,Xiaolin Bu,Xinhang Lu,Simon Mackenzie,Mashbat Suzuki,Biaoshuai Tao,Toby Walsh*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究在混合物品（同时存在正效用物品和负效用物品）环境下，如何实现事前无嫉妒（ex-ante EF）与事后EF1（最多一件物品的无嫉妒）同时成立的随机分配方案。主要成果是通过一种新的概率型Hall矩阵分解方法，结合Sion极小极大定理和偏置流网络，证明了这种最佳双赢分配的存在性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公平分配问题中，物品可能对某些代理人是正效用（goods）、对另一些是负效用（chores），现有研究通常将两者分开处理，缺乏统一框架。作者希望在这种混合物品环境下，同时满足事前期望公平（ex-ante fairness）和事后近似公平（ex-post approximate fairness）这两种不同层面的公平性要求。

Method: 提出了一个新颖的概率型Hall矩阵分解方法，将物品的分数分配（goods和chores）进行关联。关键技术包括：(1) 利用Sion极小极大定理处理连续最小最大对偶问题；(2) 设计偏置流网络（biased flow networks）来构造具体的分解方案。

Result: 证明了在混合物品（goods和chores共存）的公平分配问题中，可以实现事前无嫉妒（ex-ante EF）与事后EF1（最多一件物品的无嫉妒）同时成立的随机分配方案。

Conclusion: 该工作首次在混合物品环境下建立了ex-ante EF与ex-post EF1同时成立的可能性，通过概率型Hall分解和偏置流网络等创新技术，为混合物品公平分配提供了理论保证。这种"最佳双赢"视角有助于弥合随机分配与确定性分配之间的公平性差距。

Abstract: We study the fundamental problem of fairly dividing indivisible items among agents with additive utilities. In our model, an item can be a good yielding non-negative utilities to some agents and simultaneously a chore yielding negative utilities to others. We take the best-of-both-worlds perspective and our goal is to construct a randomized allocation that is exactly fair ex ante while also being supported on ex post approximately fair allocations. The fairness notions examined in this paper are envy-freeness (EF) and its well-known relaxation envy-freeness up to one item (EF1). Our main result is that ex-ante EF and ex-post EF1 can be achieved simultaneously. To achieve this, we introduce a novel probabilistic Hall-type matrix decomposition that intricately correlates the fractional assignments of goods and chores. We resolve this decomposition problem by combining continuous minimax duality -- via Sion's minimax theorem -- with carefully designed biased flow networks.

</details>


### [295] [Double elimination formats for a 64-team FIFA World Cup](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10422)
*César Rennó-Costa*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文探讨了FIFA世界杯扩军至64队后的赛制问题，提出双败淘汰制相比传统小组赛+淘汰赛制能消除无关比赛、增加强强对话，但面临赛程复杂和队伍比赛场次不均等运营挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界杯扩军至48队后，进一步扩至64队的讨论日益增多，但传统赛制在规模扩大时会加剧比赛缺乏竞争意义、顶级对决概率降低等结构性问题，亟需探索替代方案。

Method: 通过对比分析双败淘汰制与传统小组赛+淘汰赛制，从竞争公平性、比赛质量和赛程可行性三个维度进行评估。

Result: 双败淘汰制能消除数学上无意义的比赛，显著增加高水平对决的频次，但会带来赛程复杂度提高、各队比赛场次不对称等运营难题。

Conclusion: 大型体育赛事的持续扩军需要转向非传统赛制范式以维护竞争完整性，双败淘汰制虽有优势但需配合相应的后勤调整。

Abstract: The recent expansion of the FIFA World Cup to 48 teams has prompted discussions regarding a potential further increase to a 64-team format. Scaling the traditional tournament architecture (a round-robin group stage followed by a knockout phase) to 64 teams exacerbates existing structural flaws, notably increasing the frequency of matches lacking competitive relevance and reducing the probability of fixtures between top-ranked contenders. This paper investigates alternative tournament designs by analyzing double-elimination structures for a 64-team mega-event. We evaluate the proposed formats based on competitive fairness, match quality, and scheduling feasibility. Our analysis demonstrates that a double-elimination format eliminates mathematically irrelevant matches and significantly increases the frequency of high-profile games. However, these benefits introduce complex operational constraints, including heightened scheduling complexity and an asymmetric distribution of matches per team, which require specific logistical adjustments. Ultimately, our findings suggest that the continuous scaling of mega-sporting events necessitates a paradigm shift toward non-traditional tournament designs to preserve competitive integrity.

</details>


### [296] [Which Wallpaper Groups Arise from Tiled Games?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10552)
*Matthew Fried*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明所有十七种壁纸群都能作为双矩阵博弈的对称群实现，并通过图论与博弈论两条计算路径给出了显式构造与验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究离散对称群中哪些可以作为策略互动的对称群出现，填补了博弈论与晶体对称群之间的理论空白。

Method: 用双矩阵博弈的支撑复形平铺平面，通过受控边界规则连接，构造出覆盖空间；分别从图论（商覆盖精确还原瓷砖）和博弈论（线性时间检测重复策略覆盖、折叠均衡）两条路径计算验证。

Result: 所有十七种壁纸群均有显式生成元（经机器验证的图自同构）；十三种对称群在平移包含完整瓷砖格时实现，四种非对称群在平移格指数恰好为2时实现；多矩阵覆盖直接承载对称性，装饰细化的博弈自同构群精确等于环面壁纸群。

Conclusion: 对称性可以直接嵌入博弈结构，任何壁纸对称子群都将均衡折叠为不动点问题，为博弈均衡的对称性分析提供了完整的群论框架。

Abstract: Which discrete symmetry groups can arise from strategic interaction? We tile the plane with copies of a bimatrix game's support complex, joined by controlled boundary rules, and show that all seventeen wallpaper groups act on the resulting covers: explicit generators, each a machine-verified graph automorphism, every realization certified as the exact toroidal quotient, with types identified by a crystallographic recognizer in exact rational arithmetic and cross-validated in GAP. A three-line lemma turns the classical symmorphic/non-symmorphic distinction into a lattice classification: realizations whose translations contain the full tile lattice exist precisely for the thirteen symmorphic groups, and the four non-symmorphic groups are realized at translation-lattice index exactly two, the minimum possible: the tile is the glide's half-step.
  Two computational tracks accompany the construction. On the graph track, quotienting a straight cover by its translations recovers the tile exactly, $\beq(M/\calT)=\beq(K)$, and swap boundaries add exactly $\binom m2$, independent of payoffs and of cover size. On the game track, detecting a duplicated-strategy cover is a linear-time payoff scan, one tile solution folds to a full translation orbit of cover equilibria, and the tiled correlated-equilibrium system has dimension exactly $r(d-q)+q$, with expansion impossible. The polymatrix cover then carries the symmetry outright: every wallpaper action, glides included, is a group of genuine game automorphisms, equilibria collapse along any symmetry subgroup to a folded fixed-point problem, and a decorated refinement has game automorphism group exactly the toroidal wallpaper group.

</details>


### [297] [Representation theorems for actual and alpha powers over general concurrent game frames without assuming independence of agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10567)
*Zixuan Chen,Fengkui Ju,Thomas Agotnes*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究一般化并发博弈框架中两种联盟权力（alpha权力和实际权力）的邻域框架表示问题，证明在不假设主体独立性的四类框架中，两种权力均可由四类对应的邻域框架表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 并发博弈框架是策略推理逻辑的标准语义框架，其中存在两种联盟权力概念：alpha权力和实际权力。近期工作将标准框架中的三个结构性假设（序列性、主体独立性、确定性）分离，得到八类一般化框架。本文旨在探究这些一般化框架中权力概念的邻域框架表示问题。

Method: 通过形式化定义和分析，分别针对实际权力和alpha权力，在不假设主体独立性的四类一般化并发博弈框架与其对应的四类邻域框架之间建立表示定理。

Result: 对于实际权力和alpha权力，不假设主体独立性的四类一般化并发博弈框架均可由四类对应的邻域框架表示。

Conclusion: 本文建立了不假设主体独立性的四类一般化并发博弈框架与四类邻域框架之间的表示对应关系，为两种联盟权力的逻辑研究提供了更简洁的语义基础。

Abstract: Concurrent game frames are a standard semantic framework for logics of strategic reasoning. Two notions of coalition power can be derived from such frames: alpha powers and actual powers. An alpha power of a coalition is a set of possible futures such that the coalition has an action that forces the resulting future to lie in that set. An actual power of a coalition is a set of possible futures satisfying the following condition: the coalition has an action such that (1) the action forces the resulting future to lie in the set, and (2) every future in the set is compatible with that action. Recent generalizations of concurrent game frames separate three structural assumptions built into the standard model: seriality, independence of agents, and determinism. This yields eight classes of general concurrent game frames. In this paper, we prove that for actual powers, the four classes of general concurrent game frames, where independence of agents is not assumed, are representable by four corresponding classes of neighborhood frames. Building on this result, we show that for alpha powers, the same four classes of general concurrent game frames are likewise representable by four corresponding classes of neighborhood frames.

</details>


### [298] [The Complexity of Computing Coarse Correlated Equilibria in Markov Games with a Single Controller](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10897)
*Gabriele Farina,Andreas Kontogiannis,Ioannis Panageas,Vasilis Pollatos*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明了在两人单控制器随机博弈中计算平稳马尔可夫粗相关均衡(CCE)是PPAD完全的，即使是在固定折扣因子和二元动作的设置下。这是首个不依赖均衡坍塌现象或纳什结构来证明CCE计算困难性的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前工作通过回合制构造证明了两人一般和随机博弈中计算平稳马尔可夫CCE的PPAD困难性，但这种构造中每个状态由单一玩家控制且控制权交替出现，导致所有CCE坍塌为纳什均衡。当单一玩家控制所有状态转移时，这种坍塌现象不再发生，问题是否仍然困难尚未解决。本文旨在回答这一开放问题。

Method: 构造了单控制器博弈中的元件（gadgets），其局部激励约束即使在强相关平稳策略下也能强制求解Pure-Circuit实例，从而将Pure-Circuit问题归约到单控制器随机博弈的CCE计算问题。对于完美概念（每个状态都有均衡约束），在常数精度下无条件成立；对于非完美概念，在PCP-for-PPAD假设下证明常数精度困难性，并无条件证明逆多项式精度困难性。

Result: 证明了计算近似平稳马尔可夫CCE在两人单控制器随机博弈中是PPAD完全的。这是首个不依赖均衡坍塌现象或通过纳什结构来证明CCE计算困难性的结果。

Conclusion: 即使在没有均衡坍塌现象的单控制器设置中，计算CCE仍然是PPAD困难的，这表明CCE的计算复杂性与纳什均衡不同，具有其固有的困难性来源。

Abstract: We study the complexity of computing stationary Markov coarse correlated equilibria (CCE) in discounted single-controller stochastic (Markov) games [PR81, FV97], a fundamental subclass of stochastic games in which all players may affect rewards, but only one player controls the state transitions. Prior work [DGZ23, JMS23, HN25] established PPAD-hardness for computing stationary Markov CCE in two-player general-sum stochastic games via turn-based constructions in which each state is controlled by a single player, with control alternating across states. This structure forces every Markov CCE to collapse to a Nash equilibrium (NE), so hardness for NE transfers immediately to CCE. It remained open whether hardness persists when a single player controls all transitions--a setting where no such collapse occurs.
  We resolve this question: computing an approximate stationary Markov CCE in two-player single-controller stochastic games is PPAD-complete, even with a fixed discount factor and binary actions. For the perfect notion (equilibrium constraints at every state) this holds unconditionally at constant accuracy; for the non-perfect notion, we prove constant-accuracy hardness under the PCP-for-PPAD hypothesis [BPR16, DFHM26] and inverse-polynomial-accuracy hardness unconditionally. To the best of our knowledge, our result is the first to show hardness for computing CCE without relying on equilibrium collapse phenomena or other routes through Nash-like structure [FGK23, AKSZ24, PR24]. Instead, we construct single-controller gadgets whose local incentive constraints force a solution of a Pure-Circuit instance even under strongly correlated stationary policies.

</details>


### [299] [Decoupling Corruption and Horizon in Robust Contextual Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11210)
*Matteo Castiglioni,Francesco Emanuele Stradi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文针对鲁棒重复上下文定价问题，在卖方仅能观察到可能被损坏的二元销售反馈的情况下，提出了一种遗憾为O(Cd+d²log T)的算法，首次实现了对腐败预算C与时间范围T的依赖分离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Gupta等人(2025)留下的开放问题：在鲁棒上下文定价中，能否将遗憾的腐败预算依赖与时间范围依赖分离开来。

Method: 提出了一种新算法，将线性评估模型与鲁棒反馈处理相结合，在每轮根据上下文定价并处理最多C轮可能被损坏的二元销售反馈。

Result: 算法实现了O(Cd+d²log T)的遗憾界，其中d是上下文维度，C是腐败预算上限，T是时间范围。

Conclusion: 首次在鲁棒上下文定价中实现了腐败预算C与时间范围T的依赖分离，解决了该领域的开放问题。

Abstract: We study robust repeated contextual pricing, where valuations depends linearly on the features. At each round $t\in[T]$, a seller observes a context, posts a price, and receives only a possibly corrupted binary sale feedback. The seller knows an upper bound $C$ on the number of corrupted rounds. We design an algorithm with regret $\mathcal O(Cd+d^2\log T)$, where $d$ is the context dimension. This is the first guarantee for robust contextual pricing that separates the dependence on the corruption budget $C$ from the horizon $T$, closing the problem left open by Gupta, Guruganesh, Paes Leme, and Schneider (2025).

</details>


### [300] [From PBS to ePBS: the Microstructure of Block Building](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11240)
*Jingyu Liu,Bolin Zhang,Lin William Cong,Siguang Li,Xuechao Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了以太坊Glamsterdam升级中引入的ePBS机制，通过不完全信息两阶段拍卖模型分析其与PBS的区别，发现ePBS存在“棘轮效应”导致效率损失，并提出TEE侧链方案可提升约25%的收入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解以太坊从relay-centric PBS转向ePBS后，区块构建微观结构的变化及其对效率、收入分配的影响，并寻找可行的机制设计来缓解ePBS的承诺失败问题。

Method: 构建不完全信息两阶段拍卖模型（含可验证信息），将PBS和ePBS建模为同一区块构建博弈的不同约束情形；结合完美贝叶斯均衡分析和校准的无遗憾学习算法进行有限博弈求解。

Result: PBS中存在分离均衡可保留一阶拍卖收益基准；ePBS因提议者可推迟提案并利用早期投标信息产生棘轮效应，导致投标者压低或混同早期出价，造成分配低效和收入-效率低谷；TEE方案在保守有限基准下相比一阶拍卖提升约25%收入。

Conclusion: ePBS的棘轮扭曲本质是承诺失败，完全承诺下可恢复Myerson最优拍卖；TEE侧链作为有限承诺的可行机制，能部分实现承诺优势，显著提升提议者收入。

Abstract: Ethereum's Glamsterdam upgrade introduces enshrined proposer-builder separation (ePBS), replacing relay-centric PBS with direct builder bids to proposers. We study how this shift changes the block-building microstructure through a general imperfect-information two-stage auction with verifiable messages, where an early bid serves as both a price offer and a signal. PBS and ePBS are modeled as restrictions of the same block-building game: PBS fixes stopping and disclosure exogenously, while ePBS lets the proposer choose stopping and disclosure ex post. Latency heterogeneity is captured by asymmetric information updates: fast builders observe disclosed early information before rebidding, while slow builders do not. We combine exact perfect Bayesian equilibrium characterizations in tractable cases with calibrated no-regret learning in finite games. For PBS, we show that separating equilibria preserve the standard first-price-auction payoff benchmark and provide conditions for their existence. For ePBS, we demonstrate a ratchet effect: because the proposer can defer block proposal and use early bid information in the second stage, builders anticipate ex-post extraction and shade or pool early bids, generating allocation inefficiency and revenue-efficiency valleys.
  We interpret this ratchet distortion as a commitment failure. Under full commitment, the optimal policy collapses to the static Myerson auction and removes the ratchet channel. To realize part of this commitment advantage in a feasible mechanism, we propose a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) sidecar that enforces limited commitment. We formulate the revenue-maximizing TEE mechanism as a bilinear optimization problem. In conservative finite benchmarks, the TEE design increases the proposer revenue relative to the first-price benchmark by approximately \(25\%\).

</details>


### [301] [Paradoxes of Game Theoretic Equilibria and Price of Anarchy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11752)
*Georgios Piliouras,Ian Gemp,Siqi Liu,Luke Marris*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文指出，将多智能体学习简化为静态均衡和黑箱遗憾分析会掩盖动态非均衡和博弈论界。作者证明：内点纳什均衡缺乏向量场信息；纯纳什均衡作为最坏情况效率保证的锚点是不稳定的；在拥挤博弈中，均衡可能导致无界效率损失；最优遗憾最小化无法排除混沌行为；非原子拥挤博弈在离散学习下会退化为混沌，效率呈指数级恶化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战算法博弈论中长期以来将多智能体学习与静态均衡（纳什、相关均衡等）和价格无政府（PoA）分析挂钩的范式，揭示这种简化会遗漏重要的动态非均衡现象。

Method: 通过理论分析，从微分拓扑、动力系统、混沌理论等角度，系统性地考察内点纳什均衡的几何特性、纯纳什均衡的拓扑稳定性、相关均衡对非理性行为的包容性、遗憾最小化的动力学局限，以及非原子拥挤博弈在离散学习下的混沌动力学。

Result: （1）内点纳什均衡缺乏C1向量场信息，无法区分激励对齐与严格对立；（2）最坏情况纯纳什均衡是拓扑不稳定的严格鞍点，在拥挤博弈中是全局排斥子；（3）所有严格正仿射成本导致PoA无界；（4）投影到离散单纯形会容纳非理性行为，CCE无法排除严格占优策略；（5）最优O(1/T)交换遗憾无法排除混沌；（6）非原子拥挤博弈在离散学习中均衡失稳，出现Li-Yorke混沌，效率呈2^p指数退化。

Conclusion: 必须重新评估以最坏情况均衡为框架的博弈论分析，转向动态地基的度量标准来评估多智能体学习系统的效率与稳定性。

Abstract: For decades, static solution concepts (Nash, Correlated, and Coarse Correlated Equilibria) and the Price of Anarchy (PoA) have formed the bedrock of algorithmic game theory, with no-regret learning proving fast convergence to such game-theoretic equilibria. We show that reducing multi-agent learning to static equilibrium and black-box regret analysis obscures underlying dynamic disequilibrium and game theoretic bounds.
  First, interior Nash equilibria lack $C^1$ vector field information, meaning agents cannot distinguish aligned from strictly opposing incentives. Inheriting this geometry, the worst-case pure Nash equilibria dictating robust PoA bounds manifest as topologically unstable strict saddles, and in canonical congestion games, as global repellers supported on almost everywhere strictly dominated strategies. Anchoring efficiency guarantees to these unstable states causes algebraic sensitivity; we prove that accommodating all strictly positive affine costs renders the PoA unbounded. Furthermore, projecting learning trajectories onto the discrete simplex of correlated play systematically accommodates non-rationalizable behavior. Evaluating dynamics via Coarse Correlated Equilibria or proximal refinements fails to preclude strictly dominated strategies. Moreover, optimal $O(1/T)$ swap-regret minimization does not preclude macroscopic turbulence, manifesting as chaotic limit sets even in minimal games. Finally, we examine the non-atomic limit of congestion games. Though considered highly stable with tight sub-linear $Θ(p/\ln p)$ PoA bounds (where $p$ is the polynomial degree), we prove that under discrete-time learning, the unique equilibrium destabilizes into Li-Yorke chaos and global attractors whose time-averaged inefficiency degrades exponentially as $2^p$. These results necessitate re-evaluating worst-case equilibrium frameworks for dynamically grounded metrics.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [302] [AfterVibe: What Remains When the Conversation Ends](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09900)
*Matteo Paltenghi,Satish Chandra*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AfterVibe 是一个从"氛围编程"会话中恢复自然语言规格说明的框架。它利用 LLM 提取抽象规格，并通过盲测 AI 代理重新实现代码来验证规格质量。在 72 个真实项目上，规格再生评分达 5.06/6.0，迭代后可提升至 5.74，表明规格可作为代码审查的主要工件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在 AI 生成代码日益增多、传统代码审查难以跟上的背景下，开发者（尤其是使用"氛围编程"的开发者）的意图缺乏有效记录。需要一个框架从编程会话中提取可验证的自然语言规格说明，使规格而非代码成为审查和记录的主要工件。

Method: AfterVibe 框架包含三个步骤：(1) 给定代码产物和对话轨迹，用 LLM 提取抽象自然语言规格说明；(2) 通过再生测试验证：让另一个盲测 AI 代理仅根据规格重新实现代码；(3) 通过多层验证管道对原始代码和再生代码进行等价性评分，若不通过则迭代优化规格。

Result: 在 72 个真实企业的"氛围编程"项目上，AfterVibe 提取的规格实现了 5.06/6.0 的平均再生评分（多次独立再生），评分迭代后可提升至 5.74。规格在抽象（捕获行为意图）和精确（约束实现结果）之间取得了良好平衡，且优于现有的人工编写的规格说明。

Conclusion: 规格说明而非代码应成为人类审查的主要工件和记录来源，尤其是在 AI 生成代码速度超过传统代码审查能力的时代。AfterVibe 框架证明了可验证自然语言规格自动提取的可行性和实用性。

Abstract: We present AfterVibe, a framework that recovers natural-language specifications from a vibe coding session. Given a code artifact and the conversation trajectory that produced it, AfterVibe uses an LLM to extract an abstract natural-language specification capturing the developer's intent, and validates it through a regeneration test: a second, blind AI agent re-implements the artifact from the spec alone, and the resulting code is graded against the original through a multi-tier validation pipeline. Spec quality is thus measured by whether an agent can regenerate passing code; if the verifiers deem the implementations equivalent the spec is considered strong, otherwise it is iteratively refined. Evaluating AfterVibe on 72 real-world vibe-coded projects from a company's internal coding sessions, we find that its recovered specs are abstract by design-capturing behavioral intent without dictating implementation-yet strong. Multiple independent regenerations achieve a high mean regeneration score of 5.06 out of 6.0 while remaining diverse in their details, confirming that the spec constrains what without over-prescribing how. Besides outperforming existing human-authored descriptions, the specs can be further strengthened iteratively to a score of 5.74. A practical implication is that specifications-not code-could become the primary artifact for human review and the source of record at a time when AI-generated code is outpacing customary code review.

</details>


### [303] [Do These Violent Delights Have Violent Ends? Measuring the Post-Merge Fate of Agentic Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09902)
*Chunqiu Steven Xia,Courtney Miller*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对182个仓库中AI编程代理和人类贡献的代码进行纵向分析，发现虽然合并率相似，但AI代理代码需要更高的修正性维护率，引入更多安全缺陷和依赖漏洞。项目无审查率每增加10%，AI代理维护负担平均增加约6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI代理代码在合并前的表现（如PR接受率），但对其合并后的长期稳定性知之甚少。合并成功并不代表代码后续无需缺陷修复和维护，因此需要纵向追踪分析。

Method: 对182个仓库中AI代理和人类贡献的代码进行纵向实证分析，追踪其合并后的命运轨迹，表征后续修改的意图，分析引入的缺陷和漏洞。

Result: AI代理贡献需要显著更高的修正性维护率，引入更多安全弱点和依赖漏洞。项目无审查率每增加10%，AI代理维护负担平均增加约6%。

Conclusion: 随着编码代理在软件开发中普及，需要评估和设计不仅能产生可合并变更，还能产生安全且可维护贡献的AI工具。

Abstract: Agentic coding tools are increasingly used to make autonomous repository-level changes to real-world projects. Prior work has largely evaluated these contributions at the pre-merge stage, through outcomes such as pull request acceptance and review effort. Far less is known about what happens to agentic code post-merge. Yet merge success alone does not reveal whether a contribution will remain stable or require bug fixes and other corrective maintenance downstream. We conduct a longitudinal empirical analysis of agentic and human contributions across 182 repositories, tracking their post-merge fate over time, characterizing the intent of subsequent modifications, and analyzing the defects and vulnerabilities they introduce. While the overall maintenance rates are similar, agentic contributions require significantly higher rates of corrective maintenance and introduce more security weaknesses and dependency vulnerabilities. We also find statistically significant evidence that agentic maintenance burden is associated with repository characteristics. In particular, each 10 percentage-point increase in a project's no-review rate is associated with roughly a 6% increase in agentic maintenance burden on average. As coding agents become pervasive in software development, our findings highlight the need to evaluate and design agentic tools not only to produce mergeable changes, but to produce contributions that remain secure and maintainable.

</details>


### [304] [Using LLMs to Adjudicate Static-Analysis Alerts with Error Reduction Techniques](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09979)
*William Klieber,David Svoboda,Lori Flynn,Ruben Martins*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了如何使用大语言模型（LLM）来判定静态分析告警是真实漏洞还是误报，提出了两种错误缓解方法（一致性检查和LLM推理评估），在多个测试集上达到了高召回率和高特异性，并验证了利用LLM生成触发程序作为独立证据的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态分析工具常产生大量告警，人工审查成本高昂。现有方法难以有效区分真实漏洞和误报，需要一种自动化、高精度的告警判定方法。

Method: 使用LLM对静态分析告警进行判定，提出两种错误缓解方法：(1) 一致性检查（CC）——多次运行LLM并检查判定结果是否一致；(2) LLM推理评估（LRE）——多次运行后让LLM评估各次推理并选择最终判定。在Juliet、FormAI、SV-COMP三个测试集上评估多个LLM。

Result: 中档推理LLM（o4-mini, gpt-oss-120b, gpt-oss-20b）在所有测试集上达到高召回率和高特异性。结合错误缓解方法后，召回率≥98%，特异性≥94.8%。LLM生成的触发程序可有效验证真实漏洞。

Conclusion: LLM能够有效判定静态分析告警，一致性检查和推理评估可显著提升判定准确性。通过LLM生成触发程序可作为独立证据验证漏洞真实性。

Abstract: Static analysis is widely used for finding security weaknesses in source code before deployment, but it often produces far more alerts than analysts can review. We study how well large language models (LLMs) can adjudicate (classify as a real bug or a false alarm) static-analysis alerts. We use two mistake-mitigation methods: (1) a consistency check (CC) that runs the LLM multiple times and checks that the verdicts are consistent with each other, and (2) an LLM reasoning evaluation (LRE) step that runs the LLM multiple times and then asks the LLM to choose a verdict after evaluating the reasoning provided by each run.
  We evaluated several LLMs on three test suites: Juliet, FormAI, and SV-COMP. Across all three suites, the mid-tier reasoning LLMs that we tested (o4-mini, gpt-oss-120b, gpt-oss-20b) reach high recall (percent of real bugs that the tool correctly flags as needing repair / manual attention) and specificity (percent of actually false alerts that the tool correctly dismisses as false alarms). With mistake mitigation, they reach at least 98% recall and at least 94.8% specificity on every suite (with CC alone on Juliet and SV-COMP, and with LRE+CC on FormAI).
  We probe Juliet memorization and show that o4-mini can often reconstruct sanitized test cases' original identities, so we base our generalization claims primarily on FormAI, scored against our own unpublished manual adjudications. We also report results of using the LLM to synthesize a program that dynamically triggers the flaw as independent evidence; a validity check rejected every trigger driver aimed at a false alarm, so a valid trigger proved to be strong evidence of a real flaw.

</details>


### [305] [A Large-Scale Dataset of MCP Implementations on GitHub](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10123)
*Benny Toeppe,Amine Barrak,Emna Ksontini*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次大规模收集并验证了 GitHub 上 2,297 个真实的 MCP（Model Context Protocol）项目，发现 Python 和 TypeScript 主导开发，混合架构是主流设计模式，数据集精度达 83%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP 虽被快速采用，但对其实现方式、项目结构和维护模式缺乏系统性理解，现有研究尚无大规模实证数据支撑。

Method: 构建混合流水线（GitHub REST + GraphQL API + Python 脚本），经历多阶段证据检查筛选 3,238 个候选仓库，按角色分类（客户端/服务器/网关），并对非操作性样本（教程、演示）进行排除过滤。

Result: 最终得到 2,297 个验证过的 MCP 项目；人工抽样审查显示 83% 的精确率（95% 置信水平）；Python 和 TypeScript 占主导；混合架构是最常见的设计模式。

Conclusion: 该工作建立了首个可复现的真实 MCP 生态基准数据集，为后续集成性、兼容性和连接性研究提供了基础。

Abstract: The rapid emergence of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) has introduced a new standard for connecting large language models to external tools and services. Despite its rapid adoption in open-source development, systematic understanding of how MCP is implemented, structured, and maintained remains limited. This study presents the first large-scale, evidence-based dataset of real-world MCP implementation collected directly from GitHub. Using a hybrid pipeline that integrates the GitHub REST and GraphQL APIs with custom Python verification scripts, 3,238 candidate repositories were discovered, filtered, and validated through multi-stage evidence checks. Each verified project was classified by operational role (e.g., client, server, gateway) and exported in a reproducible JSONL schema. A manual review of a representative subset confirmed an overall precision of 83% at a 95% confidence level, and additionally revealed a set of repositories functioning primarily as educational samples, tutorials, or demonstration templates. A targeted exclusion rule was then applied to remove these non-operational repositories, resulting in a final dataset of 2,297 validated MCP projects. The analysis shows that Python and TypeScript dominate MCP development, with hybrid architectures emerging as the most common design pattern. By emphasizing transparent verification strategies, structured evidence tagging, and reproducible data organization, this work establishes a foundational benchmark for studying real-world MCP ecosystems and supports future research on integration, connectivity, and compatibility across the broader developer community.

</details>


### [306] [ML in a Box: Analyzing Containerization Practices in Open Source ML Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10126)
*Faten Jebari,Emna Ksontini,Amine Barrak,Wael Kessentini*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次对1,993个ML相关Dockerfile进行大规模实证研究，发现ML容器通常很大（平均10.27 GB），构建时间长（约8.84分钟），44.4%的提交会触发重建（其中96.4%由上下文文件变化引起），71%的重建工作被浪费在冗余计算上，并识别出7种ML特定的Dockerfile重构模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已有研究分析了Dockerfile结构和最佳实践，但缺乏针对ML项目如何受其迭代工作流特性影响的深入研究，特别是容器体积、构建性能和缓存行为方面。

Method: 对1,993个ML相关Dockerfile进行大规模实证研究，结合容器角色与构建动态的定量分析，以及对重构实践的定性调查。

Result: ML容器在训练、推理和基础设施中扮演不同角色；容器平均大小为10.27 GB，平均构建时间8.84分钟；44.4%的提交触发重建，其中96.4%由上下文文件变化引起；71%的重建工作为冗余计算。

Conclusion: 从稳定项目中识别出7种ML特定的Dockerfile重构模式，可提高构建效率并减少容器体积。

Abstract: Containerization has become increasingly essential in the machine learning (ML) domain, providing reproducibility, portability, and environment consistency. While prior studies have analyzed Dockerfile structures and best practices, none have examined ML projects in depth to reveal how the iterative nature of ML workflows influences container footprint, build performance, and caching behavior. We present the first large scale empirical study of 1,993 ML related Dockerfiles, combining quantitative analysis of container roles in ML projects and build dynamics with a qualitative investigation of refactoring practices. Results show that containers serve distinct roles across training, inference, and infrastructure. Containers are typically large, averaging 10.27 GB in size, and require long build times of about 8.84 minutes. We find that 44.4% of commits trigger rebuilds, primarily due to context file changes (96.4%), with experimentation being the main motive behind those commits that initiate rebuilds. Despite partial cache reuse, 71% of rebuild work is wasted on redundant computation. From stable projects, we identify 7 recurring ML-specific Dockerfile refactoring patterns that improve build efficiency and reduce container footprint.

</details>


### [307] [Chain-Aware Encoding for Microservice Trace Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10156)
*Yiliu Xu,Ziwei Hong,Zhongheng Yang,Xinjin Li,Yu Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出CHAINLSTM，通过将微服务追踪事件编码为（端点，调用链）对而非单一端点，实现上下文感知的异常检测，在TrainTicket基准上F1达94.3%，比DeepLog高5.3个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微服务追踪中，即使每个span都正常返回，调用链路也可能存在结构性异常（如支付流程跳过了风险检查）。现有序列模型（如DeepLog）将每个API端点视为上下文无关的token，无法区分同一端点在不同调用链中的正常行为差异。

Method: 将每个事件编码为（端点，从根到当前span的调用链）对，使序列模型能够基于上下文条件进行下一事件预测。基于此设计CHAINLSTM，一种轻量级双任务LSTM，支持在线逐事件检测。

Result: 在TrainTicket基准上，CHAINLSTM的F1达94.3%（比DeepLog高5.3个百分点），延迟召回率相当，路径召回率达99.1%。路径异常的中位预测概率从0.91降至0.002，检测分离边界显著扩大。

Conclusion: 链感知编码能有效将微妙的路径异常转化为明显的异常点，且未见过的调用链无需模型推理即可直接标记，为阈值检测提供更宽的分离边界。

Abstract: Microservice traces can be structurally anomalous even when every span returns normally -- a payment flow that silently skips a risk check looks fine to any per-span monitor. Sequence models like DeepLog address this by predicting the next event, but they treat each API endpoint as a context-free token: the same endpoint reached through different invocation chains is mapped to the same vocabulary entry, even when its normal behavior differs across contexts. We propose encoding each event as an (endpoint, root-to-span invocation chain) pair instead. This simple change has two consequences: unseen chains are flagged without model inference, and next-event predictions become context-conditional, turning subtle path anomalies into clear outliers. We instantiate this idea in CHAINLSTM, a lightweight dual-task LSTM supporting per-event online detection. On the TrainTicket benchmark, CHAINLSTM achieves 94.3% F1 (+5.3 pp over DeepLog) with comparable latency recall and 99.1\% path recall. Case analysis shows that chain-aware encoding shifts median prediction probability on path anomalies from 0.91 to 0.002, suggesting a wider separation margin for threshold-based detection.

</details>


### [308] [VRExplorer: A Model-based Approach for Semi-Automated Testing of Virtual Reality Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10174)
*Zhengyang Zhu,Hong-Ning Dai,Hanyang Guo,Zeqin Liao,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出VRExplorer，一种基于模型的VR测试工具，通过EAT框架统一建模VR交互，结合路径搜索和概率有限状态机实现高效场景探索，在11个VR项目上相比SOTA方法VRGuide在覆盖率和效率上显著提升，并检测到真实项目中的多个缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VR应用规模和复杂度快速增长，但VR测试面临虚拟对象交互多样、3D场景复杂、任务序列繁琐等独特挑战，现有测试工具无法有效、系统地进行VR测试。

Method: 提出EAT（Entity, Action, Task）框架对VR交互进行通用建模；基于EAT框架构建VRExplorer代理，利用结合路径搜索算法的NavMesh实现高效场景探索，并在概率有限状态机（PFSM）上系统执行交互决策。

Result: 在11个VR项目上，VRExplorer相比VRGuide在ELOC覆盖率上最高提升122.8%，方法覆盖率上提升52.8%；消融实验验证各模块的必要性；成功从真实项目中检测到2个功能缺陷和1个非功能缺陷。

Conclusion: VRExplorer能有效、系统化地测试VR应用，显著优于现有方法，并在实践中具备检测真实缺陷的能力，为VR软件质量保障提供了有力工具。

Abstract: With the proliferation of Virtual Reality (VR) markets, VR applications are rapidly expanding in scale and complexity, thereby driving an urgent need for assuring VR software quality. Different from traditional mobile applications and computer software, VR testing faces unique challenges due to diverse interactions with virtual objects, complex 3D virtual environments, and intricate sequences to complete tasks. All of these emerging challenges hinder existing VR testing tools from effectively and systematically testing VR applications.
  In this paper, we present VRExplorer, a novel model-based testing tool to effectively interact with diverse virtual objects and explore complex VR scenes. Particularly, we design the Entity, Action, and Task (EAT) framework for modeling diverse VR interactions in a generic way. Built upon the EAT framework, we then present the VRExplorer agent, which can achieve effective scene exploration by incorporating meticulously designed path-finding algorithms into Unity's NavMesh. Moreover, the VRExplorer agent can also systematically execute interaction decisions on top of the Probabilistic Finite State Machine (PFSM).
  Experimental evaluation on 11 representative VR projects shows that VRExplorer consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) approach VRGuide by achieving significantly higher coverage and better efficiency. Specifically, VRExplorer yields up to 122.8% and 52.8% improvements over VRGuide in terms of executable lines of code (ELOC) coverage and method (function) coverage, respectively. Furthermore, ablation results also verify the essential contributions of each designed module. More importantly, our VRExplorer has successfully detected two functional bugs and one non-functional bug from real-world projects.

</details>


### [309] [Which Neurons Detect Malicious Code? A Probing Study of LLM Security Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10221)
*Lam D. Dao,Vang T. Nguyen,Anh M. T. Bui,Phuong T. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文运用机械可解释性方法，定位了三个指令微调大语言模型（Llama3.1-8B-Instruct, Mistral-v0.3-7B-Instruct, Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct）前馈网络（FFN）中负责恶意代码检测的关键神经元。通过3000个PyPI恶意/良性样本的实验表明，增强促进性神经元并抑制抑制性神经元可提升检测准确率，但效果高度依赖模型。研究揭示了不同模型在FFN层编码恶意代码检测行为的差异性，为神经元级编辑、选择性遗忘等安全对齐机制提供了方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLMs在软件工程任务中表现出色，但其识别恶意/脆弱代码的内部机制尚不明确。现有研究多关注模型性能，缺乏对模型内部如何编码安全相关知识的理解。本文旨在通过机械可解释性方法，揭示LLMs检测恶意代码的内部神经机制。

Method: 对三个指令微调LLM（Llama3.1-8B-Instruct, Mistral-v0.3-7B-Instruct, Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct），使用PyPI Malregistry中的1500个恶意包和1500个良性包，应用机械可解释性方法定位FFN神经元，并利用因果干预（放大/抑制神经元）验证归因结果。

Result: 放大促进性神经元并抑制抑制性神经元可提升恶意代码检测准确率；反向操作（促进抑制性、抑制促进性）会导致预测崩溃为单一类别。但该效应的幅度和一致性高度依赖具体模型。不同模型在FFN层中编码恶意检测行为的方式存在差异。

Conclusion: 探针分析安全相关神经元有助于理解LLMs如何编码恶意编程概念，识别潜在有害的记忆行为。这为神经元级编辑、选择性遗忘、安全感知对齐等更可靠的防御机制奠定了基础。

Abstract: Background. Large language models (LLMs) have become increasingly capable of understanding and generating source code, leading to their widespread adoption in software engineering tasks such as code completion, repair, and vulnerability detection. However, despite their strong empirical performance, the internal mechanisms through which LLMs recognize malicious or vulnerable code patterns remain poorly understood. Aim. We investigated where the malware detection behavior is encoded inside LLMs Feed Forward Network (FFN) neurons and verified the attribution with causal interventions on the neurons identified. This aims to identify the most important neurons in detecting malicious code. Methods. We applied mechanistic interpretability methods to locate the neurons being responsible for malware-detection behavior in three instruction-tuned LLMs: Llama3.1-8B-Instruct, Mistral-v0.3-7B-Instruct, and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct. Using 1,500 malicious and 1,500 benign PyPI packages from the PyPI Malregistry, we attribute the behavior to a set of neurons. Results. The experimental results reveal that amplifying facilitating neurons for malware detection while suppressing inhibiting ones can boost accuracy, while the reverse collapses predictions toward a single class, although the magnitude and consistency is heavily model-dependent. We demonstrated that the guardrail detection mechanism varies across models, each represents its malware detection behavior differently within its FFN layers. Conclusions. Probing the neurons associated with security-relevant knowledge helps us gain insights into how LLMs encode malicious programming concepts, identify potentially harmful memorized behaviors, paving the way toward more reliable defense mechanisms, such as neuron-level editing, selective unlearning, and security-aware alignment for code-focused LLMs.

</details>


### [310] [From Business Requirements to Test Assertions: Evaluating LLM-Generated Oracles on Real Bugs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10277)
*Tiancheng Ma,Nasir U. Eisty*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究通过10个Defects4J Lang的真实bug，探索了LLM能否直接根据自然语言业务需求生成通用的测试预言（oracle），无需访问源代码或输入输出示例。结果表明LLM具有一定泛化能力，但与系统实际行为的匹配度不如与需求定义的匹配度高，且需求属性与预言准确性之间无显著线性关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 测试预言问题（确定测试的正确预期输出）是自动化测试的主要瓶颈，尤其在非专家用户依赖AI生成代码但无法可靠验证的背景下尤为突出。现有方法通常需要源代码或示例，本文希望探索LLM能否直接从自然语言需求生成通用测试预言，以解决这一瓶颈。

Method: 基于Defects4J的10个Lang系列真实bug，构建需求驱动的可复现pipeline：(i) 通过buggy/fixed diff提取行为变化，(ii) 手动翻译为业务需求，(iii) 构建需求派生预言（REQ）作为黄金标准，(iv) 用5个LLM（DeepSeek-V3、Gemma-3n、Llama-3、Mistral-7B、Qwen-3）生成Java预言代码。评估两个目标：与REQ一致性和与系统实际行为（SUT）一致性，报告宏平均准确率、精确率、召回率和F1。

Result: LLM实现了非平凡的泛化能力，但存在显著的bug级别和模型级别方差。生成的预言与REQ的一致性高于与SUT的一致性。需求技术性/模糊性评分与预言准确性之间的相关性较弱且置信区间较宽，未发现需求属性与预言准确性之间的可检测线性关系。

Conclusion: 作为概念验证的试点研究，结果初步表明LLM基于需求生成预言是可行的，但准确性受预训练覆盖范围和所需行为的语义明确性主导，而非需求本身的属性。需要更大规模的实证研究来进一步验证。

Abstract: The oracle problem (determining the correct expected outcome for a test) remains a major bottleneck in automated testing, and is increasingly relevant as non-experts rely on AI-generated code they cannot reliably validate. We study whether large language models (LLMs) can generate generalizable test oracles directly from natural-language business requirements, without access to source code or example input-output pairs. We propose a reproducible, requirement-driven pipeline grounded in Defects4J. For each of 10 real bugs from Defects4J Lang (Bugs 1 and 3-11), we (i) extract behavioral changes via buggy/fixed diffs, (ii) manually translate the change into a business requirement, (iii) construct a requirement-derived oracle (REQ) as a gold standard, and (iv) prompt five LLMs (DeepSeek-V3, Gemma-3n, Llama-3, Mistral-7B, and Qwen-3) to generate Java oracle code. We evaluate oracle correctness and generalization under two targets: agreement with REQ and agreement with the system under test (SUT), reporting macro-averaged accuracy, precision, recall, and F1. LLMs achieve non-trivial generalization but with substantial bug- and model-level variance. Generated oracles align more closely with REQ than with SUT, and correlations between requirement technicality/ambiguity ratings and oracle accuracy are weak with wide confidence intervals. No detectable linear relationship exists between requirement properties and oracle accuracy in this dataset, suggesting that pretraining coverage and the semantic specificity of the required behavior dominate oracle correctness. As a pilot proof of concept, these findings are preliminary and are intended to establish feasibility and motivate larger-scale empirical investigation.

</details>


### [311] [Partial Contracts Suffice: Sound, LLM-Inferred Regression Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10291)
*Yiannis Charalambous,Rafael Menezes,Youcheng Sun,Lucas C. Cordeiro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出首个基于合约的回归验证工具，通过部分调用者充分的合约实现高效验证，无需完整程序分析或手动规范，在多项测试中达到近乎最优的紧致度，并实现零误报的安全等价性验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件持续演化，但确保补丁不破坏预期行为而无需重新验证整个代码库仍然困难。现有回归验证技术需要昂贵的全程序推理或依赖手动编写的规范，实际中难以获得。

Method: 提出首个基于合约的回归验证工具：通过证明所有函数版本匹配行为来保证合约可靠性；利用assume-guarantee推理验证程序流；从检查器自身反例自动推断合约（无需独立规范步骤）；使用部分调用者充分的合约（而非完整行为规范）。

Result: 在Frama-C-Problems上，调用者充分的合约几乎已达到循环能达到的最紧致度；紧致度比较器判定部分合约与增强合约对大多数目标等效。在EqBench-C上零误报，并发现9个被误标为等价的配对。在Frama-C-Problems和ANSSI X509解析器上达到与AutoSpec和Preguss相当的验证率。

Conclusion: 部分规范的合约捕获了几乎所有可达到的紧致度，在调用者充分性处停止几乎不损失精度。通过结果可证明一种称为"安全保持条件等价"的强属性：强制执行加调用者充分性。

Abstract: Software evolves continuously, yet ensuring that a patch preserves intended behavior without re-verifying an entire codebase remains difficult. Regression verification addresses this problem, but existing techniques require expensive whole-program reasoning or rely on manually written specifications that are rarely available in practice. We present the first contract-based regression verification tool. Contract soundness is ensured by proving all function versions match the behavior. The contract then verifies program flow via assume-guarantee. We ask whether a partial, caller-sufficient contract, rather than a full behavioral specification, is enough. On Frama-C-Problems we strengthen each inferred contract past what the caller needs and measure how much tighter it becomes. It barely moves: for most targets in every model the caller-sufficient contract is already the tightest the loop reaches, and our tightness comparator rates the partial and strengthened contracts equivalent for the large majority of targets it can compare. Partial-spec contracts thus capture nearly all the attainable tightness, so stopping at caller-sufficiency costs almost nothing. The regression check underneath is sound: on the third-party EqBench-C suite it never fabricates an equivalence, returning zero false proofs and reporting an unprovable difference instead. It also surfaced nine pairs that EqBench mislabels as equivalent, more than a concurrent tool reports. The contracts themselves are inferred automatically from the checker's own counterexamples, with no separate specification step; on Frama-C-Problems and the ANSSI X509 parser this reaches a verification rate comparable to tools AutoSpec and Preguss, while a passing result certifies at least as strong a property, which we call \emph{safety-preserving conditional equivalence}: enforcement plus caller-sufficiency.

</details>


### [312] [A Framework for Managing the Models of Engineered Quantum Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10347)
*Siyuan Ji,Hayato Ishida,Amal Elsokary,Stephen Powley,Catherine White,Alexandre Zagoskin,Ran Wei,Maria Aslam,Michael J. de C. Henshaw*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出QSysMM框架，用于构建和同步量子系统模型，确保量子特性（叠加、纠缠）在模型转换中不被破坏，并在此基础上提出基于SysML v2的QSysML建模语言。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型同步方法不足以应对工程化量子系统——量子叠加和纠缠等特性可能在模型转换中被无察觉地移除，而结构检查仍能通过，因此需要专门的模型管理框架。

Method: 提出QSysMM框架，包含本体、抽象、组合和暴露四个关注点；在该框架内提出基于SysML v2技术栈的QSysML语言，实现数字单一事实源。

Result: 框架和语言设计用于保证量子系统模型同步过程中量子特性的完整性，避免模型转换导致的信息损失。

Conclusion: QSysMM框架为量子系统的模型管理提供了基础，未来可成熟化为完整的量子系统模型管理体系。

Abstract: Quantum technologies are maturing into systems that classical engineering must build, verify and maintain. The model-driven community has begun to respond with quantum-aware pipelines and languages, and the domain models these produce must be synchronised with the heterogeneous models created and owned by other communities. We argue that existing synchronisation approaches are insufficient for engineered quantum systems. A quantum system description captures superposition and entanglement, which a model transformation could remove undetected, while every structural check passes. To address this, we present the Quantum Systems Model Management (QSysMM) Framework, which guides the construction and synchronisation of the models of a quantum system into a digital single source of truth. The framework features four concerns: ontological, abstraction, composition and exposure, each given the treatment that engineered quantum systems require. Within this framework, we propose a Quantum Systems Modelling Language (QSysML) on the SysML v2 technology stack, and we close with a proposal that matures this synchronisation core into full model management for quantum systems.

</details>


### [313] [Model-Driven Digital Twin Framework for Quantum Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10367)
*Amal Elsokary,Hayato Ishida,Ran Wei,Michael J. de C. Henshaw,Siyuan Ji*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出利用模型驱动工程（MDE）为量子网络构建可复用、可互操作的数字孪生，通过架构演进（从代码驱动到中心辐射型集成）解决当前评估碎片化问题，并以SysML v2、QKD工具包、EMF控制器和SeQUeNCe进行了概念验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子网络评估当前分散于异构平台、模拟器、协议和架构抽象中，缺乏可复用的系统级数字孪生，现有数字孪生研究多为孤立的特定解决方案。

Method: 采用模型驱动工程（MDE）作为系统化基础，推导设计时评估和运行时同步的需求，提出从代码驱动→领域模型驱动→点对点→中心辐射型集成的渐进式架构。

Result: 通过概念案例研究（SysML v2 + QKD工具包 + EMF控制器 + SeQUeNCe）展示了架构的可行性。

Conclusion: 为量子网络提供了自适应、可互操作数字孪生的基础框架，有望解决异构集成和系统级复用问题。

Abstract: Quantum networks are advancing towards larger and more operational infrastructures, yet their evaluation remains fragmented across heterogeneous physical platforms, simulators, protocols, and architectural abstractions. Current digital-twin studies for quantum networks mainly realise isolated capabilities or application-specific solutions rather than reusable system-level twins. This paper argues that Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) can provide a systematic basis for integrating and evolving these heterogeneous artefacts. It derives requirements for design-time evaluation and runtime synchronisation, and proposes a progression of architectures from code-driven and domain-model-driven solutions to point-to-point and hub-and-spoke integration. A conceptual implementation case study illustrates this using SysML v2, QKD kit, an EMF-based controller, and SeQUeNCe. The work provides a foundation for adaptable and interoperable digital twins for quantum networks.

</details>


### [314] [Mitigating LLM Sycophancy in Code Smell Detection Using Evidence-Guided Reasoning Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10411)
*Istiaq Ahmed Fahad,Kamruzzaman Asif,Md. Nurul Ahad Tawhid*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了大语言模型在代码异味检测中的谄媚偏差（sycophancy bias），发现模型对提示变化高度敏感（决策翻转率高达72%，错误对齐率超90%），并提出了基于证据引导的去偏提示策略（EGDP），可将决策翻转率降至12%，错误对齐率降至21%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在代码异味检测中越来越常用，但其可靠性（尤其是在不同提示条件下）尚未被充分探索。模型可能受外部线索影响而非代码特征本身，谄媚偏差导致模型倾向于迎合用户假设而非进行客观分析。

Method: 基于MLCQ数据集，系统评估不同提示框架（确认偏差、矛盾提示、虚假前提）对LLM预测的影响；提出Evidence-Guided Debiasing Prompting (EGDP)策略，强制模型先给出证据再进行推理。

Result: LLM对提示变化高度敏感：决策翻转率高达72%，错误对齐率超过90%；EGDP显著改善稳定性，决策翻转率降至12%，错误对齐率降至21%，且对基于结构证据的依赖增强。

Conclusion: 谄媚偏差对LLM代码异味检测的可靠性构成严重威胁；证据引导推理是一种有效且可泛化的缓解方法。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for code smell detection tasks due to their ability to interpret program semantics. However, their reliability in this context remains poorly explored, particularly under varying prompt conditions where model predictions may be influenced by external cues rather than code characteristics. One such limitation is sycophancy bias, where models tend to align their outputs with user-provided assumptions instead of performing objective analysis. In this paper, we present the first systematic empirical study of sycophancy bias in LLM-based code smell detection. Using the MLCQ dataset, we evaluate how different prompt framings like confirmation bias, contradictory hints, and false premises affect model predictions. Our results show that LLMs are highly sensitive to prompt variations, with Decision Flip Rates reaching up to 72% and False Alignment Rates exceeding 90%, indicating substantial instability and agreement with misleading prompts. To address this issue, we propose Evidence-Guided Debiasing Prompting (EGDP), a structured prompting strategy that enforces evidence-first reasoning. EGDP reduces decision instability and improves robustness, lowering Decision Flip Rates to as low as 12% and False Alignment Rates to as low as 21%, while increasing reliance on structurally grounded evidence. Our findings demonstrate that sycophancy bias poses a critical threat to the reliability of LLM-based code smell detection, and that evidence-guided reasoning provides an effective and generalizable mitigation approach.

</details>


### [315] [Is Model Instability just Noise to be Tolerated or a Property that can be Managed?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10420)
*Amirali Rayegan,Lunxiao Li,Tim Menzies*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文揭示软件分析中模型不稳定性是普遍且严重的问题（仅13.7%用例一致），提出通过调整标签分配、模型复杂度、分割评分等策略，可将一致性提升4.8倍、优化误差标准差降低22%，并指出存在由数据本身决定的稳定性极限，建议将稳定性作为标准评估维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件分析中重复运行同一分析常得到不同模型和结论，降低了对模型的信任并限制了其使用，现有研究对此问题关注不足。

Method: 在127个多目标SE优化问题（12,700个测试用例）上系统评估模型不稳定性，通过调整标签花费方式、模型复杂度控制、分割评分策略等配置改进，并检验因果干预和数据局部性干预的效果。

Result: 默认配置下仅13.7%测试用例一致；改进后一致性提升4.8倍；优化误差标准差平均降低22%（从17.4降至13.6）；推荐质量未下降，改进配置在119/127数据集上统计排名第一（默认仅74个）。因果和数据局部性干预仅部分有效，存在残留的稳定性下限。

Conclusion: 不稳定性应作为SE优化的标准评估维度，需常规测量、与性能一同报告，并用于校准对单次运行的信任。本文方法可作为未来减少SBSE不稳定性研究的基线。

Abstract: In software analytics, rerunning the same analysis twice often yields different models and conclusions. This reduces trust in the model and limits its use. We find that model instability is a major problem. Across 127 multi-objective SE optimization problems (12,700 test cases), repeated runs of a state-of-the-art optimizer agree on only 13.7% of test cases, even under improved settings. We argue that this instability is not merely noise to tolerate, but a property that can be measured and managed. By adjusting how labels are spent, how complex the models become, and how splits are scored, we obtain models that agree 4.8 times as often as the default configuration. The standard deviation of optimization error falls by 22% on average (mean std 17.4 to 13.6), while recommendation quality improves rather than degrades. In terms of quality, the refined settings are statistically top-ranked on 119 of 127 datasets, compared to 74 for the defaults. We then test causal and data-locality interventions and find that they help only partially, suggesting a residual stability floor. Our evidence suggests there are fundamental limits to stability set by the data itself (noise, scarce labels, proxy objectives, and the many near-equivalent models a dataset admits). We conclude that instability should be treated as a standard evaluation axis in SE optimization, which should be routinely measured, reported alongside performance, and used to calibrate trust in any single run. The methods in this paper provide a baseline against which future efforts to reduce SBSE instability can be judged.
  To support open science, we offer the following reproduction package: https://tinyurl.com/Model-Instability

</details>


### [316] [Toward Production-Ready Federated Learning in Healthcare: Privacy, Orchestration, and Governance in MLOps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10467)
*Sakshi Gorkhali,Jonesh Shrestha*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文探讨了在医疗保健领域中，联邦学习虽然能解决数据集中化问题，但仍面临隐私泄露和运维挑战。作者提出需要结合MLOps实践和联邦学习运维（FLOps），通过容器化、编排、隐私保护机制和治理等综合架构，才能使联邦医疗机器学习系统达到可扩展、可靠和可信赖的水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗组织无法自由集中患者数据（因敏感、监管和机构管控），联邦学习虽能解决这一问题，但其本身不具备生产就绪和默认隐私保护能力，模型更新仍可能泄露信息，且去中心化训练带来了部署、监控、回滚、调试和治理方面的运维挑战。

Method: 论文通过回答三个研究问题展开：1）容器化和编排如何支持联邦部署；2）隐私保护机制如何影响隐私、效用、可扩展性和运维复杂性之间的权衡；3）哪些部署后实践对长期治理最重要。核心论点是联邦医疗机器学习需要集成的MLOps架构，包括可复现部署、安全编排、模型版本管理、审计日志、漂移监控、异质性管理和清晰治理。

Result: 论文提出联邦机器学习需要超越隐私保护算法本身，需要构建集成的MLOps架构（FLOps）来应对生产环境中的挑战。

Conclusion: 联邦医疗机器学习系统要实现可扩展、可靠和可信赖，仅靠隐私保护算法是不够的，必须结合MLOps实践和联邦学习运维（FLOps），通过综合架构解决运维和治理问题。

Abstract: Healthcare organizations often cannot freely centralize patient data because medical records are sensitive, regulated, and institutionally controlled. Federated learning offers a practical alternative by allowing hospitals and clinics to train a shared model while keeping raw data local. However, federated learning is not automatically production-ready or private by default. Model updates can still leak information, and decentralized training introduces operational challenges in deployment, monitoring, rollback, debugging, and governance. This paper examines how MLOps practices and the emerging idea of Federated Learning Operations (FLOps) can make federated healthcare machine learning systems scalable, reliable, and trustworthy. It answers three research questions: how containerization and orchestration support federated deployment, how privacy-preserving mechanisms affect trade-offs among privacy, utility, scalability, and operational complexity, and which post-deployment practices are most important for long-term governance. The central argument is that federated healthcare ML requires more than privacy-preserving algorithms. It needs an integrated MLOps architecture that combines reproducible deployment, secure orchestration, model versioning, audit logging, drift monitoring, heterogeneity management, and clear governance.

</details>


### [317] [Trusting AI to increase productivity? Perspectives Across the Global North and South](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10488)
*Adam Bokun,Shalini Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过系统文献综述、灰色文献分析和初步调查（36份有效回复），探索了全球南方与北方背景下用户对生成式AI的信任与感知生产力之间的关系。初步发现：全球南方受访者更信任AI，但未报告明显的生产力提升；全球北方受访者信任度较低，却报告了更强的生产力提升和时间节省。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究缺乏对生成式AI信任与生产力关系的深入理解，尤其是在全球南方（Global South）背景下的实证证据。作者旨在填补这一空白，探索信任与生产力之间的关联是否受地域、文化、资源获取等因素影响。

Method: 采用三阶段混合方法：（1）系统性文献综述；（2）灰色文献分析；（3）问卷调查（截至写作时收集36份有效回复，涵盖全球北方和南方参与者，包括有跨区域经验者）。

Result: 文献综述未发现任何同行评审证据同时涉及GenAI信任、生产力和全球南方背景。灰色文献仅提供有限见解。调查初步结果显示：全球南方出生和工作的受访者更信任AI，但很少报告明确的生产力提升；全球北方出生和工作的受访者信任度较低，却报告更强的生产力提升和时间节省。

Conclusion: 信任AI本身不足以带来生产力提升。生产力还依赖于访问权限、任务类型以及用户需要核查AI输出结果的程度。研究强调需要进一步探索影响生产力收益的复合因素，而非仅关注信任这一变量。

Abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) tools are widely used in academia and software development, where productivity gains may depend not only on technical capabilities but also on users' trust and contextual factors. This paper presents emerging results from an exploratory study investigating the relationship between trust in GenAI and perceived productivity, motivated by Global South contexts. We conducted a systematic literature review, complemented by a grey literature analysis and a survey study. The literature review identified no peer-reviewed evidence at the intersection of GenAI trust, productivity, and Global South settings, while the grey literature revealed only limited insights. At the time of writing, the survey has received 36 valid responses from participants across both the Global North and Global South, including individuals with cross-regional experiences. Preliminary results suggest that respondents born and working in the Global South tended to trust AI more, but did not usually report clear productivity gains from using it. In contrast, respondents born and working outside the Global South reported stronger productivity gains and greater time savings, even though they showed less trust in generative AI. These findings suggest that trusting AI is not enough on its own; productivity also depends on access, the type of task, and how much users need to check the output.

</details>


### [318] [Question Answering for Diagram-Rich Technical Meeting Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10494)
*Zhuoran Xu,Jia Li,Dayuan Tan,Mark Cole,Ish Ashraf,Sandeep Puri,Mehrdad Sabetzadeh,Shiva Nejati*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍LMVQA，一个基于LLM的多模态问答系统，用于技术会议视频。通过将答案锚定在音视频证据上，并显式处理包含需求图和UML图的富图表内容，LMVQA在两个数据集上将准确率从约31%和21%提升至94%和88%，响应时间从约81-98秒降至3-9秒，API成本降低约75%。专家访谈显示工程师特别认可其在定位软件工程信息、回溯设计理由方面的价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程中异步通信（如录制的会议视频）包含需求、设计决策等关键信息，但视频时长较长、相关信息分散在语音、幻灯片和技术图表中，现有方法难以高效获取这些知识。

Method: LMVQA系统：基于LLM的多模态问答系统，对每个视频进行一次处理，构建可复用的带时间戳证据语料库；将答案锚定在音频和视觉证据上，显式处理包含需求图和UML图的图表丰富内容。

Result: 在Ciena数据集上准确率从31%提升至94%，公开数据集上从21%提升至88%；一次索引后平均响应时间从81.3秒降至3.3秒（Ciena）和从98.4秒降至9.2秒（公开数据集）；Token级别LLM API成本降低约75%。

Conclusion: LMVQA显著优于现有基线方法，尤其在图表丰富的视频上提升更大，工程师特别认可其在定位软件工程相关信息、回溯设计理由方面的实用性。

Abstract: Software engineering increasingly relies on asynchronous communication artifacts, including recorded meetings where stakeholders discuss concerns, rationale, and decisions. These meetings often include diagram-based representations of requirements, system behavior, component interactions, and trace dependencies. Accessing knowledge from these meetings is challenging because recordings are long and relevant evidence is distributed across speech, slides, and technical diagrams. This paper reports our industrial experience developing and evaluating LMVQA, an LLM-based multimodal question-answering system for technical meeting videos. Developed in collaboration with engineers at Ciena, LMVQA supports the understanding of requirements and design intent by grounding answers in audio and visual evidence, with explicit handling of diagram-rich content such as requirements and UML diagrams. It processes each video once to build a reusable time-stamped evidence corpus for grounded question answering. Across a Ciena dataset and a public dataset, we show that LMVQA significantly improves answer accuracy compared to a state-of-the-art baseline, from 31% to 94% on the Ciena dataset and from 21% to 88% on the public dataset, with larger gains on diagram-rich videos. We further show that, after one-time indexing, LMVQA reduces average response time from 81.3s to 3.3s on Ciena and from 98.4s to 9.2s on the public dataset, while lowering average token-based LLM API cost by about 75%. Finally, our interviews with three domain experts show that engineers particularly value LMVQA for locating software-engineering-relevant information, revisiting rationale, and tracing answers to specific video segments.

</details>


### [319] [When Does Restricting a Coding Agent to execute_code Help? A Regime $\times$ Agent-Design Ablation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10569)
*Hong Yang,Qi Yu,Travis Desell*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过三臂消融实验（完整工具/仅bash/仅代码执行）在合成计算任务和SWE-bench Mini修改任务上比较了编码代理的不同工具面（IDE、bash、MCP代码执行），发现仅使用单一execute_code MCP工具在三个实验单元中成本更低或持平，通过率无显著差异，唯一例外是SWE-bench/Claude中代码执行方向性成本更高（+14.4%，不显著）。结论：最优工具面由任务类型和代理设计共同决定，成本信号主要来自缓存调整后的成本而非通过率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前编码代理领域存在多种工具面（IDE原语、bash、MCP代码执行），但关于哪种工具面最重要存在三个相互矛盾的说法，缺乏直接交叉比较。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过严格控制的消融实验揭示不同工具面的实际效果和成本差异。

Method: 采用三臂消融实验设计（完整工具集/仅bash/仅代码执行），在两种任务（合成计算任务、SWE-bench Mini修改任务）上，使用两个代理（Claude Code、OpenAI Codex CLI），保持模型、框架和提示固定，进行4个（任务×代理）单元的交叉比较。

Result: 在4个实验单元中，3个单元内仅使用execute_code MCP工具比最便宜的多工具方案成本更低或统计上持平（Artifact/Claude和SWE-bench/Codex显著，Artifact/Codex方向性），通过率无显著差异。唯一例外是SWE-bench/Claude中代码执行为主方向性成本更高（+14.4%，不显著），该差异源于失败轨迹的失败成本而非成功轨迹的编辑成本。

Conclusion: 最优工具面由任务类型和代理设计共同决定，而非单一因素；成本信号主要体现在缓存调整后的成本上，而通过率在不同工具面间无显著差异。

Abstract: Modern coding agents expose multiple tool surfaces -- IDE primitives, bash, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code-execution -- and the field has shipped three contradictory claims about which one matters. We run the missing crossed comparison: an integrity-clean three-arm ablation (baseline / bash_only / code_only) on synthetic computation tasks and SWE-bench Mini modification tasks, holding model, harness, and prompts fixed, with two agents (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI) so the comparison spans both regime and agent-design axes. Across the four resulting (regime, agent) cells, restricting the agent to a single execute_code MCP tool is cheaper than -- or statistically tied with -- its cheapest tool-rich rival in three cells (significantly on Artifact/Claude and SWE-bench/Codex; directionally on Artifact/Codex), with pass rates statistically tied within each cell. The lone exception is SWE-bench/Claude, where code_only is directionally costlier (+14.4%, not significant); a conditional-cost analysis localizes that gap to failure-cost on doomed-run trajectories, not a per-edit tax on successful runs. Two implications: the cheapest tool surface is jointly determined by task regime and agent design rather than by either axis alone, and the headline cost signal lives in cache-adjusted cost -- not pass rate, which is invariant across surfaces at the model sizes we evaluate. The benchmark harness, task suite, and analysis code are available at https://github.com/hyang0129/onlycodes.

</details>


### [320] [WebDesignIter: Co-Evolving Design Knowledge for Repository-Level Front-End Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10621)
*Zheng Pei,Mingwei Liu,Zhenxi Chen,Zihao Wang,Yanlin Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: WebDesignIter 是一个基于设计知识图谱（WebAppArchKG）的框架，通过设计信息规划与生成，在仓库级前端开发中显著提升代码生成质量，Pass@2 平均提升 9.55 个百分点，并优于 Claude Code 等通用编码代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前 LLM 编码代理针对单次任务设计，难以追踪仓库级别的跨文件依赖，导致功能退化和代码维护困难。作者认为缺失的关键是设计知识（架构原则、模块职责、结构约束），因此提出一个能融合并同步设计知识与仓库结构的框架。

Method: 提出 WebDesignIter，包含两个阶段：1) 设计信息规划——从持久化知识图谱 WebAppArchKG 中提取历史上下文和架构概览，生成实现计划和对应测试脚本；2) 设计感知生成——通过基于 diff 的补丁执行计划，经沙箱执行和自动语法修复验证。

Result: 在 Web-Bench 上，WebDesignIter 在九个基础模型上平均 Pass@2 提升 9.55 个百分点；在所有模型配置上超越 Claude Code、OpenHands、SWE-Agent、Codex CLI 等通用代理，且输入 token 减少 25-30%；消融实验显示设计知识最关键，移除后 Pass@1 下降 11.40 个百分点。

Conclusion: 设计知识为仓库级代码生成提供了一条更高效、更可靠的路径，在性能与 token 效率上均优于现有方法。

Abstract: Front-end development accumulates change after change at the repository level, weaving complex cross-file dependencies that current LLM coding agents tuned for single-shot tasks cannot reliably track across multiple iterations, leading to functional regressions and code that resists maintenance. We argue the missing piece is design knowledge: architectural principles, module responsibilities, and structural constraints that developers lean on to keep code readable, maintainable, and evolvable as a system scales. To operationalize this, we propose WebDesignIter, a framework built around a persistent knowledge graph (WebAppArchKG) that fuses repository structure with design knowledge and keeps both in sync across development cycles. WebDesignIter works in two stages: design-informed planning pulls historical context and architectural overviews from WebAppArchKG to produce an implementation plan with corresponding test scripts, and design-aware generation executes that plan through targeted diff-based patches, validated by sandbox execution and automatic syntax repair. On Web-Bench, WebDesignIter delivers an average Pass@2 gain of 9.55 percentage points across nine foundation models over existing baselines. More importantly, WebDesignIter outperforms every general-purpose coding agent Claude Code, OpenHands, SWE-Agent, Codex CLI on every model configuration, posting the highest Pass@1 and Pass@2 while consuming 2530 fewer input tokens. Ablation singles out design knowledge as the most impactful component: stripping it drops Pass@1 by 11.40 percentage points, a degradation far larger than removing code-graph retrieval, patch-based generation, or sandbox verification, confirming that design knowledge provides a fundamentally more efficient and reliable path to repository-level code generation.

</details>


### [321] [Commenting with Copilot: A Taxonomy and Multi-Year Analysis of Student Code-Generation Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10674)
*Nasser Giacaman,Valerio Terragni,Paul Denny,Viraj Kumar*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文分析了学生在AI辅助编程任务中编写的注释规范，提出了包含注释类型、代码表达级别和代码结构三个维度的分类体系，发现学生主要使用自然语言描述“做什么”，对过程性结构更倾向“如何做”的注释，且更注重验证生成代码而非反复修改注释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI编程工具普及，学生从编写代码转向用自然语言描述需求，但我们对学生在AI辅助编程中编写的注释规范知之甚少，研究填补了这一空白。

Method: 分析了四年间本科生编程作业的提交和反思数据，提出了包含注释类型、代码表达级别和代码结构三个维度的分类体系，并使用自动化分类方法进行分析。

Result: 学生主要编写自然语言型的“What”注释；对于更过程性的代码结构，倾向于使用“How”注释；学生更注重验证生成的代码而非反复重写注释。

Conclusion: 在AI辅助编程中，学生的编程重心正从编写代码转向编写规范（注释），且验证行为比反复修改规范更为突出。

Abstract: As AI code tools become integrated into programming environments, students increasingly describe intended behavior in natural language and rely on these tools to generate code, shifting emphasis from code writing to specification. Yet little is known about the comments students write as specifications in AI-assisted programming tasks. We analyze a four-year dataset of undergraduate programming submissions and reflections from tasks in which students wrote comments to guide code generation and refined solutions using test-case feedback. We introduce a taxonomy spanning three dimensions: comment type, code expression level, and code construct. Using automated classification, we examine how these dimensions vary across attempts and how students describe the process in their reflections. Our findings show that students mostly wrote natural-language What comments, shifted toward How comments for more procedural constructs, and focused more on verifying generated code than on repeatedly rewriting comments.

</details>


### [322] [Maintenance and Support in Community-Driven Scientific Pipeline Ecosystems: A Cross-Platform Empirical Study of nf-core](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10839)
*Khairul Alam,Kowsik Roy,Md Shamimur Rahman,Banani Roy*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过对nf-core生态系统中15,760个GitHub问题、35,411个PR和895个论坛讨论的跨平台实证分析，揭示了科学计算管道生态系统的维护与支持模式。研究发现：不同工单类型承担不同角色；问题解决与可操作性、协调性和诊断证据相关；跨平台关联性在GitHub内部较强，但论坛讨论与仓库工单之间缺乏显式链接。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 社区驱动的科学计算管道生态系统的可持续性不仅依赖于工作流引擎和测试基础设施，还取决于社区如何维护管道、整合贡献以及在不同执行环境中支持用户。然而，这些维护和支持实践尚未得到系统的实证研究。

Method: 对nf-core生态系统（一个标准化的Nextflow管道集合）进行跨平台实证研究，分析15,760个GitHub issues、35,411个GitHub PR和895个Seqera社区论坛讨论，采用定量和定性方法分析维护与支持问题在不同工单类型中的分布、解决结果的影响因素以及问题在仓库中心与社区中心空间之间的流动。

Result: GitHub issues主要捕获仓库级问题报告和维护协调；PR捕获实现、审查、测试、依赖和模板更新工作；论坛讨论捕获用户面对的支持问题。问题解决与可操作性、协调性和诊断证据相关。Issue关闭与分配人、评论数、里程碑、bug标签、错误提及和版本信息相关。PR合并与作者角色、自动化类型、草稿状态、检查清单、关联issue和审查路由相关。论坛采纳答案更可能包含代码块、持续互动和具体技术证据。跨平台分析显示GitHub内部可追溯性强，但论坛与仓库工单间链接有限。

Conclusion: 为维持科学管道生态系统的可持续性，需要加强不同平台之间的显式链接，改善用户支持问题的诊断流程，并优化工单管理策略以提高问题解决效率。

Abstract: Community-driven scientific pipeline ecosystems are increasingly important for reproducible data-intensive research, but their sustainability depends on more than workflow engines, templates, and testing infrastructure. It also depends on how communities maintain pipelines, integrate contributions, and support users across heterogeneous execution environments. This paper presents a cross-platform empirical study of maintenance and support in nf-core, a large ecosystem of standardized Nextflow pipelines. We analyze 15,760 GitHub issues, 35,411 GitHub pull requests, and 895 Seqera Community Forum discussions to examine what maintenance and support concerns arise, how they differ across artifact types, which factors are associated with resolution outcomes, and how problems and solutions flow between repository-centered and community-centered spaces. We find that issues primarily capture repository-level problem reporting and maintenance coordination; pull requests capture implementation, review, testing, dependency, and template-update work; and forum discussions capture user-facing support around execution failures, containers, cloud and HPC environments, MultiQC reporting, and Nextflow usage. Resolution outcomes are associated with actionability, coordination, and diagnostic evidence. Issue closure is linked to assignees, comments, milestones, bug labels, error mentions, and version information. Pull request integration varies by author role, automation type, draft status, checklists, linked issues, and review routing. Forum accepted answers are more likely when discussions include code blocks, sustained interaction, and concrete technical evidence, while cloud, HPC, and workflow-semantics questions are harder to resolve. Cross-platform analysis reveals strong repository-internal traceability within GitHub, but limited explicit linkage between forum discussions and repository artifacts.

</details>


### [323] [How Do Practitioners Build SE Agents? Insights from a Mixed-Methods Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10856)
*Yunbo Lyu,David Williams,Jieke Shi,Zhensu Sun,Chao Peng,Zhou Yang,Federica Sarro,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过访谈20位和调查80位从业者，首次系统研究了SE智能体（基于LLM的软件工程智能体）的开发实践。研究发现：随着实现成本降低，瓶颈从编码转向需求、协调、审查和部署等非编码工作；总结出七阶段工作流和评估驱动开发范式；识别了六大挑战及应对实践，包括不可靠的评估信号、理解债务和模型更新带来的行为变化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管SE智能体（LLM驱动的软件工程智能体）迅速发展并被广泛采用，但从业者如何实际构建这些系统却鲜为人知。现有研究要么挖掘代码仓库，要么关注部署，很少有研究深入探究SE智能体的构建过程。

Method: 采用混合研究方法：(1) 对来自12个组织的20位从业者进行半结构化访谈；(2) 对80位从业者进行在线问卷调查。

Result: (1) 实现成本降低后，瓶颈从编码转移到需求、协调、审查、部署等非编码工作；(2) 总结了七阶段工作流；(3) 发现评估驱动开发范式，评估引导迭代，规格说明成为人和智能体共同读取的版本化工件；(4) 识别六大挑战：不可靠的评估信号、理解债务、模型更新带来的行为变化等。

Conclusion: SE智能体的开发正在从根本上改变软件工程流程，非编码工作的价值凸显，评估成为核心环节。研究为从业者提供了应对挑战的实践参考，也为未来工具和流程设计提供了指导。

Abstract: The rise of Software Engineering (SE) agents, i.e., LLM-based agents that can understand large codebases and carry out engineering tasks with limited human intervention, has been marked by rapid advances and adoption, but little is known about how developers build these systems in practice: existing studies mine repositories or examine deployment, but few investigate how SE agents are constructed. Through semi-structured interviews with 20 practitioners from 12 organizations and an online survey of 80 practitioners, this paper is the first to study how SE processes are changing in the development of SE agents and what challenges developers face. We find that as implementation becomes cheaper, bottlenecks shift rather than disappear: long-standing non-coding work such as requirements, coordination, review, and deployment becomes more visible, while reviewing and evaluating agent output becomes new and central. We characterize a seven-stage workflow and a shift toward evaluation-driven development, in which evaluation steers iteration and specifications become versioned artifacts read by both humans and agents. We further identify six challenges that teams face, together with the practices they adopt to address them, including unreliable evaluation signals, comprehension debt as code outpaces understanding, and behavioral changes introduced by provider-side model updates.

</details>


### [324] [BackendForge: Benchmarking Agentic End-to-End Code Generation with Backend Services](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11042)
*Yuzhe Guo,Mengzhou Wu,Yuan Cao,Jialei Wei,Dezhi Ran,Wei Yang,Tao Xie*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出 BackendForge 基准，用于评估 LLM 生成完整可部署后端服务的能力。该基准包含 56 个由真实开源应用重构的合同定义后端生成任务。通过测试代理和代码代理协同进化测试预言和参考实现来强化评估。最佳模型 GPT-5.5 在基础预言上通过 55.4% 的任务，但在最终预言上仅通过 28.6%，表明当前 LLM 能实现局部 API 行为，但难以生成完整后端服务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 LLM 评估多关注局部代码生成，缺乏对端到端可部署软件工件的行为正确性评估。后端服务因其可控但真实的特性成为理想评估场景，现有基准未能充分评估 LLM 在完整后端服务生成上的能力。

Method: 从真实开源应用重构出 56 个由 OpenAPI 合同定义的后端生成任务。采用双代理协同进化框架：测试代理提出基于规范的后端测试，代码代理修复参考实现。评估通过黑盒 HTTP 交互确定性检查部署行为是否符合合同。

Result: 最佳模型 GPT-5.5 在基础预言下成功率为 55.4%，在最终预言下仅 28.6%。基础与最终预言之间的显著差距表明当前 LLM 能实现局部 API 行为，但完整后端服务生成仍是挑战。

Conclusion: BackendForge 基准揭示了当前 LLM 在端到端后端服务生成上的能力局限，为未来研究提供了有价值的评估框架和方向。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in agentic coding settings, where they can inspect files, execute commands, run tests, observe failures, and iteratively revise code. This shift raises a central evaluation question: can an agentic LLM generate an end-to-end software artifact that is both deployable and behaviorally correct under execution? Backend services provide a controlled but realistic substrate for this evaluation. Their APIs expose application-level executable semantics, and deployed behavior can be checked deterministically against an OpenAPI contract through black-box HTTP interactions. We introduce BackendForge, a benchmark of 56 contract-defined backend generation tasks rewritten from real open-source applications. Given a visible specification and an OpenAPI contract, an LLM must generate a Dockerized service that is built, deployed, and evaluated only through HTTP tests. To strengthen evaluation without introducing hidden requirements, BackendForge uses a test agent and a code agent to co-evolve the test oracle and reference service, where the test agent proposes specification-grounded backend tests and the code agent repairs the reference implementation. Although the best-performing model, GPT-5.5, succeeds on 55.4\% of tasks under the base oracle, it succeeds on only 28.6\% under the final oracle. This gap suggests that current LLMs can implement many local API behaviors, but still struggle to produce complete backend services.

</details>


### [325] [Retrieval-Oriented Code Representations in Agentic Bug Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11046)
*Genevieve Caumartin,Tse-Hsun,Chen,Diego Elias Costa*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了在仓库级软件缺陷定位中，代码表示（如文件路径、原始源代码和LLM生成的文本表示）对定位效果和成本的影响。实验发现，角色感知摘要（Role-aware summaries）在Hit@5上比文件路径表示提升高达40%，而表示占用空间比原始源代码小10.4-20.9倍；结合互补表示和LLM排序可进一步提升效果。研究表明代码表示应作为智能体定位流水线中的一阶设计选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多使用传统信息检索方法基于文件路径和原始源代码进行文件级定位，但文本代码表示在检索和定位中的作用尚未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统研究不同代码表示对定位效果和成本的影响。

Method: 在Long Code Arena (LCA)和SWE-bench Verified (SWE)两个数据集上，比较五种代码表示（文件路径、原始源代码、三种LLM生成的文本表示）；采用词法检索、语义检索和基于LLM的检索，以及LLM后检索排序；通过表示占用空间（representation footprint）量化成本。

Result: 角色感知摘要比文件路径Hit@5提升40%，表示占用空间比原始源代码小10.4-20.9倍；结合互补表示和LLM排序分别再提升31.9%和42.0%；在Agentless案例中达94% Hit@6（+4.7%）。

Conclusion: 代码表示应作为智能体定位流水线中的一阶设计选择，需根据流水线阶段和成本-精度要求来指导选择；角色感知摘要提供了最佳的成本效益权衡。

Abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly being used to support software development, yet their performance in repository-level tasks depends on retrieving the right code context. Existing studies have explored file-level localization using traditional information retrieval over file paths and raw source code. However, the role of textual code representations in retrieval and localization remains underexplored.
  We study file-level bug localization as a representation-driven retrieval problem. Across the Long Code Arena (LCA) and SWE-bench Verified (SWE) datasets, we compare five code representations: file paths, raw source code, and three LLM-generated textual representations. Our experiments include lexical, semantic, and LLM-based retrieval, followed by LLM-based post-retrieval ranking. We quantify the cost incurred by a representation through the representation footprint. We find that the choice of code representation affects both localization effectiveness and cost. Role-aware summaries outperform file-path representations by up to 40% Hit@5 while requiring a representation footprint 10.4 to 20.9x smaller than raw source code. Combining complementary representation results and ranking retrieved candidates with an LLM provides further gains of up to 31.9% and 42.0%, respectively. Overall, role-aware summaries provide the best cost-effectiveness trade-off, while raw source code offers effectiveness in some settings at a significantly higher cost. A case study with Agentless reveals the utility of our techniques within a well-known pipeline, reaching 94% Hit@6 on file localization (+4.7% against the baseline). Our findings suggest that code representation should be treated as a first-class design choice in agentic localization pipelines, guided by pipeline stage and cost-accuracy requirements.

</details>


### [326] [AgentCheck: A Reproduce-Intervene-Mitigate Workbench for LLM Agents over MCP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11098)
*Aritra Mazumder,Nusrat jahan Lia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AgentCheck是一个开源工具，通过将MCP服务器转化为干预面，实现LLM智能体在部署前对工具故障（如超时、数据过时等12种类型）的可复现测试、干预验证和修复确认。实验发现最强智能体通过105/120场景，最弱仅通过77/120，且失败多为静默式错误而非崩溃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体评估假设工具正常运行，但实际部署中工具可能超时、返回过时数据或被投毒，开发者缺乏可控的复现、测试和验证故障修复的方法。

Method: AgentCheck构建"复现-干预-确认"循环：1) 记录智能体与真实工具的交互响应；2) 使用12种故障注入器扰动响应后重放；3) 匹配的工具调用从缓存重放，后续调用走真实工具；4) 开发者切换缓解策略后在相同故障下重新运行并观察结果。评分采用确定性通过/失败规则+LLM评判器（经人工标注验证）。

Result: 在5个智能体上测试，最强通过105/120场景，最弱仅77/120。失败多为静默式（自信使用错误输出而非崩溃）。对最弱智能体，重试缓解将超时故障成功率从30%提升至100%，但数据过时故障始终在30-40%左右。

Conclusion: AgentCheck使得工具故障模式在部署前变得可复现、可比较和可验证，帮助开发者提前发现并修复智能体在异常工具输出下的行为问题。

Abstract: Tool-using LLM agents are mostly evaluated assuming all tools work. When a tool times out, returns a week-stale value, or has its description poisoned in deployment, the developer needs a controlled way to reproduce the failure, test a fix, and confirm the fix worked before deployment. We present AgentCheck, an open-source web workbench that turns an MCP server into an intervention surface. AgentCheck runs an agent against its real tools and records every tool response, then re-runs the agent with the response perturbed by a fault (12 types) injector. Matching tool calls are replayed from cache, and later tool calls go live after the agent diverges. This yields a reproduce-intervene-confirm loop: the developer toggles a mitigation, re-runs against the identical fault, and sees if the failure goes away. Scoring has two parts: deterministic pass/fail rules, plus an LLM judge for interpretive labels, validated against human annotations. Across five agents, the best passes 105/120 scenarios and the weakest only 77. The failures are usually silent, confident use of incorrect tool outputs rather than crashes. On the weakest agent, a retry mitigation raises success on timeout error faults from as few as 30% of cases to 100%, whereas stale-data faults remain near 3-4 of 10 regardless of the mitigation. AgentCheck makes these failure modes reproducible, comparable, and verifiable before deployment.

</details>


### [327] [Know Before Fix: QA-Driven Repository Knowledge Acquisition for Software Issue Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11111)
*Haotian Lin,Silin Chen,Xiaodong Gu,Yuling Shi,Chengxi Pan,Jiaqi Ge,Mengfan Li,Jianghong Huang,Mengchieh Chuang,Beijun Shen,Haibing Guan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ACQUIRE是一个QA驱动的软件问题修复框架，通过解耦知识获取与补丁生成两个阶段，先让Questioner和Answerer协作获取结构化仓库知识，再由Resolver利用这些知识生成更准确的补丁。在SWE-bench Verified上Pass@1提升高达4.4个百分点。
