*Gui Ling,Zhihong Chen,Yu Li,Tong Xiong,Kunhai Lin,Kaixuan Zhang,Yuliang Yan,Dan Ou,Haihong Tang,Bo Zheng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Cluster-Ranked Identifier (CRID)，通过将DocID解耦为语义聚类和商业价值排序，解决生成式检索中的标识符冲突与编码目标不匹配问题。在淘宝3亿商品库上，CRID在Hitrate上超越最强向量检索基线，全流量部署带来+1.06% GMV提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式检索的DocID设计基于离散表示学习，存在两个关键问题：(1) 固有冲突问题；(2) DocID编码目标与系统业务优化目标之间存在不匹配。这些问题限制了检索质量和商业效果。

Method: 提出CRID方法，将DocID解耦为两个独立组件：语义聚类（semantic clustering）和商业价值排序（business-value ranking），生成无冲突标识符，并通过簇内重排序支持增量更新。同时提出分析框架，将检索增益分解为个性化偏好与统计先验泛化两部分，揭示语义簇大小如何控制两者平衡。

Result: 在淘宝3亿商品数据集上：(1) 在Top-K Hitrate指标上超越最强向量检索基线；(2) 全流量部署带来+1.06%的GMV提升。

Conclusion: 解耦DocID的设计思路有效解决了生成式检索中的冲突和优化目标不匹配问题，语义簇大小的调控可以平衡个性化偏好与统计先验泛化，为生成式检索在工业级搜索场景中的实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Generative Retrieval (GR) formulates retrieval as a sequence-to-sequence generation task, assigning each document a document identifier (DocID) and retrieving it through autoregressive decoding, making DocID design a critical factor in retrieval quality. However, existing schemes based on discrete representation learning suffer from inherent collision issues and create a mismatch between the DocID's encoding objective and the system's business optimization target. To address these limitations, we propose Cluster-Ranked Identifier (CRID), which decouples DocID into semantic clustering and business-value ranking, yielding collision-free identifiers that support incremental updates via intra-cluster reranking. We further introduce an analytical framework that decomposes retrieval gains into personalized preference and statistical prior generalization, revealing how semantic cluster size governs the balance between the two components. Experiments on a 300M-item Taobao e-commerce corpus show that CRID surpasses the strongest embedding-based retrieval baseline on top-K Hitrate, and delivers +1.06% GMV in full-traffic deployment.

</details>


### [365] [FAIR GraphRAG: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation Approach for Semantic Data Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11464)
*Marlena Flüh,Soo-Yon Kim,Carolin Victoria Schneider,Sandra Geisler*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出FAIR GraphRAG框架，通过将FAIR数字对象（FDOs）作为图检索基本单元，整合了FAIR数据原则与图增强检索技术，在生物医学数据集上显著提升了问答准确性、覆盖率和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG方法（包括GraphRAG）缺乏对底层知识资源的结构化FAIR化，限制了其在医学等复杂领域进行FAIR信息检索的潜力。

Method: 将FAIR数字对象（FDOs）作为图检索节点，每个节点包含核心数据、元数据、持久标识符和语义链接；利用LLM辅助模式构建和内容/元数据自动提取；由医生和计算机科学家协同设计。

Result: 在胃肠病学生物医学数据集（RNA测序数据）上验证，FAIR GraphRAG显著提升了问答准确性、覆盖率和可解释性，特别是在涉及元数据和本体链接的复杂查询上表现突出。

Conclusion: 证明了将FAIR数据实践与基于图的检索技术相结合的可行性，并有望应用于教育、商业等其他专业领域。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) addresses the limitations of Large Language Models (LLMs) when providing responses to domain-specific questions. Graph-based RAG approaches, such as GraphRAG, enhance retrieval by capturing semantic relationships within knowledge graphs (KGs). While the FAIR principles (Findability, Accessibility, Interoperability, and Reusability) are becoming prevalent for scientific data management, especially in complex domains such as medicine, existing RAG approaches lack a structured FAIRification of the underlying knowledge resources. This lack limits their potential for FAIR information retrieval in these domains. To address this gap, we introduce FAIR GraphRAG, a novel framework that integrates FAIR Digital Objects (FDOs) as the fundamental units of a graph-based retrieval system. Each graph node represents an FDO that incorporates core data, metadata, persistent identifiers, and semantic links. We leverage LLMs to support schema construction and automated extraction of content and metadata from data sources. The framework was co-designed by physicians and computer scientists to ensure technical and clinical relevance. We apply FAIR GraphRAG to a biomedical dataset in gastroenterology, demonstrating its applicability to RNA-sequencing data. Beyond ensuring adherence to the FAIR principles, FAIR GraphRAG significantly improves question answering accuracy, coverage, and explainability, particularly for complex queries involving metadata and ontology links. This work shows the feasibility of combining FAIR data practices with graph-based retrieval techniques. We see potential for applying our approach to other specialized fields such as education and business.

</details>


### [366] [Score-Only Distillation for Compact Dense Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11465)
*Kirill Dubovikov,Martin Takac,Salem Lahlou*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文研究通过从教师模型的评分向量中蒸馏知识来训练紧凑型检索器，在不访问教师隐藏状态的情况下，使用行中心评分向量目标和高效的内存实现方法。在8个任务上，蒸馏的0.6B学生模型在查询编码上提速4.7倍，文档编码上提速9.7倍，恢复了基础模型到教师模型之间最多50%的性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型嵌入模型能提升检索质量，但部署成本高昂。作者希望探索是否可以通过知识蒸馏，在不访问教师模型内部隐藏状态的情况下，训练出紧凑的学生检索器，从而在保持较好性能的同时显著降低推理成本。

Method: 使用行中心评分向量目标函数（row-centered score-vector objective），这是统一全配对PairMSE损失的内存高效实现。学生模型从由真实正例和数据生成管道产生的负候选构建的训练行中学习，教师评分向量作为监督信号。额外探索了学生-教师的难负样本挖掘。

Result: 在固定的8任务评估面板上，蒸馏协议恢复了基础模型到教师模型之间最多50%的性能差距。蒸馏后的0.6B学生模型在查询编码上比教师模型快4.7倍，文档编码上快9.7倍。但外部迁移性能仍不理想。

Conclusion: 实验证据支持在匹配的检索协议下对教师排序进行压缩是有效的，蒸馏可以在显著加速的同时恢复部分性能差距。但跨领域迁移能力仍有待改进。

Abstract: Large embedding models improve retrieval quality, but serving large encoders online is expensive. We study whether a compact retriever can learn teacher ranking behavior from score vectors without access to teacher hidden states. The student trains on rows built from ground-truth positives and negative candidates produced by our data generation pipeline; we evaluate student-teacher hard-negative mining separately as an extension. We use a row-centered score-vector objective, a memory-efficient implementation of uniform all-pairs PairMSE loss. On a fixed eight-task evaluation panel, our distillation protocol recovers up to 50\% of the base-to-teacher gap. The distilled 0.6B student is 4.7$\times$ faster for query encoding and 9.7$\times$ faster for document encoding than sequential online teacher fusion. External-transfer performance after distillation remains mixed, so our evidence supports compression of teacher rankings under matched retrieval protocols.

</details>


### [367] [Improved Answer Selection with Pre-Trained Word Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/1708.04326)
*Rishav Chakravarti,Jiri Navratil,Cicero Nogueira dos Santos*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文评估了基于预训练词嵌入的问答选择方法，在三个公开数据集上显著优于传统词频方法，并证明结合词嵌入特征与学习排序技术可达到与专用神经网络相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索词嵌入在答案选择任务中的有效性，以及如何将词嵌入特征与传统信息检索系统融合以捕捉问句与答案之间的语义相关性。

Method: 将预训练词嵌入整合到传统信息检索系统中，在监督和无监督两种设置下进行答案选择，并与传统词频方法和学习排序技术相结合。

Result: 在三个公开数据集上，词嵌入方法显著优于传统词频方法；结合词嵌入特征与学习排序技术可达到与最先进神经网络相近的性能。

Conclusion: 词嵌入特征与学习排序技术的结合是一种高效且成本较低的替代方案，能在答案选择任务中取得与专用深度神经网络相媲美的结果。

Abstract: This paper evaluates existing and newly proposed answer selection methods based on pre-trained word embeddings. Word embeddings are highly effective in various natural language processing tasks and their integration into traditional information retrieval (IR) systems allows for the capture of semantic relatedness between questions and answers. Empirical results on three publicly available data sets show significant gains over traditional term frequency based approaches in both supervised and unsupervised settings. We show that combining these word embedding features with traditional learning-to-rank techniques can achieve similar performance to state-of-the-art neural networks trained for the answer selection task.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [368] [Knowledge Graphs Meet Graph Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09666)
*Chengcheng Sun,Jiayun Tian,Cheng Zhai,Zhixiao Wang,Yajie Song,Xiaobin Rui,Jian Zhang,Philip S. Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于GNN-based知识图谱技术的两层分类体系，系统综述了GNN在知识图谱构建、嵌入、推理和应用全流程中的方法，并分析了优势与局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏对基于GNN的知识图谱技术进行系统性综述的研究，作者旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出两层分类框架：第一层为知识图谱技术管线（构建、嵌入、推理、应用），第二层为GNN视角（GCN、GAT、HGNN等模型）。基于此框架对各类方法进行详细回顾与分析。

Result: 系统梳理了GNN在知识图谱各环节的应用方法，总结了各方法的优势与局限性。

Conclusion: 指出当前GNN用于知识图谱技术中仍存在的挑战，并展望了未来研究方向。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm in Knowledge Graphs (KGs) due to their intrinsic ability to model graph-structured data. However, there remains a lack of a systematic review about GNN-based methodologies across the entire knowledge graph technologies pipeline. To address this gap, we first propose a novel two-level taxonomy framework for GNN-based knowledge graph technologies: the KG technologies pipeline and GNN-based perspective. Specifically, the knowledge graph technologies pipeline covers knowledge graph construction, knowledge graph embedding, knowledge reasoning and knowledge graph applications. Meanwhile, the GNN-based perspective provides a new categorization of knowledge graph technologies with GNN models, such as GCN, GAT, and HGNN. Then, we analyze the advantages of GNN technology based on the characteristics of different tasks in the knowledge graph lifecycle. Furthermore, we detailed review various GNN-based models for knowledge graph following the proposed taxonomy, and summarize strengths and limitations. Finally, we discuss unresolved challenges and outline promising directions for future research.

</details>


### [369] [Position: Every Ground Truth is a Human Construction, not an Objective Truth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09668)
*Charlotte Högberg,Ericka Johnson,Kiri L. Wagstaff*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文论证了机器学习中的"真实标签"并非客观中立的自然存在，而是由人类与技术共同构建的产物，提倡通过揭示其情境依赖性来提升模型的"情境化可靠性"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习社区普遍将ground truth视为天然给定的客观标准，忽视了其构建过程中的人为选择与技术中介，这可能导致模型评估的误导性和应用边界的模糊。

Method: 采用立场论文（position paper）的论述方式，通过概念分析和理论论证，批判性地审视ground truth的本质，并提出"情境化可靠性"（situated reliability）这一替代性评估框架。

Result: 指出ground truth是情境依赖的、非普适的；揭示其构建过程中隐藏的选择；提出关注情境化可靠性有助于明确模型适用的时间、地点和条件。

Conclusion: 将ground truth的构建过程透明化能够提升可靠性、可问责性和跨学科协作，呼吁社区正视并讨论这些通常被忽视的建构性选择。

Abstract: Ground truth datasets play a fundamental role as reference values in the training and evaluation of machine learning models. This position paper argues that ground truths are not neutral objective measurements that are naturally given, but instead that they are constructed by arrangements of humans and technologies. We argue that the ML community will benefit from articulating and discussing these often invisible or unreported choices and acknowledging that reference data sets are contingent, not universal. Focusing on the situated and context-dependent nature of ground truths can improve reliability by enabling a better informed perspective on where, when, and how the datasets, and the models they have shaped, can best be used. We argue for increasing `situated reliability' which includes articulating the limits and strengths of models and their truth claims. Finally, paying more attention to the construction of ground truths can support transparency, accountability, and interdisciplinary work.

</details>


### [370] [AuditWeave: A Tamper-Evident, Auditor-Navigable Evidence Layer for AI-Assisted and Data-Transformation Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09682)
*Vimal Nakrani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 AuditWeave，一个轻量级 Python 库，通过追加式哈希链账本记录 AI 辅助决策和数据转换工作流，实现端到端溯源与防篡改验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具面向机器学习工程师，缺乏供审查者追溯单个结论到证据的能力，且无法统一记录 RAG 流程和表格/湖仓转换。

Method: 设计了一个无运行时依赖的 Python 库，采用追加式哈希链账本、系统无关事件词汇表，支持端到端追踪与篡改检测。

Result: 每个事件开销数十微秒；在 2000 次随机试验中，对所有四类注入变异均能准确检测。

Conclusion: AuditWeave 在轻量级前提下实现了对 AI 辅助决策工作流的完整性保障与可审计性。

Abstract: AI systems are increasingly used to assist consequential decisions in regulated domains such as auditing, finance, and healthcare. This creates a recurring obligation: an organization must be able to reconstruct, after the fact, which evidence informed a given conclusion, and to show that the record of that reasoning was not altered. Existing tools address related but distinct problems - model observability, drift monitoring, governance reporting - and are built for the machine-learning engineer operating a system, not the reviewer who must trace one specific conclusion back to its supporting evidence. We present AuditWeave, a lightweight Python library, with no runtime dependencies, that records the steps of AI-assisted and data-transformation workflows into a single append-only, hash-chained ledger. A small, system-agnostic event vocabulary spans both retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines and tabular/lakehouse transformations, so a conclusion that draws on both can be traced end-to-end through one record. Within a sealed ledger, any modification, reordering, insertion, or deletion of events is detectable through chain verification. We describe the design and evaluate recording overhead, scalability, and tamper-detection correctness on the reference implementation. The integrity guarantees cost tens of microseconds per event, and, as the hash-chain construction implies, verification flagged every injected mutation across four mutation classes over 2,000 randomized trials.

</details>


### [371] [Ablation, Statistical Inference, and Validation for KV-Cache Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09683)
*Paolo D'Alberto,Ashish Siarasao,Elliott Delaye,Rajeev Patwari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统比较了Turbo-Quant和SpectralQuant两种KV缓存压缩方法，通过统计验证方法分离编解码器差异与实现方差，评估了包括WHT旋转+ Beta Lloyd-Max和QJL在内的非支配方案。关键发现：基于特征基的方法在重尾数据上因协方差不稳定而失效，但在结构化数据中表现优异；有效语义维度（d_eff）适应校准预算而非真实数据秩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统比较Turbo-Quant和SpectralQuant两种KV缓存压缩方法，通过统计验证框架分离编解码器间的系统性差异与实现方差，从而得出更可靠的对比结论。

Method: 采用统计验证方法论，系统对比非支配方案（包括WHT旋转+Beta Lloyd-Max和QJL），分离系统性编解码器差异与实现方差。

Result: 1）基于特征基的方法在重尾数据上因协方差不稳定而失效；2）但在结构化数据中表现优异；3）有效语义维度（d_eff）适应校准预算而非真实数据秩。

Conclusion: 不同KV缓存压缩方法在不同数据特征下各有优劣，特征基方法的效果取决于数据分布特性及校准预算，而非数据本身的内在秩。

Abstract: This study systematically compares Turbo-Quant and SpectralQuant KV-cache compression, evaluating non-dominated schemes, including WHT rotation with Beta Lloyd-Max and QJL, through a statistical validation methodology that separates systematic codec differences from implementation variance. Key findings reveal that while eigenbasis-based methods fail on heavy-tailed data due to covariance instability, they excel in structured regimes, with the effective semantic dimension ($d_{eff}$) adapting to calibration budgets rather than true data rank. (this is an abstract of the abstract thank you )

</details>


### [372] [Remembering Distinct Items, Not Tokens: A Learnable Dirichlet-Process Cache Between State-Space Models and Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09889)
*Siddharth Pal,Viktoria Rojkova*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于DP-means聚类规则的稀疏缓存方法，用于序列模型中的键值记忆存储。该缓存仅在输入为新颖项时分配存储槽，因此缓存大小由不同项的数量而非序列长度决定。作者开发了静态和自适应两种变体，在受控联想召回基准测试中，该方法能以更低的内存成本匹配全注意力机制的召回性能，并且分配规则可通过端到端学习获得。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定状态序列模型将无界的过去压缩为有界状态，其关联召回能力受限于状态维度；注意力机制通过为每个token保留键值条目突破了这一限制，但带来了二次计算复杂度和随序列增长的缓存开销。本文旨在探索中间地带：一种稀疏缓存，其大小由不同项的数量而非token数量决定，以平衡召回性能与存储效率。

Method: 采用DP-means聚类规则（Dirichlet过程混合的小方差极限）作为键值记忆操作符，而非传统的潜变量推断。开发了两种形式：静态缓存（固定浓度参数）和惊喜自适应变体（浓度随近期新颖率变化）。该分配规则可通过端到端学习实现：一个两参数的新颖性阈值门控可以在仅靠任务损失训练的情况下精确恢复该规则。

Result: 在受控联想召回基准测试中，该缓存方法匹配了全注意力机制的召回性能，同时仅存储不同项；在召回-大小前沿上优于固定预算的驱逐缓存；在状态空间主干上以最低内存同时回答了召回查询和长程聚合查询。在四个真实数据流（推荐、系统日志、临床事件、保险索赔）中确认了不同项存储属性。

Conclusion: 稀疏缓存通过记忆新颖项而非所有token，在联想召回能力和存储效率之间取得了有效平衡。关键的运作成分是归纳偏置而非模型容量——两参数门控能恢复最优规则，而过参数化门控则失败。该工作为在真实主干和真实语料上的语言验证提供了基础。

Abstract: Fixed-state sequence models compress an unbounded past into a bounded state, which caps their associative recall at roughly the state dimension; attention escapes the cap by keeping a key-value entry for every token, at quadratic compute and a cache that grows with the sequence. We study the middle ground: a sparse cache that allocates a slot only when an input is novel, so its size tracks the number of distinct items rather than the number of tokens. The allocation rule is the DP-means clustering rule, the small-variance limit of a Dirichlet-process mixture, used not as latent-variable inference but as the key-value memory operator for a deep recurrent backbone. We develop it in two forms, a static cache with a fixed concentration and a surprise-adaptive variant whose concentration follows the recent novelty rate. On a controlled associative-recall benchmark with redundancy we show that the cache matches full-attention recall while storing only the distinct items, that it dominates a fixed-budget eviction cache on the recall-versus-size frontier, and that on a state-space backbone it answers both a recall query and a long-range aggregate at the lowest memory of any model tested. The allocation is learnable end to end: a two-parameter novelty-threshold gate trained on the task loss alone recovers the rule exactly, whereas an over-parameterized gate fails, so the operative ingredient is the inductive bias rather than capacity. The evidence is a family of controlled mechanism studies at modest scale, with the distinct-items property confirmed on four real streams (recommendation, systems logs, clinical events, and insurance claims); a real-backbone, real-corpus language validation is pursued in a companion study.

</details>


### [373] [SciML in the Wild: A Diagnostic Study of When Structural Priors Help and When They Hurt](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09684)
*Vrishank Sai Anand,Prathamesh Dinesh Joshi,Raj Abhijit Dandekar,Rajat Dandekar,Sreedath Panat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过在宏观经济预测领域测试ARIMA、LSTM、NODE、PINN和UDE五种模型，发现没有模型能持续表现良好，但约束较少的模型（ARIMA和NODE）优于强约束模型（PINN和UDE），表明结构先验在数据生成过程不匹配时可能成为"误正则化器"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究当SciML方法依赖的结构先验假设被违反时会发生什么，即结构先验并非总能提升模型性能。

Method: 以宏观经济预测为压力测试领域，选用23个国家稀疏年度数据，评估ARIMA、LSTM、NODE、PINN、UDE五种模型，采用多个时间分割和五个随机种子进行实验。

Result: 所有模型均未实现持续强劲的预测性能；约束较少的ARIMA和NODE显著优于带启发式先验的PINN和UDE；结构先验在数据不匹配时起负作用。

Conclusion: 结构先验可能成为误正则化器，SciML实践者应首先测试结构是否真正有益，而非默认假定更多结构更好。

Abstract: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) methods such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), and Universal Differential Equations (UDEs) are most effective when structural priors reflect reliable governing dynamics. We ask what happens when this assumption is violated. Using macroeconomic forecasting as a stress-test domain, we evaluate five model families, ARIMA, LSTM, NODE, PINN, and UDE, across 23 countries using sparse annual data, multiple temporal splits, and five random seeds. Our results show that none of the evaluated models achieve consistently strong forecasting performance, highlighting the difficulty of low-frequency macroeconomic prediction. However, a clear relative hierarchy emerges: less-constrained models, particularly ARIMA and NODE, consistently outperform more-constrained heuristic-prior models such as PINN and UDE. Rather than treating this as a rejection of SciML, we interpret it as a diagnostic result: structural priors can act as misregularizers when they do not match the data-generating process. We identify failure modes including prior misalignment, regime shifts, structural breaks, and optimization instability, and argue that SciML practitioners should test whether structure helps before assuming that more structure is beneficial.

</details>


### [374] [BackgroundMellow: A Multi-Modal Cohesive Framework for Narrative-Driven Rich Cinematic Soundscape Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11364)
*Ajitesh Jamulkar,Aritra Hazra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出BackgroundMellow框架，通过主-专家智能体架构将长文本叙事转化为同步、沉浸式的电影级音频，无需真实数据标注，利用Tango2扩散模型、BGM检索器和NLP混音模块实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TTA方法只能合成孤立音效，缺乏叙事连贯性、时间对齐和电影级情感深度。

Method: 采用主-专家智能体架构：分解文本为多层音频线索，对每类声音使用合适的专家模型生成，叠加音景；基于Tango2潜扩散模型生成环境音，设计电影BGM检索器；使用NLP模块预测音频参数（开始时间、持续时长、响度）实现自动混音。

Result: 通过最近邻检索对YouTube电影预告片数据集进行时序同步、覆盖度和频谱丰富度的评估，验证了框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出了一种无需真实数据、可实现长文本叙事到同步电影级音频生成的框架。

Abstract: Generating immersive, synchronized and cinematic audio for long-form textual narratives remains a significant challenge in multi-modal AI. While current Text-to-Audio (TTA) frameworks successfully synthesize isolated sound effects, they struggle with narrative cohesion, temporal alignment, and cinematic emotional depth. We present BackgroundMellow, a framework that treats story-to-audio generation as a precise orchestration and signal processing problem. This framework is enabled without ground-truth through a master-specialist agent architecture that decomposes text into precise and multi-layered audio cues, generates each category of sounds with suitable specialist model, and superimposes the soundscapes to create a unified and aligned audio segment. Our pipeline is built over Tango2 latent diffusion model for environmental synthesis alongside a novel Cinematic BGM Retriever mined from professional soundtracks. To automate the sound mixing process, we use an NLP based module that predicts precise audio parameters, like start time, duration, and relative loudness, based on the narrative timeline. We further empirically evaluate and show the efficacy of the proposed framework leveraging nearest-neighbor retrieval against a curated dataset of YouTube cinematic trailers to measure temporal synchronization, coverage, and spectral richness.

</details>


### [375] [MawForge: Memory-Bounded Expert Materialization for Local Mixture-of-Experts Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09686)
*Craig Opie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MawForge提出了一种在统一内存机器上本地运行MoE模型的方法：将完整模型存储在磁盘上，按需将路由专家张量加载到有限执行缓存中，从而实现受限硬件上的MoE推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的MoE语言模型在本地推理时，即使只激活部分参数，完整模型及KV缓存等仍需要全部装入内存，导致统一内存的约束型设备难以运行MoE模型。

Method: MawForge将完整模型存储在磁盘上，常驻公共张量，并将路由专家张量按需加载到有界执行缓存中，以此实现本地MoE推理。

Result: MawForge作为有界执行机制和测量工具是有效的，但作为缓存最大化策略效果不佳；性能取决于专家重用与驻留内存、KV缓存大小、量化、路由局部性和macOS内存压力之间的平衡。

Conclusion: MawForge提供了一种在统一内存机器上本地运行MoE推理的可行方案，但需要仔细权衡多种因素才能获得良好性能。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models separate total parameter count from per-token active computation, but local inference systems often still require the full model, key-value cache, runtime buffers, and operatingsystem headroom to fit in fast memory. MawForge tests a different systems hypothesis: local MoE serving can be made practical on constrained unified-memory machines by storing the full model on disk, keeping common tensors resident, and materializing routed expert tensors into a bounded execution cache on demand. The central finding is that MawForge is effective as a bounded execution mechanism and measurement substrate for local MoE inference, but not as a cache-maximization policy. Performance depends on balancing expert reuse against resident footprint, KV-cache size, quantization, route locality, and macOS memory pressure.

</details>


### [376] [LayerNorm as Implicit Gain Control in Looped Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10681)
*Matthias M. M. Buehlmaier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究pre-LayerNorm循环Transformer中LayerNorm作为隐式增益控制器的作用，揭示线性carry的真实作用是稳定化而非记忆，梯度下降倾向于将记忆路由到非线性循环中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对循环Transformer中LayerNorm和线性carry的作用理解不足，特别是其稳定性机制与记忆功能的关系尚不明确。

Method: 通过理论分析证明pre-LayerNorm的增益控制使Jacobian非正规且渐近收缩，结合六项任务的训练实验（包括控制消融）进行验证。

Result: 发现线性carry的谱半径约束ρ<1是必要但非充分条件；梯度下降不通过carry实现记忆，而是利用非线性循环；仅在有轴对齐通道结构的任务上carry才被用于记忆。

Conclusion: 线性carry的核心作用是稳定化而非深度记忆，该结论存在边界条件（轴对齐通道结构任务除外）。

Abstract: In pre-LayerNorm looped transformers, LayerNorm inside the recurrent block acts as an implicit gain controller: by coupling the block's local Lipschitz constant inversely to the activation scale, it renders the recurrence Jacobian non-normal -- asymptotically contractive at every verified fixed point even where its operator norm exceeds 1 -- so the true stability budget is the spectral margin, not an operator-norm bound. That margin depletes as the carry $ρ\to 1$, and a minority of initializations never converge to a fixed point at all, so the diagonal carry constraint $ρ(\bar{A}) < 1$ is necessary but not sufficient for convergence of the full recurrence. Training experiments across six tasks, including a controlled ablation, reveal that the linear carry is not the depth-memory mechanism: gradient descent routes memory through the block's more expressive nonlinear recurrence and leaves the stability-constrained carry at rest -- the carry's role is stabilization, not memory. We characterize the boundary of this claim: on tasks with axis-aligned per-channel structure, gradient descent does recruit the carry. All results are derived analytically and verified in a from-scratch, CPU-scale implementation; verification at larger scale is needed.

</details>


### [377] [Prioritizing Search Space Regions in the Low Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09688)
*Blaž Pšeničnik,Borko Bošković,Jan Popić,Janez Brest*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种结合Thompson采样与并行自避走的高效混合搜索框架，用于解决低自相关二进制序列问题（LABS）。该方法通过多臂老虎机自适应分配搜索资源，结合GPU并行加速与Bloom过滤器，在长序列上取得了优于已知结果的新纪录（L=451时品质因子首次超过8.0），并在35个序列长度上改进了最佳结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LABS问题是通信、信号处理和卫星导航等领域中的重要组合优化难题，现有方法在面对长序列时搜索效率不足，难以获得高品因子。因此需要一种更智能、可扩展的资源分配与搜索策略，以突破当前方法在长序列上的瓶颈。

Method: 提出混合搜索框架，核心包括：(1) 将搜索空间划分为约束类（分区），并将各分区建模为多臂老虎机中的臂，使用Thompson采样动态分配计算资源；(2) 并行自避走策略进行局部搜索；(3) GPU并行加速、共享后验更新、高效邻域评估及Bloom过滤器防止循环；(4) 两阶段优化：先在约束偏斜对称空间中搜索，再在无约束空间中精炼最佳候选解。

Result: 在长序列实验上，该方法在450≤L≤527范围内的35个序列长度以及L=573上改进了此前最佳结果。特别地，在L=451时获得了品质因子超过8.0的新最长序列记录。此外，实验验证了Thompson采样能有效优先选择表现更好的分区，证实了在线数据驱动资源分配在LABS优化中的价值。

Conclusion: 所提出的框架为LABS问题提供了一种可扩展、高效的品质因子最大化策略，在长序列上实现了显著的性能突破。Thompson采样驱动的自适应资源分配与GPU并行加速的结合，为硬组合优化问题的求解提供了新的有效范式。

Abstract: Low autocorrelation binary sequences problem (LABS) is a hard combinatorial optimization challenge with important applications in communications, signal processing, and satellite navigation. This paper proposes a hybrid search framework that combines Thompson sampling with parallel self-avoiding walks to adaptively allocate computational effort across restriction classes of the LABS search space. By modeling partitions as arms in a multi-armed bandit setting, the proposed method dynamically shifts search resources toward partitions that empirically produce higher merit factors while maintaining exploration of less-sampled regions. The approach is further accelerated through GPU-parallel execution, shared posterior updates, efficient neighborhood evaluation, and a Bloom filter for cycle prevention. In addition, we use a two-stage optimization strategy that first searches constrained partitioned skew-symmetric spaces and then refines the best candidates in the unrestricted space. Experiments on long binary sequences show that the proposed method improves the previously best-known results for 35 sequence lengths in the range $450 \le L \le 527$ and for $L=573$. In particular, we report a new longest sequence with merit factor exceeding $8.0$, obtained for $L=451$. The results also show that Thompson sampling effectively prioritizes partitions with better observed performance, confirming the value of online, data-driven resource allocation in LABS optimization. Overall, the proposed framework provides a scalable and effective strategy for high-performance merit factor maximization.

</details>


### [378] [Event-based Neural Decoding for Neuroprosthetic Motor Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11445)
*Khaleelulla Khan Nazeer,Sirine Arfa,Matthias Jobst,Richard George,Christian Mayr*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于事件门控循环单元的高效神经解码方法，通过生成带有分级脉冲的稀疏通信模式，在保持低功耗和低延迟的同时，实现了优于传统脉冲神经网络的性能，为设备端神经解码提供了新可能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能假肢依赖深度神经网络，存在延迟高、能耗大、空间需求大的问题；有线连接限制患者活动，无线连接又限制信息传输量；脉冲神经网络虽能压缩通信且功耗低，但性能落后于深度学习模型。因此需要在任务性能与效率之间取得平衡。

Method: 提出一种高性能神经解码方法：使用事件门控循环单元（event-based gated recurrent unit）生成带有分级脉冲（graded spikes）的稀疏通信模式；结合高效的训练方法和稀疏推理机制。

Result: 所提模型在任务性能上超越了传统脉冲神经网络，同时实现了稀疏通信和低功耗推理，在性能与效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Conclusion: 该方法为设备端神经解码开辟了新途径，有望推动智能假肢在实际应用中的普及。

Abstract: A substantial number of patients experience diminished mobility due to disabilities, diseases, or accidents. Although modern prostheses, powered by deep neural networks, hold the promise of significantly enhancing the quality of life for these individuals, their widespread adoption is hindered by significant latency, energy consumption, and spatial requirements. Wired connections to external high-performance processors restrict patient mobility, while wireless connections limit the volume of information that can be transmitted to these processors. Spiking neural networks offer the potential for compressed communication and low-power inference, yet they often lag behind state-of-the-art deep learning models in various applications. In this study, we propose a high-performance neural decoding method that effectively balances task performance and efficiency. An eventbased gated recurrent unit generates a sparse communication pattern with graded spikes, surpassing classical spiking neural networks in terms of task performance. Utilising an efficient training method and sparse inference, our model presents new opportunities for on-device neural decoding.

</details>


### [379] [What Context Does a Coding Agent Actually Need to Act?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09691)
*Brian Sam-Bodden*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究代码编辑智能体实际需要的最小上下文信息，发现核心信号仅存在于被编辑代码本身，自然语言摘要和周围上下文对解决实际问题的贡献极小，而压缩上下文能以1/3的token达到完整文件的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码智能体倾向于使用超大上下文窗口（如整个代码仓库），但大多数阅读是浪费的。作者希望探究在代码编辑这一关键任务中，智能体真正需要的最小上下文是什么。

Method: 将定位（finding）与执行（acting）分离，使用oracle固定定位，仅变化代码表示方式。在SWE-bench Verified上评估不同上下文表示对实际问题解决率的影响，包括自然语言摘要、周围上下文裁剪、UML骨架/签名替代、压缩上下文等方案。

Result: 1) 自然语言摘要几乎无法回答源码能回答的行为问题（4/45 vs 27/45），且前沿模型与3B模型的摘要效果一样差。2) 将多余文件内容替换为UML骨架和签名与直接删除没有显著差异（p=0.75）。3) 压缩上下文能以1/3的token匹配完整文件效果：解决一个问题平均需要19K而非94K token。4) 温度=0的API推理在相同输入下仍有约9%的实例级结果翻转，构成噪声基底。

Conclusion: 代码编辑智能体的核心需求是被编辑代码本身的源代码表示，自然语言摘要和周围上下文的贡献极低。压缩上下文是有效且高效的策略。同时，研究揭示了SWE-bench上存在约9%的噪声基底，需要关注。

Abstract: A modern coding agent can hold an entire repository in its context window. Most of its reading is wasted -- and the interesting question is not how much context an agent can use, but what it actually \emph{needs}. We study that question at the moment it matters most: when the agent must \emph{edit} code. Separating \emph{finding} the work site from \emph{acting} on it, we hold localization fixed with an oracle, vary only how the code is represented, and score context against real issue resolution on SWE-bench Verified. The answer is starkly minimal. The signal lives in the code being edited itself: natural-language summaries of it answer almost none of the behavioral questions that the source answers ($4/45$ vs.\ $27/45$, held-out repositories, independent judge), and the gap belongs to the representation, not the summarizer -- a frontier model's summaries score exactly as poorly as a 3B model's. The surrounding context hardly matters either: across every multi-file instance in Verified, under a protocol frozen before any data, rendering a file's remainder as UML skeletons and signatures resolves no more issues than deleting that remainder outright ($N{=}70$, exact McNemar $p{=}0.75$). That was our registered hypothesis, and it failed. Compressed context, meanwhile, matches whole files at a third of the tokens: a resolved issue costs $19$K context tokens, not $94$K. The instrument also yielded a finding the field should keep: temperature-0 API inference flips ${\sim}9\%$ of per-instance outcomes between byte-identical runs. That is a noise floor under every small effect reported on this benchmark, including ours. We release the instrument -- gold-validated environments, per-instance proof that every reference edit is expressible from every arm's context, deterministic patch construction, and pre-registered hypotheses whose nulls we publish.

</details>


### [380] [Transformer-Guided Swarm Intelligence for Frugal Neural Architecture Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11826)
*Romain Amigon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种混合强化学习与人工蜂群算法的轻量级神经架构搜索框架，在消费级GPU上3小时内即可搜索出高效紧凑的深度学习模型，打破了NAS对大规模计算资源的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NAS需要数千GPU天的计算资源，门槛极高，普通研究者难以使用。本文旨在将NAS民主化，使其能在消费级硬件上运行。

Method: 采用双阶段混合策略：1）宏观搜索层：基于强化学习训练的Transformer控制器进行全局拓扑探索，并引入动态熵机制防止过早收敛；2）微观挖掘层：利用人工蜂群算法进行局部精细优化。同时通过惩罚网络深度的方式主动抑制模型臃肿。

Result: 在RTX 3060上，CIFAR-10达到84.85%准确率（约17.4万参数），仅需3小时。信用卡欺诈检测任务F1-Score达0.71（约4600参数）。模型尺寸显著小于ResNet-20等标准基线。

Conclusion: 该方法证明了消费级硬件上进行高效NAS的可行性，可生成适合边缘部署的参数高效型定制化模型。

Abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has automated the design of deep learning models but traditionally requires massive computational resources, often measured in thousands of GPU-days. In this paper, we propose a frugal and memetic NAS framework designed to democratize architecture design on consumer-grade hardware. Our approach combines the global macro-search capabilities of an autoregressive Transformer controller, trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL), with the local micro-exploitation of an Artificial Bee Colony (ABC) algorithm. To prevent premature convergence during the RL phase, we introduce a dynamic entropy mechanism that forces topological exploration upon detection of performance stagnation. Evaluated on a standard GPU (NVIDIA RTX 3060), our hybrid method effectively resolves the "cold-start" problem inherent in metaheuristics. By algorithmically penalizing network depth, our framework actively mitigates model bloat: on the CIFAR-10 dataset, it discovers an efficient architecture reaching 84.85% accuracy with only $\sim$174,000 parameters (significantly smaller than standard baselines like ResNet-20) in 3 hours of search time. Furthermore, we demonstrate the framework's flexibility by applying it to credit card fraud detection, directly optimizing the F1-Score on highly imbalanced tabular data to reach a F1-Score of 0.71 with a compact network of $\sim$4,600 parameters. These results suggest that our approach can yield tailored, accessible, and highly parameter-efficient deep learning models suitable for edge deployment.

</details>


### [381] [Reference-Based Distillation Detection in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09692)
*Rajat Rawat,Sizhe Chen,Akshay Anand,Michael Duan,Bob Rotsted,Sewon Min*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于参考模型的蒸馏检测方法，通过成员推断比较学生模型对不同候选教师输出的偏好，从而识别出真正的教师模型。该方法在单教师蒸馏场景中几乎完美检测，并成功应用于QwQ、DeepSeek-R1、GPT-OSS等当代模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 模型蒸馏虽广泛用于提升性能，但存在不公平优势和违反政策的问题，因此需要检测一个模型是否是从另一个模型蒸馏而来。

Method: 提出基于参考模型的成员推断方法，通过比较学生模型对不同候选教师输出的偏好来识别教师；为处理未知蒸馏流程，从模型输出推断代理提示模板；并识别了o1/o3模型特有的字形级信号。

Result: 在单教师蒸馏场景中，该方法在受控实验和真实模型上均以近乎完美的准确率识别出真正的教师模型；建立了教师归因和蒸馏检测的统计检验；扩展到了开放世界场景。

Conclusion: 该方法有效检测模型蒸馏关系，并对QwQ、DeepSeek-R1、GPT-OSS等当代模型之间的潜在蒸馏关系提供了新证据。

Abstract: Model distillation -- training on outputs from stronger third-party models -- is widely used to boost performance, but raises concerns about unfair advantages and policy violations. This motivates a fundamental question: can we detect whether a model was distilled from another? We show that, while identifying a teacher model from a student in isolation is highly challenging, it becomes tractable in a reference-based setting: given a model and an earlier-generation checkpoint from the same lineage, we can identify the teacher model used to train the later checkpoint. We introduce a distillation detection method based on reference-based membership inference. By comparing how strongly a student model preferentially aligns with outputs from different candidate teachers relative to a reference checkpoint, our method identifies the most likely teacher and detects evidence of distillation. To handle unknown distillation pipelines such as hidden prompts, we infer proxy prompt templates directly from model outputs. We additionally identify a distinctive glyph-level signal specific to o1/o3 models. Evaluating distillation detection is challenging because modern model lineages are already heavily entangled. To address this, we develop a hybrid evaluation spanning both controlled distillation experiments and real-world models. Across both settings, our approach recovers the true teacher with near-perfect accuracy in single-teacher distillation scenarios, even when the underlying distillation pipeline is largely unknown. We further introduce statistical tests for both teacher attribution and distillation detection, and extend our framework to open-world settings where no teacher is guaranteed to be present among the candidates. Applying our method to contemporary models yields new evidence regarding potential distillation relationships involving QwQ, DeepSeek-R1, and GPT-OSS.

</details>


### [382] [Depth-Entropy Guided Sampling for Training-Free LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09693)
*Zibin Meng,Peng Xie,Kani Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DEGS，一种无需训练、仅在测试时使用的采样方法，通过利用Transformer层间熵崩塌作为内在质量信号，结合似然与深度熵结构进行MCMC采样，在不训练、无奖励模型、无标注数据的情况下，性能接近甚至超越GRPO强化学习方法，尤其是在领域外和困难样本上提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习虽能提升LLM推理能力，但需要昂贵训练、精心策划的数据和奖励信号。现有测试时采样方法只利用输出层似然，忽略了Transformer内部前向传播动力学信息。作者希望利用层间熵崩塌这一内在信号来指导采样，避免训练开销。

Method: 定义每个序列的崩塌深度D(x)，结合序列似然与深度熵结构构建联合目标π(x) ∝ p(x)^α exp(βD(x))，在MCMC幂采样框架（DEGS-MCMC）中实现。利用logit-lens解码各层熵的"晚期崩塌"现象作为质量信号。

Result: 在三个开源模型和四个推理基准上，DEGS达到SOTA免训练准确率；在领域外和困难子集上增益最大；壁钟开销仅个位数百分比。在数学分集上略逊于GRPO，但在GPQA领域外任务上全面超越GRPO。

Conclusion: DEGS表明，无需训练、无需奖励模型、无需标注数据，仅利用Transformer内部的熵崩塌结构即可大幅提升推理性能，为测试时计算与内在信号利用提供了新方向。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become the dominant paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models, but it requires expensive training, curated data, and reward signals. Recent work shows that sampling from sharpened base-model distributions at test time recovers much of the RL gain, yet existing methods rely solely on output-layer likelihoods and ignore the transformer's internal forward-pass dynamics. We introduce Depth-Entropy Guided Sampling (DEGS), a training-free, test-time method that exploits layer-wise entropy collapse as an intrinsic quality signal. We observe that stronger reasoners -- including RL-posttrained variants -- exhibit a distinctive "late collapse": logit-lens decoded entropy stays elevated until deeper layers before converging. We define a per-sequence collapse depth $D(\mathbf{x})$ and a joint objective $π(\mathbf{x}) \propto p(\mathbf{x})^α\exp(βD(\mathbf{x}))$ that combines sequence likelihood with this depth-entropy structure, instantiated inside an MCMC power-sampling framework (DEGS-MCMC). Across three open-weight models and four reasoning benchmarks, this near-chance per-candidate signal compounds over the sampling trajectory into state-of-the-art training-free accuracy, with gains largest out of domain and on the harder splits -- exactly where likelihood alone falls short -- at single-digit-percent wall-clock overhead. DEGS narrowly trails an in-house GRPO reference on the math splits GRPO was trained for, yet surpasses it out of domain on GPQA for all three models, without any training, reward model, or labeled data.

</details>


### [383] [Low-Rank Attention Residuals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09694)
*Jonathan Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LR-AttnRes通过低秩路由键解耦深度注意力残差中的路由与表征，在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准注意力残差（Attention Residuals）将每个子层输出同时作为全维度的键和值，导致路由与表征耦合，且路由分数随隐藏维度d缩放，效率低下。

Method: 提出低秩注意力残差（LR-AttnRes），保留全维度残差值，但使用r维（r≪d）低秩键进行路由。包括两种变体：Projected LR-AttnRes从现有输出投影中学习低秩键；Sliced LR-AttnRes直接取每个值的最后r维作为路由键，消除额外的键投影路径。

Result: 综合实验表明，深度路由在远少于模型宽度的维度下仍能有效工作；Projected版达到最佳验证损失，Sliced版在减少残差侧FLOPs的同时仍能提升性能。

Conclusion: 低秩路由键足以实现有效的深度路由，解耦路由与表征可兼顾效率与性能。

Abstract: Attention Residuals replace the fixed residual sum with depthwise attention over previous sub-layer outputs in large language models (LLMs), but use each output as both a full-dimensional key and value. This couples routing with representation and makes depth-routing scores scale with the hidden width $d$. We propose Low-Rank Attention Residuals (LR-AttnRes), which keep full-dimensional residual values while using $r$-dimensional keys, with $r \ll d$, for routing. Projected LR-AttnRes emits learned low-rank keys from existing output projections, decoupling routing from residual content and achieving the best validation loss among the variants tested. Sliced LR-AttnRes uses the last $r$ dimensions of each value as the routing key, removing the auxiliary key-projection path and reducing residual-side FLOPs while still improving performance. Comprehensive sweeps show that depthwise routing can be effective with far fewer dimensions than the model width. We release code and models to facilitate future research.

</details>


### [384] [FedCausal-Dyn: A Causal-Dynamic Paradigm for Federated Learning under Dynamic Feature Drift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09695)
*Kaijie Chen,Alex Johnson,Maria Garcia,Wei Zhang,Daniel Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedCausal-Dyn框架，通过因果-动态范式解决联邦学习中动态特征漂移问题，在三个基准上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习方法假设静态特征漂移，在金融科技等真实场景中数据分布随时间动态变化时效果不佳。

Method: 1）因果-域特征分离（对抗训练解耦不变/虚假特征）；2）可靠动态原型聚合（按可靠性加权）；3）因果特征引导的协同正则化（原型对比对齐+域不变性）。

Result: 在三个联邦域泛化基准上取得最高平均准确率和最稳定结果，消融实验验证各组件贡献。

Conclusion: FedCausal-Dyn为动态特征漂移下的联邦学习提供了鲁棒且原则性的解决方案。

Abstract: This paper addresses the challenging problem of dynamic feature drift in federated learning, where data distributions evolve across clients and over time -- a common scenario in real-world applications like financial technology. Existing approaches often assume static drift, limiting their effectiveness in non-stationary environments. To overcome this, we propose \textbf{FedCausal-Dyn}, a novel federated learning framework built on a causal-dynamic paradigm. Its key innovation is \textit{causal-domain feature separation}, which disentangles domain-invariant causal features from spurious, domain-specific variations via specialized projection heads and adversarial training. This enables \textit{reliable and dynamic prototype aggregation}, weighting local class prototypes by estimated reliability before global aggregation. We further introduce \textit{causal-feature guided collaborative regularization}, unifying prototype contrastive alignment and domain invariance into a cohesive objective. Extensive experiments on three federated domain generalization benchmarks demonstrate that FedCausal-Dyn consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, with the highest average accuracy and the most stable results. Ablation studies confirm each component's critical contribution. Our work provides a robust and principled solution for federated learning under dynamic feature drift.

</details>


### [385] [Mitigating Early Training Collapse in CTR Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09696)
*Ergun Biçici,Erkan Çetinyamaç*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现了CTR预测模型中首个训练轮次后验证性能骤降的问题，通过分析工业级大数据集，提出控制特征稀疏性（移除高稀疏特征、聚合低频特征值）能有效稳定训练、提升模型性能，优于单纯降低学习率的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度CTR预测模型在首个训练轮次后验证性能急剧下降，限制了有效学习和模型表现，亟需理解该现象并寻找实用的缓解策略。

Method: 基于大规模工业数据集分析验证性能下降行为，比较降低学习率与控制特征稀疏性（移除高稀疏特征、聚合低频特征值）两种缓解策略的效果。

Result: 降低学习率仅带来微小改进；控制特征稀疏性（移除高稀疏特征、聚合低频值）能显著稳定训练，将有效学习延长至多轮，并提升离线评估与在线系统性能。

Conclusion: 特征稀疏性是导致CTR模型首个轮次后验证性能下降的关键因素，通过稀疏性控制可有效改善训练稳定性与模型表现。

Abstract: Deep neural models for click-through rate prediction often exhibit a sharp decline in validation performance immediately after the first training epoch despite continued improvement in training loss. This instability restricts effective learning and limits model performance. In this study, we analyze this behavior using large-scale industrial datasets and evaluate practical mitigation strategies. While reducing the learning rate provides only incremental gains, controlling feature sparsity yields substantial improvements. Removing highly sparse features and aggregating infrequent feature values stabilizes training, extends useful learning beyond a single epoch, and improves both offline evaluation metrics and online system performance.

</details>


### [386] [Safe responses matter: Output-aware safety guardrail mitigate over-refusal in MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09697)
*Jiayi Li,Kun Zhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出输出感知的安全护栏(OutGuard)，通过在MLLM的隐藏状态空间中训练轻量级分类器来预测即将生成的响应是否不安全，从而在不牺牲实用性的前提下实现安全保护，显著减少过度拒绝问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM的安全机制面临安全性与实用性之间的根本权衡：模型微调虽能实现稳健安全但损害通用能力；输入侧安全护栏虽轻量但存在严重的过度拒绝问题，会不加区分地阻止良性查询或模型本可以通过拒绝或建议性响应安全回答的请求。根本原因在于输入感知范式：安全护栏在不考虑模型自身是否能够生成安全响应的情况下做出安全决策。

Method: 提出输出感知的安全护栏范式转变，在模型隐藏状态空间内进行操作，通过多实例对比学习训练轻量级分类器，预测即将生成的输出是否不安全，从而仅在模型实际响应可能有害时才进行精准干预。

Result: 实验证明，输出感知的安全护栏在安全性能上与现有方法相当，同时大幅减少过度拒绝，保留了模型的实用性和内置安全能力。

Conclusion: 输出感知范式可以替代传统的输入感知安全护栏，在保证安全性的同时更好地维护用户体验和模型实用性。

Abstract: Existing safety mechanisms for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) face a fundamental trade-off between safety and utility. Model fine-tuning achieves robust safety but compromises general utility. Input-side safety guardrails offer a lightweight alternative, yet they suffer from severe over-refusal, indiscriminately blocking benign queries or those the model could have safely answered through refusal or advisory responses. We identify that the root cause of over-refusal lies in the input-aware paradigm: safety guardrails make safety decisions without considering whether the model itself is capable of generating safe responses. Usually, MLLMs already possess intrinsic safety mechanisms that can transform harmful inputs into harmless outputs, but input-side safety guardrails override this capability, degrading user experience. Motivated by this insight, we propose a paradigm shift toward output-aware safety guardrails. Our method operates within the model's hidden state space to predict whether the forthcoming generation will be unsafe before it is fully produced. By training a lightweight classifier via multi-instance contrastive learning on hidden state representations, our approach distinguishes between inputs that will lead to unsafe outputs and those that will not, even when the inputs themselves contain risky elements. This enables precise intervention only when the model's actual response would be harmful. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our output-aware safety guardrail matches the safety performance of existing methods while drastically reducing over-refusal, preserving the model's utility and built-in safety capabilities. Code is available at: https://github.com/kunzhan/OutGuard

</details>


### [387] [Quantum-Inspired Contextual Learning for Sparse-Ring Fraud Detection in Dynamic Transaction Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09704)
*Behnam Tonekaboni,Hiroshi Yamauchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对动态金融交易图中的欺诈检测问题，提出了一个探索性基准测试和量子启发式建模原型。研究发现，结合身份保留图特征与拓扑摘要的混合表示效果最佳，而量子启发的上下文机器学习（CML）是处理跨时间和图结构分布证据的欺诈模式的有前途的模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的单笔交易分析难以识别协同欺诈（如稀疏环欺诈），因为欺诈模式可能跨越多个时间段和图结构分布，现有模型缺乏整合时间和图结构证据的能力。

Method: 使用合成交易模拟器生成包含完整稀疏环注入和不完整环（诱饵）的动态图数据，采用滚动窗口聚合日交易图，提取原始图特征、持续同调拓扑摘要及混合特征向量，比较门控循环单元（GRU）与量子启发的上下文机器学习（CML）作为序列级分类器。

Result: 仅使用拓扑摘要无法有效解决监督式环补全任务（因丢失账户身份和边方向信息）；混合表示（身份保留图特征+拓扑摘要）表现最佳；CML在处理分布式证据的欺诈模式上展现出潜力。

Conclusion: 拓扑信息最适合作为动态图特征的上下文层，而非单独使用；CML是处理跨时间和关系上下文分布证据的欺诈检测任务的有前景的候选模型。

Abstract: We present an exploratory benchmark and quantum-inspired modeling prototype for fraud screening in dynamic financial transaction graphs. Coordinated fraud may not be visible from individual transactions alone, but may emerge as a multi-period relational pattern. We focus on sparse-ring fraud, a stylized pattern in which a completed directed cycle is distributed across several days, requiring models to integrate evidence across both time and graph structure. We study this problem using a synthetic transaction simulator with completed sparse-ring injections and broken-ring decoys. Daily directed transaction graphs are aggregated into rolling windows and represented using raw graph features, persistent-homology summaries, or hybrid feature vectors that combine both. We compare a gated recurrent unit (GRU) baseline with quantum-inspired Contextual Machine Learning (CML) as sequence-level classifiers. Because the benchmark uses synthetic data, a modest sample size, and sequence-level labels, the results are exploratory. Within this scope, topology-only summaries are too compressed to solve the supervised ring-completion task by themselves, largely because they remove account-pair identity and edge direction. The strongest results come from hybrid representations that combine identity-preserving graph features with topological summaries. These findings suggest that topology is most useful as a contextual layer over dynamic graph features, and that CML is a promising candidate model for fraud patterns whose evidence is distributed across temporal and relational context.

</details>


### [388] [Quota Marketplace: Dynamic Pricing for Efficient Allocation of ML Training Resources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09802)
*Balasubramanian Sivan,Renato Paes Leme,Mihai Tiuca,Ian McFarlane,Vasilis Gkatzelis,Nehal Mehta,Soheil Hassas Yeganeh,Vahab Mirrokni,Amin Vahdat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Quota Marketplace，一个基于市场的机制，用于在异构价值需求下高效分配ML训练芯片，兼顾帕累托效率与最大-最小公平性，并在Google内部成功部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有资源分配机制（如Karma）在处理具有异构价值的需求时，无法同时保证帕累托效率和最大-最小公平性，而实际组织中不同工作负载的价值天然存在差异，亟需能应对这一现实问题的分配策略。

Method: 设计并实现Quota Marketplace，允许用户表达工作负载的价值，基于供需波动进行动态定价，通过市场机制实现资源分配，并在Google内部进行实际部署与验证。

Result: 在Google内部成功部署，展示了实际影响指标；理论上证明了该方法在异构价值场景下仍能实现帕累托效率和最大-最小公平性；有效处理了多项业务关键需求。

Conclusion: 基于市场的分配机制能更好地对齐组织优先级，在资源稀缺且价值异构的环境中，同时兼顾效率与公平，为ML训练资源分配提供了可行且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: The escalating demand for Machine Learning (ML) training resources in recent years has resulted in a substantial gap between the high demand and the available supply. Efficient allocation of these scarce and expensive resources is crucial for organizations to maximize their return on investment. Existing resource allocation mechanisms, like Karma [OSDI'23], are designed to guarantee Pareto efficiency and max-min fairness in settings with dynamic (time-varying) user demands, but fail to preserve these key properties in the presence of demands with heterogeneous values. Given the ubiquity and inevitability of heterogeneity in organizational values of different workloads, effective resource allocation policies must accommodate these variations.
  In this paper, we describe the design, implementation, deployment, and theoretical analysis of Quota Marketplace, a market-based mechanism to efficiently allocate ML training chips (like GPUs), explicitly addressing scenarios with demands of heterogeneous value. We detail the implementation of this mechanism within Google and present metrics that demonstrate its impact. We also discuss many business-critical requirements that the Quota Marketplace handles quite effectively, and document the gains and opportunities it has unlocked. We establish theoretically how this market-based approach achieves the essential properties of Pareto efficiency and max-min fairness by allowing the users to express the value of their workloads and enabling dynamic resource pricing based on supply and demand fluctuations. Ultimately, the market facilitates resource allocation that aligns with organizational priorities.

</details>


### [389] [Manifold Constrained Tabular Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09710)
*Tian Li,Lucy Robinson,Varun Ojha,Huizhi Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HDE-Net，一种在双曲空间中构建层次化决策建模的流形约束深度神经网络，专门用于表格分类任务。通过在庞加莱球中嵌入潜在决策节点并引入软决策路由机制，HDE-Net在30个数据集上取得了最佳平均排名，超越了GBDT和现有表格DNN。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表格分类通常由局部、条件触发的规则而非平滑全局模式主导，但现有表格DNN基于欧几里得空间构建，偏好平滑变化和语义局部性，这种几何不匹配导致DNN难以高效表达表格分类中离散的、规则划分的结构。

Method: 1) 将异构特征抽象为统一的潜在决策节点(LDNs)，嵌入庞加莱球形成类似树状推理的连续表示；2) 针对数值特征引入软决策路由机制，以可微分方式近似基于范围的局部规则；3) 提出熵感知容量分配算法，自适应调整每个数值特征的LDN数量以平衡表达力与复杂度。

Result: 在TALENT-tiny-core基准测试的30个数据集上，HDE-Net取得最佳平均排名，同时优于工业级GBDT和近年提出的表格DNN，并保持高效率。

Conclusion: 双曲空间更适合建模表格分类中离散、层次化的决策结构，软决策路由和熵感知容量分配是有效提升数值特征表达能力的关键组件。

Abstract: Tabular classification is often governed by local, condition-triggered rules rather than smooth global patterns. However, tabular deep neural networks (DNNs) are typically built upon Euclidean representations that favor smooth variations and semantic locality. This potential geometric mismatch can make it challenging for tabular DNNs to efficiently represent the discrete, rule-partitioned structures often underlying tabular classification. To address this issue, we propose HDE-Net, a manifold-constrained DNN that enables hierarchical decision modeling in hyperbolic space. We first abstract heterogeneous features into unified Latent Decision Nodes (LDNs) and embed them in the Poincaré ball, forming a continuous representation that resembles tree-structured reasoning. For numerical features, we introduce a Soft Decision Routing mechanism that approximates range-based local rules in a differentiable manner, bringing their LDN semantics closer to those of categorical features. An entropy-aware capacity allocation algorithm further adapts the number of LDNs per numerical feature to balance expressiveness and complexity. On the TALENT-tiny-core classification benchmark (30 datasets), HDE-Net achieves the \textit{best average rank}, outperforming both industrial GBDTs and recent tabular DNNs while maintaining high efficiency.

</details>


### [390] [Efficient Online Proportional Sampling with Applications to Smoothed Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10963)
*Amirmahdi Mirfakhar,Maria-Florina Balcan,Hedyeh Beyhaghi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高效数据结构，用于在σ-平滑对抗下进行高维在线比例采样，避免了朴素方法中分区数量指数级增长的问题，并应用于分段结构奖励的在线学习，获得了亚线性遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维在线比例采样问题中，随着时间推移，诱导分区复杂度呈指数级增长（O(t^d)），传统方法难以高效维护。本文旨在设计一种避免显式维护指数级增长的数据结构。

Method: 设计了一种支持高效更新和比例采样的数据结构，利用轴平行超平面产生的结构不连续性，在σ-平滑自适应对抗下达到O(√(σT))的深度界，在随机顺序对抗下达到O(log T)的深度界。

Result: 在σ-平滑对抗下证明了紧的O(√(σT))深度界，在随机顺序对抗下证明了O(log T)深度界，这是该问题类别中首个此类结果。应用于在线学习获得了全信息和赌博机反馈下的高效无遗憾算法。

Conclusion: 本文提出的数据结构有效解决了高维在线比例采样中分区指数增长的核心挑战，理论界限紧且算法高效，为分段结构奖励的在线学习提供了新框架。

Abstract: We study the problem of efficient online proportional sampling from a high-dimensional domain under a $σ$-smoothed adversary, where the sampling distribution is induced by a dynamically evolving weight function defined over a sequence of piecewise-structured partitions. This setting captures a broad range of applications, including principal-agent games (e.g., pricing and contract design), and algorithm configuration and parameter tuning. The central challenge is maintaining an efficient data structure as the induced partition grows increasingly complex over time -- naively, the number of subregions can grow as $O(t^d)$ by round $t$ in $d$ dimensions. We design a data structure that supports efficient updates and proportional sampling while avoiding the cost of explicitly maintaining this exponential growth, where the discontinuities are structured from axis-parallel hyperplanes. Under a $σ$-smoothed adaptive adversary, we prove a tight $O(\sqrt{σT})$ bound on the depth of our data structure, and an $O(\log T)$ bound under a random-order adversary -- to our knowledge, the first such results for this class of problems. We apply this framework to online learning with piecewise-structured rewards, obtaining efficient no-regret algorithms under both full-information and bandit feedback, with provable sublinear regret guarantees.

</details>


### [391] [EvoClawBench: Can Agents Learn Reusable Skills from Their Own Runs?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09711)
*Zhiyuan Peng,Xin Yin,Chenhao Ying,Zhe Cui,Zixiang Ding,Zhenhua Liu,Jiang Wu,Yuan Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了EvoClawBench基准，用于评估智能体是否能从自身执行中提取可复用技能。实验表明，技能学习并非自动有益，而是具有选择性和成本敏感性，不同运行时和模型下表现差异巨大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Agent基准测试只关注任务完成、工具使用或技能效用，但无法隔离评估运行时是否能够从自身执行中提取证据并转化为可复用技能，以改进后续执行效果。缺乏针对这种闭环技能学习问题的专门评估框架。

Method: 设计了EvoClawBench基准，包含100个任务和502个子问题，覆盖编码、数据、办公、安全、运维和领域文档工作流。比较三种模式：直接执行无技能、执行前预写技能(PreSkill)、从首轮执行中总结技能后重新执行(PostSkill)。支持多种Agent运行时，使用OpenClaw和nanobot在本地执行下进行实验。

Result: 直接基线性能强依赖于运行时：OpenClaw在所有模型下低于20%，nanobot范围从56.45%到96.13%。自编写技能效果不统一：nanobot GPT-5.4三种模式均超96%，MiniMax-M2.7在PostSkill下从90.97%提升至94.50%，但nanobot DeepSeek-V4-Pro从77.77%骤降至4.80%(PreSkill)和0.99%(PostSkill)。OpenClaw也表现出类似的非单调行为。

Conclusion: 从智能体自身运行中学习可复用技能是具有选择性和成本敏感性的，并非在Agent循环中添加技能编写就能自动带来收益。

Abstract: Existing agent benchmarks primarily test task completion, tool use, or skill utility, but do not isolate whether a runtime can convert evidence from its own runs into reusable skills that improve fresh executions after authoring overhead. We introduce EvoClawBench, a benchmark for this closed-loop skill-learning question on repeated, fixture-backed tasks. EvoClawBench compares direct execution without skills, PreSkill authoring before execution, and PostSkill summarization from first-run evidence followed by a fresh second execution. The suite contains 100 tasks and 502 sub-problems across coding, data, office, security, operations, and domain-document workflows, with support for multiple agent runtimes. Experiments with OpenClaw and nanobot under local execution show that direct baseline performance is strongly runtime-dependent: OpenClaw remains below 20% across models, while nanobot ranges from 56.45% to 96.13%. Self-authored skills have mixed effects. nanobot GPT-5.4 stays above 96% in all modes and MiniMax-M2.7 improves from 90.97% to 94.50% under PostSkill, but nanobot DeepSeek-V4-Pro drops from 77.77% to 4.80% with PreSkill and 0.99% with PostSkill. OpenClaw shows similarly non-monotonic behavior, with some skill runs near baseline and others collapsing. These results indicate that learning reusable skills from an agent's own runs is selective and cost-sensitive, rather than an automatic benefit of adding skill authoring to an agent loop.

</details>


### [392] [ERP Data Provisioning Financial Control Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09712)
*Anitha Samudrala*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SEQ-FCT框架，结合确定性脱敏、合成场景扩展、引用令牌化、策略审批和自动化验证，在合成ERP数据上实现高保真财务控制测试（F1达0.93），泄漏风险仅0.018。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 财务控制测试需要高质量的ERP数据，但直接使用生产副本会暴露个人、供应商、银行和商业敏感信息，存在严重隐私风险。

Method: 提出SEQ-FCT框架，综合运用确定性脱敏、合成场景扩展、引用令牌化、基于策略的发布审批以及用于对账、欺诈规则测试和审计分析的自动化验证。

Result: 在包含18.6万条记录的合成数据集上，SEQ-FCT实现：对账F1 0.932、欺诈触发召回率0.887、控制失败F1 0.914，泄漏风险评分0.018，优于静态脱敏、纯规则合成、条件表格生成合成及混合基线方法。

Conclusion: 当脱敏、合成数据和治理检查作为一个完整的发布流水线进行评估时，财务流程行为能够更可靠地得到保留，而非作为独立工具使用。

Abstract: Financial control testing increasingly depends on representative enterprise resource planning (ERP) data in quality environments, yet direct production copies expose personal, supplier, banking, and commercially sensitive records. This work presents Secure ERP Quality Provisioning for Financial Control Testing (SEQ-FCT), a governed data-provisioning framework that combines deterministic masking, synthetic scenario expansion, referential tokenization, policy-based release approval, and automated validation for reconciliation, fraud-rule testing, and audit analytics. A single synthetic dataset is used for evaluation. It contains 186,000 finance-process records from six subsidiaries over 2022-2025, including accounts payable invoices, payments, general-ledger journals, accounts receivable receipts, and bank-statement lines. The dataset includes entity relationships, monetary values, approval paths, tax attributes, banking markers, exception labels, fraud-rule triggers, and control-failure outcomes. Because the dataset is synthetic, reported results demonstrate controlled internal consistency rather than production validation. Against a production-clone upper bound, static masking, rules-only synthesis, conditional tabular generative synthesis, and a hybrid baseline, SEQ-FCT achieved 0.932 reconciliation F1, 0.887 fraud-trigger recall, 0.914 control-failure F1, and an estimated leakage-risk score of 0.018. The analysis indicates that financial process behavior can be preserved more reliably when masking, synthetic data, and governance checks are evaluated as a single release pipeline instead of independent utilities.

</details>


### [393] [Gauge dependence and structured-output corruption in sign-branched repetition penalties: measurements across models, inference stacks, and alternative repetition controls](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09791)
*Peter Hollows*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLM推理生态中广泛使用的乘法重复惩罚（repetition penalty）存在根本性缺陷：它基于符号分支（sign-branch）对原始logits进行操作，但logits的零点是不确定的（softmax对常数偏移不变），导致惩罚效果不稳定且不可控。该惩罚会显著破坏结构输出（如JSON schema的有效率从97%降至23%）。建议改用归一化后的log-probabilities来应用惩罚。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM推理生态中广泛使用的乘法重复惩罚（repetition penalty）存在一个被忽视的根本性问题：该惩罚基于原始logits的符号（正/负）分支进行不同处理，但logits的零点是任意且未受约束的（因为softmax对常数偏移不变），导致惩罚效果不稳定且不可控。

Method: (1) 理论分析证明logits零点任意性导致符号分支不可靠；(2) 实验测量：在5个模型（最高7B，包括base和RLHF）上测试WikiText-103前缀，以及2个代码模型在HumanEval和JSONSchemaBench上的表现；(3) 对比三种惩罚方式：原始符号分支惩罚、减法和归一化惩罚、以及将惩罚应用于归一化log-probabilities的替代方案。

Result: (1) 在repetition_penalty=1.3时，对logits重新居中（re-centring）会改变58-96%的贪婪解码token，而减法和归一化惩罚则不会；(2) 该惩罚严重破坏结构输出：theta=1.3时，JSON schema有效输出率从97%降至23%；(3) 将惩罚应用于归一化log-probabilities（而非原始logits）可消除上述两种问题。

Conclusion: LLM推理生态应放弃基于原始logits符号分支的重复惩罚方式，改为对归一化后的log-probabilities施加惩罚。HuggingFace已提供LogitNormalization算子但默认关闭且施于惩罚之后，应调整使用方式以修复此缺陷。

Abstract: The multiplicative repetition penalty shipped across the LLM inference ecosystem (HuggingFace, vLLM, llama.cpp, and a dozen further engines) branches on the sign of each raw logit (divide positives by theta, multiply negatives). But the softmax is unchanged by adding a constant to every logit, so a model's logit zero-point is arbitrary, and the sign-branch reads that arbitrary point. The sign-branch is itself the accepted fix for an earlier bug, so the accepted fix branches on a quantity the training objective leaves unconstrained. Two measurable consequences follow. (1) The penalty is not well-defined: re-centring a model's logits by a constant is a provable no-op at theta=1, yet at a routine theta=1.3 it changes 58-96% of greedy tokens, where subtractive and normalized penalties change none; real checkpoints sit at widely different zero-points, so a fixed repetition_penalty is a different operation on every model. (2) It corrupts structured output: on 200 real-world JSON schemas, theta=1.3 drops the rate of valid, schema-conformant output from 97% to 23%. In our measurements, applying the penalty to normalized log-probabilities instead of raw logits removes both effects. HuggingFace already ships that operator (LogitNormalization); today it is off by default and applied after the penalty. This note gives the mechanism, the measurements (five models up to 7B, base and RLHF, on WikiText-103 prefixes; two code models on HumanEval and JSONSchemaBench; both effects replicated inside vLLM and llama.cpp through their own samplers on the same inputs), and the normalized variant.

</details>


### [394] [Metadata-Free Meta-Reweighted Direct Preference Optimization under Noisy Preference Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09796)
*Hua Qu,Yifan Li,Xiaodong Yuan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种双层优化框架来增强DPO在噪声偏好数据下的对齐性能，结合元学习和LoRA微调，在摘要和对话任务上优于多个基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DPO依赖高质量偏好数据，但现实中的偏好数据常含有噪声，导致对齐性能下降。现有方法未充分解决这一噪声鲁棒性问题。

Method: 提出双层优化框架，理论上证明可恢复清洁数据下的DPO最优解；推导非对称标签翻转噪声下的可学习加权函数先验形式；提出任务无关的元知识驱动方法，在无元数据时仍可进行元学习；结合中心差分近似与LoRA微调，降低大模型元学习的高阶梯度计算成本。

Result: 在TL;DR摘要和Anthropic HH单轮对话任务上，所提方法在不同噪声率下均优于多个DPO基线。

Conclusion: 所提双层优化框架有效提升了DPO在噪声偏好数据下的鲁棒性，元学习方法在无元数据场景下依然有效，中心差分+LoRA方案使大模型元学习变得可行。

Abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has become an important method for aligning large language models (LLMs) with human preferences because it removes the need for explicit reward modeling and reinforcement learning optimization. However, its performance depends heavily on the quality of preference data, and noisy preference data in real-world settings can weaken alignment performance. To address this issue, we propose a bilevel optimization framework and prove, under certain assumptions, that this framework can recover the DPO optimum under clean data. We further derive a prior form for the learnable weighting function under asymmetric label-flipping noise. Considering that high-quality metadata may be difficult to obtain, we propose a task-agnostic meta-knowledge-driven method that enables meta-learning even when metadata is completely unavailable. To reduce the high cost of higher-order gradients in LLM meta-learning, we combine central-difference approximation with LoRA fine-tuning and develop a scalable training scheme. Experiments on TL;DR summarization and Anthropic HH single-turn dialogue show that the proposed method improves training performance over multiple DPO baselines under different noise rates.

</details>


### [395] [JEPA for AI-Native 6G: Predictive Representations and Open Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09798)
*Sheikh Salman Hassan,Irshad A. Meer,Almoatssimbillah Saifaldawla,Yan Kyaw Tun,Mustafa Ozger,Madyan Alsenwi,Nguyen Van Huynh,Woong-Hee Lee,Cedomir Stefanovic,Mathini Sellathurai,Henk Wymeersch,Tharmalingam Ratnarajah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统性地介绍了联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）作为一种自监督学习范式在6G AI原生网络中的应用，涵盖其训练机制、无线数据表征方法、网络部署定位，并通过波束管理案例验证了其标签效率与鲁棒性优势，最后讨论了多项开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G网络向AI原生演进，面临标签稀缺、数据异构、部分观测、非平稳信道及低延迟约束等挑战，亟需一种不依赖大量标注数据且能适应无线环境变化的自监督学习范式。

Method: 采用JEPA（联合嵌入预测架构），在潜空间而非原始数据空间进行缺失或未来表征的预测，避免了对原始信号重建或对比负样本的依赖。将CSI、波束测量、KPI、拓扑图、感知观测等无线数据令牌化与掩码处理，训练编码器作为预测性表征层，下游任务通过专用头或控制器完成决策。

Result: 波束管理案例表明，在自监督预训练阶段引入无线感知的辅助目标（未来波束能量），相比纯监督源域方法，能提升标签效率和跨部署场景的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: JEPA在6G AI原生网络中具有较大潜力，但仍面临多时间尺度预测、动作条件建模、分布式训练、可信性、高效部署、基准测试和标准化等挑战。

Abstract: Sixth-generation (6G) networks are moving toward AI-native operation, where learning modules are embedded across the radio access network (RAN), edge, and core. This transition requires learning from limited labels, heterogeneous wireless and network data, partial observations, non-stationary propagation, and latency-constrained control loops. Joint-embedding predictive architecture (JEPA) is a promising self-supervised paradigm for this setting because it predicts missing or future representations in latent space instead of reconstructing raw measurements or using contrastive negative samples. This article presents a wireless-oriented tutorial on JEPA for 6G intelligence. We define the JEPA training mechanism, describe how CSI, beam measurements, KPIs, topology graphs, and sensing observations can be tokenized and masked, and position the learned encoder as a predictive representation layer for RAN, O-RAN, edge, and core functions, with task-specific heads or controllers producing final decisions. Then we present an illustrative, beam-management case study suggesting that a wireless-aware target, specifically an auxiliary future beam-energy target during self-supervised pretraining, can improve label efficiency and robustness across shifted deployment conditions relative to a supervised source domain. Finally, we outline open challenges in multi-timescale prediction, action-conditioned modeling, distributed training, trustworthiness, efficient deployment, benchmarking, and standardization.

</details>


### [396] [The Silent Freeze: Predicting When Low-Precision Training Stops Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09800)
*Zekai Shang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 低精度训练中权重更新小于半ULP会导致学习冻结，该现象可被先验预测，且随机舍入可消除冻结。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示低精度浮点训练中学习会静默停止的确定性机制，并证明其可预测性。

Method: 通过理论推导半ULP冻结条件，在GPT、GPT-2等模型中使用bf16/8位浮点验证，并对比随机舍入效果。

Result: 低精度训练中权重冻结出现在预测的时间点；fp8格式下密集权重在初始化即冻结；随机舍入消除冻结；现象跨多种模型和精度设置复现。

Conclusion: 低精度训练存在一个可计算的冻结轴而非随机噪声，随机舍入是有效的缓解策略。

Abstract: Training in reduced floating-point precision can silently halt learning: when a gradient-descent weight update falls below half the unit in the last place (ULP) of the weight, it rounds away and that coordinate freezes while its gradient is still nonzero. The freeze is deterministic, governed by a per-coordinate half-ULP condition, and predictable from a high-precision trajectory and the target mantissa length alone, without low-precision data. In a small GPT trained under the standard AdamW-plus-cosine recipe with bf16-equivalent stored weights, training proceeds normally and then permanently freezes just past mid-run, within four steps of the a-priori prediction. In a $124$-million-parameter GPT-2 transformer whose weights are constrained to the $8$-bit floating-point grid after every optimizer step, with no master weights, the dense weights freeze at initialization in both fp8 formats -- predicted \emph{a priori} from an fp32 reference -- and validation loss plateaus while full precision keeps improving. Stochastic rounding removes the persistent freeze, and the same reference predicts that too. The condition transfers across frozen-feature regression, a mantissa-truncation emulator spanning $128\times$ in precision, small networks, and a CNN on MNIST: a computable axis of low-precision training, not diffuse noise.

</details>


### [397] [Discovering Latent Response Laws in Forced Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09801)
*Yi Zhu,Su Chen,Xiaojun Li,Xiuli Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FLARE是一种强制潜变量自编码器，能从高维测量数据中学习紧凑的响应坐标，识别稀疏的输入相关潜变量动力学，并解码方程滚动到完整响应，实现对受迫动力系统的高维响应预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受迫系统的控制方程中，有效变量往往隐藏在高维测量数据中，现有方法难以同时处理内在动力学和随时间变化的外部输入，需要一种能从高维观测中自动发现紧凑动力学坐标的方法。

Method: 提出FLARE（强制潜变量自编码器），包括：从数据估计潜变量维度、分离状态估计与外部强迫、学习稀疏输入依赖的潜变量动力学、将方程滚动解码为完整响应。

Result: 在已知动力系统、大规模受迫响应和视觉观测中，FLARE能恢复紧凑的受迫动力学，并利用未见过的输入预测长时间尺度的高维响应。

Conclusion: FLARE将学习到的坐标转化为动力学接口，将方程发现扩展到有效状态隐藏在复杂观测中的系统，为受迫动力系统的高维响应提供可解释建模和预测的路径。

Abstract: Governing equations provide compact descriptions of physical systems, yet the variables in which they are simple are often hidden in high-dimensional measurements. This challenge is sharper for forced systems, whose responses depend on both intrinsic dynamics and time-dependent inputs. Here we introduce FLARE, a forced latent autoencoder for response equations that learns compact response coordinates, identifies sparse input-dependent latent dynamics and decodes equation rollouts to full responses. By estimating latent dimension from data and separating state estimation from external forcing, FLARE enables forecasts to be initialized from past responses and driven by prescribed future inputs. Across known dynamical systems, application-scale forced responses and visual observations, FLARE recovers compact forced dynamics and predicts long-horizon high-dimensional responses under inputs not used for training. By turning learned coordinates into a dynamical interface, FLARE extends equation discovery to systems whose effective states are hidden within complex observations, providing a route for interpretable modelling and prediction of high-dimensional responses in forced dynamical systems.

</details>


### [398] [Spectral Origins of the Self-Correction Blind Spot in Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09803)
*Ingrid Petrova,Luan Vejsiu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPARC，一个基于谱代数的自回归生成模型自我纠正理论。通过定义误差传播算子（逐步注意力Jacobian在残差流上的乘积），证明自纠正盲点出现的充要条件是算子谱半径≥1，推导出纠正标记必须超过的激活阈值（解释了"Wait"标记89.3%的盲点降低），并证明了RL-based验证器-纠正器训练的收敛条件（耦合矩阵谱范数<1）。实验在四种骨干网络和视觉自回归探针上验证了理论，谱预测与实测盲点率的RMSE在3.2%以内。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作虽已观察到自纠正盲点现象并进行了经验性研究，但缺乏形式化理论模型来解释：为什么生成token会抑制检测其错误的能力、纠正标记的定量激活条件、以及强化学习自纠正的收敛保证。本文旨在填补这些理论空白。

Method: 定义误差传播算子为逐步注意力Jacobian在残差流上的乘积。通过谱分析证明盲点出现的充要条件（谱半径≥1），推导纠正标记的激活阈值（谱半径函数），并证明RL训练的收敛条件（耦合矩阵谱范数<1）。

Result: 理论预测与实验验证高度一致：解释了"Wait"标记89.3%的盲点降低效果；谱预测与实测盲点率的均方根误差仅3.2%；四种骨干网络和视觉自回归探针均验证了所有定理。

Conclusion: SPARC为自回归模型的自纠正盲点现象提供了统一的形式化理论框架，将文本LLM与自回归图像/视频生成模型统一在相同的谱分析框架下，并给出了可验证的定量预测。

Abstract: Large autoregressive language models exhibit a self-correction blind spot: they reliably fix identical errors when attributed to an external source yet fail to fix the same errors in their own outputs. Prior work has documented this phenomenon empirically, through controlled error injection, error-depth decompositions, RL-based verifier-corrector training, and intrinsic self-verification, but offers no formal model of why generating a token suppresses the ability to detect its error, no quantitative activation condition for correction markers, and no convergence guarantee for reinforcement-learning-based self-correction. We close these gaps with SPARC, a spectral-algebraic theory of self-correction in autoregressive generation. We define the error-propagation operator as the product of per-step attention Jacobians on the residual stream and prove that the blind spot arises if and only if the spectral radius of this operator is at least one. We derive a sharp activation threshold, given as a function of the spectral radius, that a correction marker must exceed, recovering the 89.3\% blind-spot reduction observed with a simple ``Wait'' marker. We further prove that RL-based verifier-corrector training converges at a rate proportional to the squared coupling strength over the square root of the number of samples if and only if the verifier-corrector coupling matrix has spectral norm below one, and that this criterion is invariant across residual-stream autoregressive modalities, unifying text LLMs and autoregressive image and video generation. Experiments across four backbones and a visual autoregressive probe validate every theorem, with spectral predictions matching measured blind-spot rates within 3.2\% RMSE.

</details>


### [399] [RUBRIC: Realism--Utility Balanced Ranking for Imbalanced Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09816)
*Yanxuan Yu,Dong liu,Renata Borovica-Gajic,Ying Nian Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RUBRIC是一个生成器无关的合成样本过滤框架，通过现实主义-效用权衡机制选择高质量候选样本，以解决类别不平衡问题中的过拟合和泛化退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有过采样方法生成大量低质量合成样本，扭曲决策边界或引入伪影，导致过拟合和泛化能力下降。急需一种质量优先于数量的样本选择机制。

Method: 提出RUBRIC框架，利用判别器评估样本真实性（区分真实与合成），结合基于边际的凹评分函数衡量样本效用，通过现实主义-效用权衡排序筛选高质量合成样本。

Result: 在信用卡欺诈检测等多个不平衡基准上，RUBRIC提升了F1-macro和召回率，同时保持可比的ROC-AUC。还提供了λ敏感性分析，指导用户根据排序质量优先级调整AUPRC。

Conclusion: RUBRIC通过质量过滤策略有效缓解了过采样方法的弊病，在理论上能单调收紧基于边际分类器的泛化界，实践中显著提升了关键分类指标。

Abstract: Class imbalance poses a fundamental challenge in risk-sensitive applications such as fraud detection and medical diagnosis, where minority-class samples are scarce yet critical for accurate classification. Existing oversampling methods generate synthetic samples to rebalance class distributions; however, they often produce large numbers of low-quality candidates that distort decision boundaries or introduce artifacts, leading to overfitting and degraded generalization.
  In this work, we introduce RUBRIC, a generator-agnostic filtering framework that formulates synthetic sample selection as a quality-over-quantity optimization problem. RUBRIC ranks candidates using a realism-utility trade-off: realism is quantified by a learned discriminator that distinguishes real samples from synthetic samples, while utility captures proximity to the decision boundary through a concave margin-based scoring function. We show that, under mild regularity conditions, the proposed filtering strategy monotonically tightens the generalization bound for margin-based classifiers by jointly reducing distribution shift and suppressing near-negative tail contributions.
  Through extensive experiments on credit-card fraud detection and other imbalanced benchmarks, we demonstrate that RUBRIC improves F1-macro and recall while maintaining comparable ROC-AUC across several generators. We also provide explicit lambda-sensitivity analysis to show how users can recover AUPRC when ranking quality is prioritized.

</details>


### [400] [Serving the Long Tail: Training-Free LLM Candidate Generation for Vacation Rental Marketplaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09877)
*Syed Mohammed Arshad Zaidi,Eric Rincon,Shayan Hassantabar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对度假租赁市场供给侧的结构性失衡（少数热门房源获得大部分交互，长尾房源缺乏行为信号），Vrbo提出了一种基于LLM的无训练候选生成管道，利用静态属性元数据为IBKNN无法覆盖的数十万房源生成候选，通过Union融合策略保证不退化原有性能，在长尾房源上取得最大增益，并证明可部署自托管小模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Vacation rental市场存在供给侧结构失衡：少数热门房源获得绝大多数用户交互，而大量新上架、小众、季节性房源因缺乏行为信号，传统的协同过滤方法（包括Vrbo核心的IBKNN）无法有效为其生成候选，导致数十万房源在候选生成阶段被完全忽略。

Method: 提出零训练LLM候选生成管道：(1) 用现成LLM为每个房源合成多样化的语义查询；(2) 用预训练文本编码器将其嵌入；(3) 在1170万房源库上执行近似最近邻检索；(4) 通过Union融合策略合并LLM结果与IBKNN结果，保留行为通道的排序顺序，保证不降低已在IBKNN中良好覆盖的房源性能；(5) 下游学习排序模型对融合池重新打分。

Result: 在160万目标房源上评估：系统将候选覆盖扩展到IBKNN无法触达的数万房源；在长尾段（行为方法最弱）取得最大增益；在每个K值上均匹配或超越IBKNN；下游LTR进一步提升融合池效果；Union融合将3B开源LLM与前沿API模型的召回差距从27-46%压缩到1%以下。

Conclusion: 所提出的无训练LLM候选生成管道能够有效补充传统协同过滤方法在长尾房源上的不足，通过Union融合策略在扩展覆盖的同时不牺牲热门房源性能，且支持部署自托管小模型，在工业级市场规模下可行。

Abstract: Vacation rental marketplaces face a structural imbalance on the supply side: a small fraction of properties receive most user interactions, while the long tail of new, niche, and seasonal listings generates too little behavioral signal for collaborative filtering to serve effectively. At Vrbo, item-based k-nearest neighbors (IBKNN) is a core candidate generation channel, but leaves tens of thousands of properties with no candidates and produces weak neighborhoods for sparsely interacted ones. We present a training-free, LLM-based candidate generation pipeline that complements IBKNN using static property metadata alone. An off-the-shelf LLM synthesizes diverse semantic queries per property, a pre-trained text encoder embeds them, and an approximate nearest-neighbor index retrieves candidates from an 11.7M-property catalog. A Union fusion strategy merges these with IBKNN while preserving the behavioral channel's ordering, guaranteeing no degradation on well-served properties, and a downstream learning-to-rank model re-scores the fused pool. Evaluated on 1.6M focal properties, the system extends candidate coverage to tens of thousands of properties IBKNN cannot reach, delivers its largest gains on the long-tail segment where behavioral methods are weakest, and matches or beats IBKNN at every K on shared properties. A downstream learning-to-rank stage further lifts the fused pool, yielding a complete candidate generation and re-ranking stack that serves the long tail without regressing well-served properties. We additionally show that Union fusion collapses the recall gap between a 3B open-weights LLM and frontier API-based models from 27-46% to under 1%, supporting self-hosted small-model deployment at marketplace catalog scale.

</details>


### [401] [Estimation, Prediction, and Assortment Optimization for Markov Chain Choice Models with Panel Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09817)
*Yalcin Akcay,Gerardo Berbeglia,Young-San Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出面向面板数据的马尔可夫链选择模型框架，涵盖参数估计、个性化选择预测与品类优化，重点设计了基于偏序偏好信息的EM算法，在合成数据和寿司数据集上超越了传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统选择模型假设交易独立同分布，忽略了同一顾客历史交易间的依赖性。本文首次将马尔可夫链选择模型与面板数据结合，利用偏序偏好信息捕捉顾客行为依赖性。

Method: 提出新颖的期望最大化（EM）算法，通过整合基于偏序的顾客偏好信息进行马尔可夫链参数估计；并针对条件选择预测和品类优化问题给出hardness结果与计算结论。

Result: 在合成数据集和寿司数据集上，所提EM算法优于Simsek & Topaloglu (2018)的传统EM算法以及基于多项Logit的偏序基准方法（Jagabathula & Vulcano, 2018）。

Conclusion: 该框架填补了面板数据下马尔可夫链选择模型的研究空白，参数估计、预测与优化的理论结果共同刻画了完整的计算景观，具有独立的理论兴趣。

Abstract: We propose a framework for the Markov chain (MC) choice model with panel data, including parameter estimation, personalized choice prediction, and personalized assortment optimization.
